LuaScript:
-- 3507264356

susList = {'Purple', 'Red', 'Blue', 'Yellow', 'Pink', 'White'}
roomList = {'aa', 'bb', 'cc', 'dd', 'ee', 'ff', 'gg', 'hh', 'ii', 'jj', 'kk', 'll'}
goFlag = {}
goToList = {}
roomPosition = {}
currentPart = 1
pcName = {}
doneFlag = {}


function onLoad()
    for i = 1, #susList do
        goFlag[susList[i]] = 0
        goToList[susList[i]] = nil
        roomPosition[susList[i]] = {}
    end

    doneFlag['Done3'] = 0
    doneFlag['Done17'] = 0
    doneFlag['Done29'] = 0
    doneFlag['Done75'] = 0
    roomBoard = getObjectFromGUID('92f462')
    tableZone = getObjectFromGUID('2e14e8')
    pcName[susList[1]] = '영매소녀'
    pcName[susList[2]] = '여대생'
    pcName[susList[3]] = '청년'
    pcName[susList[4]] = '도시전설 작가'
    pcName[susList[5]] = '고아'
    pcName[susList[6]] = '백의의 노인'
    roomPosition[susList[1]][roomList[1]] = {-39.46, 3.84, 24.40}
    roomPosition[susList[1]][roomList[2]] = {-39.46, 3.84, 17.84}
    roomPosition[susList[1]][roomList[3]] = {-39.46, 3.84, 11.32}
    roomPosition[susList[1]][roomList[4]] = {-39.46, 3.84, 4.85}
    roomPosition[susList[1]][roomList[5]] = {-39.46, 3.84, -1.68}
    roomPosition[susList[1]][roomList[6]] = {7.79, 3.84, 24.40}
    roomPosition[susList[1]][roomList[7]] = {7.79, 3.84, 17.89}
    roomPosition[susList[1]][roomList[8]] = {7.79, 3.84, 11.38}
    roomPosition[susList[1]][roomList[9]] = {7.79, 3.84, 4.84}
    roomPosition[susList[1]][roomList[10]] = {7.79, 3.84, -1.74}
    roomPosition[susList[1]][roomList[11]] = {-39.50, 3.84, -8.29} --
    roomPosition[susList[1]][roomList[12]] = {7.79, 3.84, -8.29}
    for i = 1, #roomList do -- {-41.50, 3.84, -8.29}
        roomPosition[susList[2]][roomList[i]] = {}
        roomPosition[susList[2]][roomList[i]][1] = roomPosition[susList[1]][roomList[i]][1] - 2.04
        roomPosition[susList[2]][roomList[i]][2] = roomPosition[susList[1]][roomList[i]][2]
        roomPosition[susList[2]][roomList[i]][3] = roomPosition[susList[1]][roomList[i]][3]
    end
    for i = 1, #roomList do -- {-41.50, 3.84, -8.29}
        roomPosition[susList[3]][roomList[i]] = {}
        roomPosition[susList[3]][roomList[i]][1] = roomPosition[susList[1]][roomList[i]][1] - 2.04
        roomPosition[susList[3]][roomList[i]][2] = roomPosition[susList[1]][roomList[i]][2]
        roomPosition[susList[3]][roomList[i]][3] = roomPosition[susList[1]][roomList[i]][3] + 2.74
    end
    for i = 1, #roomList do -- {-41.50, 3.84, -8.29}
        roomPosition[susList[4]][roomList[i]] = {}
        roomPosition[susList[4]][roomList[i]][1] = roomPosition[susList[1]][roomList[i]][1] 
        roomPosition[susList[4]][roomList[i]][2] = roomPosition[susList[1]][roomList[i]][2]
        roomPosition[susList[4]][roomList[i]][3] = roomPosition[susList[1]][roomList[i]][3] + 2.74
    end
    for i = 1, #roomList do -- {-41.50, 3.84, -8.29}
        roomPosition[susList[5]][roomList[i]] = {}
        roomPosition[susList[5]][roomList[i]][1] = roomPosition[susList[1]][roomList[i]][1] + 2.04
        roomPosition[susList[5]][roomList[i]][2] = roomPosition[susList[1]][roomList[i]][2]
        roomPosition[susList[5]][roomList[i]][3] = roomPosition[susList[1]][roomList[i]][3]
    end
    for i = 1, #roomList do -- {-41.50, 3.84, -8.29}
        roomPosition[susList[6]][roomList[i]] = {}
        roomPosition[susList[6]][roomList[i]][1] = roomPosition[susList[1]][roomList[i]][1] + 2.04
        roomPosition[susList[6]][roomList[i]][2] = roomPosition[susList[1]][roomList[i]][2]
        roomPosition[susList[6]][roomList[i]][3] = roomPosition[susList[1]][roomList[i]][3] + 2.74
    end
end

function roomClick(player, value, id)
    if player.color == 'Black' then 
        return
    end
    broadcastToColor('장소 '.. id .. '를 선택했습니다.', player.color)
    goFlag[player.color] = 1
    goToList[player.color] = string.lower(id) .. string.lower(id)
    

    if goFlag[susList[1]] + goFlag[susList[2]] + goFlag[susList[3]] + goFlag[susList[4]] + goFlag[susList[5]] + goFlag[susList[6]] == 6 then
        UI.setAttribute('g_part1', 'active', 'false')
        UI.setAttribute('g_part2', 'active', 'false')
        
        local figObj = {}
        broadcastToAll('캐릭터가 이동합니다.', {0, 1, 0})
        for i = 1, #susList do
            figObj[susList[i]] = findObj_wName(pcName[susList[i]])
            figObj[susList[i]].setPositionSmooth(roomPosition[susList[i]][goToList[susList[i]]], false, false)
        end
        Wait.time(function()
            local GMZone = getObjectFromGUID('8d5a56')
            for i = 1, #susList do
                figObj[susList[i]].setPosition(roomPosition[susList[i]][goToList[susList[i]]])
                figObj[susList[i]].setLock(true)
                figObj[susList[i]].interactable = false
            end
            local rcards = GMZone.getObjects()
            for j = 1, #rcards do
                local tgn = rcards[j].getGMNotes()
                if rcards[j].getName() == 'card' and string.find(tgn, 'part'..tostring(currentPart)) and 
                (string.find(string.lower(tgn), goToList[susList[1]]) or
                string.find(string.lower(tgn), goToList[susList[2]]) or
                string.find(string.lower(tgn), goToList[susList[3]]) or
                string.find(string.lower(tgn), goToList[susList[4]]) or
                string.find(string.lower(tgn), goToList[susList[5]]) or
                string.find(string.lower(tgn), goToList[susList[6]])) then
                    local tmppos = rcards[j].getPosition()
                    if currentPart == 1 then
                        tmppos.x = tmppos.x - 11.75
                        tmppos.y = 5
                        tmppos.z = tmppos.z - 100.22
                    elseif currentPart == 2 then
                        tmppos.y = 5
                        tmppos.z = tmppos.z - 100.2
                    end
                    rcards[j].setLock(false)
                    rcards[j].setPosition(tmppos)
                end
            end
        end, 1.5)
    end
end

function findObj_wName(input)
    local obj = getObjects()
    for i = 1, #obj do
        if obj[i].getName() == input then
            return obj[i]
        end
    end
end

function isBackUpper(obj)
    local zz = obj.getRotation().z
    if zz > 170 and zz < 190 then
        return true
    else 
        return false
    end
end

function isFrontUpper(obj)
    if isBackUpper(obj) == true then
        return false
    else
        return true
    end
end

function startSearching()
    broadcastToAll('방 탐색을 시작합니다.', {0, 1, 0})
    -- 방 정보
    for i = 1, #roomList do
        if countPC(roomList[i]) > 0 then
            local rzone = findZone(roomList[i])
            local obj = rzone.getObjects()
            for i = 1, #obj do
                if obj[i].getName() == 'card' and isBackUpper(obj[i]) then
                    obj[i].setLock(false)
                    obj[i].flip()
                    obj[i].call('setReadable')
                end
            end
        end
    end
    local cards = tableZone.getObjects()
    for i = 1, #cards do
        if cards[i].getName() == 'card' and string.find(cards[i].getGMNotes(), 'clue') then
            local cardcd = getCode(cards[i].getGMNotes())
            local goahead = 1
            if cardcd == nil then
                goahead = 0
            elseif countPC(cardcd) == 0 then
                goahead = 0
            end

            if string.find(cards[i].getGMNotes(), 'Done') then
                if string.find(cards[i].getGMNotes(), 'Done3') and doneFlag['Done3'] == 0 then
                    goahead = 0
                elseif string.find(cards[i].getGMNotes(), 'Done17') and doneFlag['Done17'] == 0 then
                    goahead = 0
                elseif string.find(cards[i].getGMNotes(), 'Done29') and doneFlag['Done29'] == 0 then
                    goahead = 0
                elseif string.find(cards[i].getGMNotes(), 'Done75') and doneFlag['Done75'] == 0 then
                    goahead = 0
                end
            end
            if goahead == 1 then
                if isBackUpper(cards[i]) then
                    cards[i].setLock(false)
                    cards[i].flip()
                end
                cards[i].call('setReadable')
            else
            end
        elseif cards[i].getName() == 'card' and string.find(cards[i].getGMNotes(), 'event') then
            if isBackUpper(cards[i]) then
                cards[i].call('setReadable')
            end
        end
    end
end

function getCode(GMN)
    local sgmn = string.lower(GMN)
    for i = 1, #roomList do
        if string.find(sgmn, roomList[i]) then
            return roomList[i]
        end
    end
    return nil
end

function findZone(code)
    local objs = getObjects()
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if string.find(objs[i].getName(), 'Zone'..string.lower(code)) then
            return objs[i]
        end
    end
    print('No zone "Zone'..string.lower(code)..'"')
    return nil
end

function countPC(code)
    local zone = findZone(code)
    local objs = zone.getObjects()
    local count = 0
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if objs[i].getName() == '영매소녀' or objs[i].getName() == '여대생' or objs[i].getName() == '청년' or 
        objs[i].getName() == '도시전설 작가' or objs[i].getName() == '고아' or objs[i].getName() == '백의의 노인' then
            count = count + 1
        end
    end
    return count
end

function showRoomList()
    UI.setAttribute('g_part'..tostring(currentPart), 'active', 'true')
    for i = 1, 6 do
        goFlag[susList[i]] = 0
    end
end

function getDoneFlag(index)
    return doneFlag[index]
end

function onDoneFlag(index)
    doneFlag[index] = 1
    local cards = tableZone.getObjects()

    for i = 1, #cards do
        if cards[i].getName() == 'card' and string.find(cards[i].getGMNotes(), index) then
            if isBackUpper(cards[i]) then
                cards[i].setLock(false)
                cards[i].flip()
            end
            cards[i].call('setReadable')
        end
    end
end

eventLog = {}
eventLog['a'] = 0
eventLog['c'] = 0
eventLog['e'] = 0
eventLog['f'] = 0
eventLog['h'] = 0
eventLog['C'] = 0
eventLog['G'] = 0
eventLog['J'] = 0
eventLog['K'] = 0
eventLog['60'] = 0
function setEventLog(index)
    if eventLog[index] == 0 then
        eventLog[index] = 1
        if index == 'a' and getDoneFlag('Done3') == 0 then
            broadcastToAll(index .. '방 이벤트가 발생했습니다.')
            onDoneFlag('Done3')
        elseif index == 'e' and getDoneFlag('Done17') == 0 then
            broadcastToAll(index .. '방 이벤트가 발생했습니다.')
            onDoneFlag('Done17')
        elseif index == 'h' and getDoneFlag('Done29') == 0 then
            broadcastToAll(index .. '방 이벤트가 발생했습니다.')
            onDoneFlag('Done29')
        elseif index == 'C' and getDoneFlag('Done75') == 0 then
            broadcastToAll(index .. '방 이벤트가 발생했습니다.')
            onDoneFlag('Done75')
        elseif index == 'J' then
            broadcastToAll(index .. '방 이벤트 - L방(고문실) 오픈 이벤트가 발생했습니다.')
            openRoom('L')
        elseif index == '60' then
            broadcastToAll('K방(정신치료실) 오픈 이벤트가 발생했습니다.')
            openRoom('K')
        end
    end
end

function goPart2()
    currentPart = 2
    broadcastToAll('파트 2가 시작되었습니다.', {0.4, 0.4, 1})
end

function openRoom(room)
    local GMZone = getObjectFromGUID('8d5a56')
    local objs = GMZone.getObjects()
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if string.find(objs[i].getGMNotes(), 'part2') and string.find(objs[i].getGMNotes(), 'room')
        and string.find(objs[i].getGMNotes(), room..room) then
            local tmppos = objs[i].getPosition()
            tmppos.z = tmppos.z - 100.2
            tmppos.y = 5.5
            objs[i].setLock(false)
            objs[i].setPositionSmooth(tmppos, false, false)
        end
    end

    local mapobj = getObjectFromGUID('f24d5c')
    if room == 'K' then
        UI.setAttribute('K', 'active', 'true')
        roomBoard.UI.setAttribute('part2room_k', 'active', 'true')
        mapobj.UI.setAttribute('roomk', 'active', 'true')
    elseif room == 'L' then
        UI.setAttribute('L', 'active', 'true')
        roomBoard.UI.setAttribute('part2room_l', 'active', 'true')
        mapobj.UI.setAttribute('rooml', 'active', 'true')
    end
end

    local guidlist = {'4ee1f2', '35b95f', '393bf7', '5af8f2', '12c65e', 'f938a2', 'afc863', '9f95fd', 'c8edca',
        '92f462', '2e31eb', 'e102eb', '539340', '4d2266', '0392bd', 'f732c4'}

    self.interactable = false
    for i = 1, #guidlist do
        local obj = getObjectFromGUID(guidlist[i])
        obj.interactable = false
    end
end

ui_bImage = {}
ui_bImage['87'] = 'https://steamusercontent-a.akamaihd.net/ugc/14552609302709828805/FF15CFB8E0739735950BE99467B55A301932ED85/'
ui_bImage['88'] = 'https://steamusercontent-a.akamaihd.net/ugc/13637150399986327710/5E855AE552409A8B7E99A5EE6094C18CF321D011/'
ui_bImage['89'] = 'https://steamusercontent-a.akamaihd.net/ugc/18081785194298991867/51B7BDCBA62605B97B3A29C178ABE1084501199A/'

function onLoad()
    local scriptor = getObjectFromGUID('0b8271')
    local scriptstr = scriptor.getLuaScript()
    local uistr = scriptor.UI.getXml()
    local obj = getObjects()
    for i = 1, #obj do
        if obj[i].getName() == 'card' then
            if string.find(obj[i].getGMNotes(), 'black') == nil then -- normal room card
                obj[i].setLuaScript(scriptstr)
                if obj[i].getDescription() == '87' or obj[i].getDescription() == '88' or obj[i].getDescription() == '89' then
                    obj[i].UI.setXml([=[
<Image id="bImage" active="true" visibility="White|Brown|Red|Orange|Yellow|Teal|Green|Blue|Purple|Pink|Grey" position="0 0 -51" rotation="0 0 180" width="1060" height="1520" scale="0.2 0.2 0.2" image="]=] .. ui_bImage[obj[i].getDescription()] .. [=["/>
]=] .. uistr)
                else
                    obj[i].UI.setXml(uistr)
                end

            else -- black card
                local blackCardUI = obj[i].UI.getXml()
                obj[i].UI.setXml([=[
<Image id="bImage" active="true" visibility="White|Brown|Red|Orange|Yellow|Teal|Green|Blue|Purple|Pink|Grey" position="0 0 -51" rotation="0 0 180" width="1060" height="1520" scale="0.2 0.2 0.2" color="#777777"/>
]=] .. blackCardUI)
            end
        end
    end

    Wait.time(function()
        for i = 1, #obj do
            if obj[i].getName() == 'card' and string.find(obj[i].getGMNotes(), 'black') == nil then
                obj[i].call('initializeUI')
            end
        end
    end, 1.5)
end

ObjectStates.Name: Card
ObjectStates.LuaScript:
susList = {'Purple', 'Red', 'Blue', 'Yellow', 'Pink', 'White'}
colorList = {'Purple', 'Red', 'Blue', 'Yellow', 'Pink', 'White', 'Green', 'Brown', 'Teal', 'Orange', 'Grey'}
hideList = {}
isOpened = 0

function onLoad()
    self.addContextMenuItem("토글:공개상태", revealToAll)
    for i = 1, 11 do
        hideList[i] = colorList[i]
    end

    if self.getDescription() ~= '1' then
        self.setHiddenFrom(hideList)
    end
    
    if self.getGMNotes() == 'part1character' then
        self.use_hands = true
    end
end

function initializeUI()
    local GMN = self.getGMNotes()
    local cnum = self.getDescription()
    if string.find(GMN, 'clue') then
        self.UI.setAttribute('whole', 'active', 'true')
    elseif cnum == '11' or cnum == '22' or cnum == '91' then 
        self.UI.setAttribute('whole', 'active', 'true')
    else
        self.UI.setAttribute('whole', 'active', 'false')
    end
end

function revealToAll(player_color, menu_position)
    if player_color == 'Black' then
        if isOpened == 0 then
            isOpened = 1
            self.setHiddenFrom({})
            broadcastToColor("GM안내 : 이 카드의 내용을 숨기지 않습니다.", 'Black', {0.3, 1, 0.3})
        self.UI.setAttribute('whole', 'active', 'false')
        else
            isOpened = 0
            self.setHiddenFrom(colorList)
            broadcastToColor("GM안내 : 이 카드의 내용을 숨깁니다.", 'Black', {1, 0.3, 0.3})
            initializeUI()
        end
    end
end

function tryObjectEnter(object)
    return false
end

function getOwner()
    local zones = self.getZones()
    for i = 1, #zones do
        if zones[i].getName() == 'HandZone' or zones[i].getName() == 'SlotZone' then
            return zones[i].getDescription()
        end
    end
end

function getCode()
    local GMN = self.getGMNotes()
    local codeList = {'aa', 'bb', 'cc', 'dd', 'ee', 'ff', 'gg', 'hh', 'ii', 'AA', 'BB', 'CC', 'DD',
                    'EE', 'FF', 'GG', 'HH', 'II', 'JJ', 'KK', 'LL'}
    for i = 1, #codeList do
        if string.find(GMN, codeList[i]) then
            return codeList[i]
        end
    end
end

function setReadable()
    local GMN = self.getGMNotes()
    local code = getCode()
    local requiredPCAmount = 1
    for i = 1, 11 do
        hideList[i] = colorList[i]
    end

    self.addContextMenuItem("토글:공개상태", revealToAll)

ObjectStates.Name: Card
ObjectStates.LuaScript:
susList = {'Purple', 'Red', 'Blue', 'Yellow', 'Pink', 'White'}
colorList = {'Purple', 'Red', 'Blue', 'Yellow', 'Pink', 'White', 'Green', 'Brown', 'Teal', 'Orange', 'Grey'}
hideList = {}
isOpened = 0

function onLoad()
    self.addContextMenuItem("토글:공개상태", revealToAll)
    for i = 1, 11 do
        hideList[i] = colorList[i]
    end

    if self.getDescription() ~= '1' then
        self.setHiddenFrom(hideList)
    end
    
    if self.getGMNotes() == 'part1character' then
        self.use_hands = true
    end
end

function initializeUI()
    local GMN = self.getGMNotes()
    local cnum = self.getDescription()
    if string.find(GMN, 'clue') then
        self.UI.setAttribute('whole', 'active', 'true')
    elseif cnum == '11' or cnum == '22' or cnum == '91' then 
        self.UI.setAttribute('whole', 'active', 'true')
    else
        self.UI.setAttribute('whole', 'active', 'false')
    end
end

function revealToAll(player_color, menu_position)
    if player_color == 'Black' then
        if isOpened == 0 then
            isOpened = 1
            self.setHiddenFrom({})
            broadcastToColor("GM안내 : 이 카드의 내용을 숨기지 않습니다.", 'Black', {0.3, 1, 0.3})
        self.UI.setAttribute('whole', 'active', 'false')
        else
            isOpened = 0
            self.setHiddenFrom(colorList)
            broadcastToColor("GM안내 : 이 카드의 내용을 숨깁니다.", 'Black', {1, 0.3, 0.3})
            initializeUI()
        end
    end
end

function tryObjectEnter(object)
    return false
end

function getOwner()
    local zones = self.getZones()
    for i = 1, #zones do
        if zones[i].getName() == 'HandZone' or zones[i].getName() == 'SlotZone' then
            return zones[i].getDescription()
        end
    end
end

function getCode()
    local GMN = self.getGMNotes()
    local codeList = {'aa', 'bb', 'cc', 'dd', 'ee', 'ff', 'gg', 'hh', 'ii', 'AA', 'BB', 'CC', 'DD',
                    'EE', 'FF', 'GG', 'HH', 'II', 'JJ', 'KK', 'LL'}
    for i = 1, #codeList do
        if string.find(GMN, codeList[i]) then
            return codeList[i]
        end
    end
end

function setReadable()
    local GMN = self.getGMNotes()
    local code = getCode()
    local requiredPCAmount = 1
    for i = 1, 11 do
        hideList[i] = colorList[i]
    end

    if string.find(GMN, 'People2') then
        requiredPCAmount = 2
    elseif string.find(GMN, 'People3') then
        requiredPCAmount = 3
    elseif string.find(GMN, 'People4') then
        requiredPCAmount = 4
    elseif string.find(GMN, 'People9') then
        requiredPCAmount = 9
    end

    local zone = findZone(code)
    local objs = zone.getObjects()
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if objs[i].getName() == '영매소녀' then
            if countPC(code) >= requiredPCAmount or string.find(GMN, 'Club') or string.find(GMN, 'Equal') or string.find(GMN, 'Square') then
                hideList[1] = 'Grey'
            end
        elseif objs[i].getName() == '여대생' then
            if countPC(code) >= requiredPCAmount or string.find(GMN, 'Triangle') or string.find(GMN, 'Circles') or string.find(GMN, 'Plus') then
                hideList[2] = 'Grey'
            end
        elseif objs[i].getName() == '청년' then
            if countPC(code) >= requiredPCAmount or string.find(GMN, 'Heart') or string.find(GMN, 'Circles') or string.find(GMN, 'Square') then
                hideList[3] = 'Grey'
            end
        elseif objs[i].getName() == '도시전설 작가' then
            if countPC(code) >= requiredPCAmount or string.find(GMN, 'Diamond') or string.find(GMN, 'Circles') or string.find(GMN, 'Equal') then
                hideList[4] = 'Grey'
            end
        elseif objs[i].getName() == '고아' then
            if countPC(code) >= requiredPCAmount or string.find(GMN, 'Star') or string.find(GMN, 'Plus') or string.find(GMN, 'Equal') then
                hideList[5] = 'Grey'
            end
        elseif objs[i].getName() == '백의의 노인' then
            if countPC(code) >= requiredPCAmount or string.find(GMN, 'Spade') or string.find(GMN, 'Plus') or string.find(GMN, 'Square') then
                hideList[6] = 'Grey'
            end
        end
    end
    if self.getDescription() == '19' then
        local conditionCard = findCard(39)
        if conditionCard ~= nil then
            local tmpZones = conditionCard.getZones()
            for i = 1, #tmpZones do
                if tmpZones[i].getName() == 'SlotZone' or tmpZones[i].getName() == 'HandZone' then
                    for j = 1, #susList do
                        if tmpZones[i].getDescription() == susList[j] then
                            hideList[j] = 'Grey'
                        end
                    end
                end
            end
        end
    end


    if string.find(self.getGMNotes(), 'Covered') then
        self.setHiddenFrom({})
    else
        self.setHiddenFrom(hideList)
    end
    setUIVisibility()
end

function setUIVisibility()
    local vl = 'Black'
    for i = 1, 11 do
        if hideList[i] ~= colorList[i] then
            vl = vl .. '|' .. colorList[i]
        end
    end
    self.UI.setAttribute('takeButton', 'visibility', vl)
end

function takeButtonClicked(player, value, id)
    self.use_hands = true
    self.deal(1, player.color, 1)
    self.setHiddenFrom({})
    self.UI.setAttribute('whole', 'active', 'false')
    if self.getDescription() == '87' or self.getDescription() == '88' or self.getDescription() == '89' then
        self.UI.setAttribute('bImage', 'active', 'false')
    end
end

function findCard(number)
    local objs = getObjects()
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if objs[i].getName() == 'card' and objs[i].getDescription() == tostring(number) then
            return objs[i]
        end
    end
    return nil
end

function findZone(code)
    local objs = getObjects()
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if string.find(objs[i].getName(), 'Zone'..string.lower(code)) then
            return objs[i]
        end
    end
    print('No zone "Zone'..string.lower(code)..'"')
    return nil
end

function countPC(code)
    local zone = findZone(code)
    local objs = zone.getObjects()
    local count = 0
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if objs[i].getName() == '영매소녀' or objs[i].getName() == '여대생' or objs[i].getName() == '청년' or 
        objs[i].getName() == '도시전설 작가' or objs[i].getName() == '고아' or objs[i].getName() == '백의의 노인' then
            count = count + 1
        end
    end
    return count
end

function onRotate(spin, flip, player_color, old_spin, old_flip)
    local GMN = self.getGMNotes()
    local DESC = self.getDescription()
    if flip < old_flip and string.find(GMN, 'event') then
        if string.find(GMN, 'eventaa') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'a')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventcc') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'c')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventee') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'e')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventff') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'f')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventhh') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'h')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventCC') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'C')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventGG') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'G')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventJJ') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'J')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventKK') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'K')
        end
    elseif flip < old_flip and DESC == '60' then
        Global.call('setEventLog', '60')
    end
end

colorList = {'Purple', 'Red', 'Blue', 'Yellow', 'Pink', 'White', 'Green', 'Brown', 'Teal', 'Orange', 'Grey'}
hideList = {}
isOpened = 0

function onLoad()
    self.addContextMenuItem("토글:공개상태", revealToAll)
    for i = 1, 11 do
        hideList[i] = colorList[i]
    end

    if self.getDescription() ~= '1' then
        self.setHiddenFrom(hideList)
    end
    
    if self.getGMNotes() == 'part1character' then
        self.use_hands = true
    end
end

function initializeUI()
    local GMN = self.getGMNotes()
    local cnum = self.getDescription()
    if string.find(GMN, 'clue') then
        self.UI.setAttribute('whole', 'active', 'true')
    elseif cnum == '11' or cnum == '22' or cnum == '91' then 
        self.UI.setAttribute('whole', 'active', 'true')
    else
        self.UI.setAttribute('whole', 'active', 'false')
    end
end

function revealToAll(player_color, menu_position)
    if player_color == 'Black' then
        if isOpened == 0 then
            isOpened = 1
            self.setHiddenFrom({})
            broadcastToColor("GM안내 : 이 카드의 내용을 숨기지 않습니다.", 'Black', {0.3, 1, 0.3})

            self.setHiddenFrom(colorList)

ObjectStates.Name: Card
ObjectStates.LuaScript:
susList = {'Purple', 'Red', 'Blue', 'Yellow', 'Pink', 'White'}
colorList = {'Purple', 'Red', 'Blue', 'Yellow', 'Pink', 'White', 'Green', 'Brown', 'Teal', 'Orange', 'Grey'}
hideList = {}
isOpened = 0

function onLoad()
    self.addContextMenuItem("토글:공개상태", revealToAll)
    for i = 1, 11 do
        hideList[i] = colorList[i]
    end

    if self.getDescription() ~= '1' then
        self.setHiddenFrom(hideList)
    end
    
    if self.getGMNotes() == 'part1character' then
        self.use_hands = true
    end
end

function initializeUI()
    local GMN = self.getGMNotes()
    local cnum = self.getDescription()
    if string.find(GMN, 'clue') then
        self.UI.setAttribute('whole', 'active', 'true')
    elseif cnum == '11' or cnum == '22' or cnum == '91' then 
        self.UI.setAttribute('whole', 'active', 'true')
    else
        self.UI.setAttribute('whole', 'active', 'false')
    end
end

function revealToAll(player_color, menu_position)
    if player_color == 'Black' then
        if isOpened == 0 then
            isOpened = 1
            self.setHiddenFrom({})
            broadcastToColor("GM안내 : 이 카드의 내용을 숨기지 않습니다.", 'Black', {0.3, 1, 0.3})
        self.UI.setAttribute('whole', 'active', 'false')
        else
            isOpened = 0
            self.setHiddenFrom(colorList)
            broadcastToColor("GM안내 : 이 카드의 내용을 숨깁니다.", 'Black', {1, 0.3, 0.3})
            initializeUI()
        end
    end
end

function tryObjectEnter(object)
    return false
end

function getOwner()
    local zones = self.getZones()
    for i = 1, #zones do
        if zones[i].getName() == 'HandZone' or zones[i].getName() == 'SlotZone' then
            return zones[i].getDescription()
        end
    end
end

function getCode()
    local GMN = self.getGMNotes()
    local codeList = {'aa', 'bb', 'cc', 'dd', 'ee', 'ff', 'gg', 'hh', 'ii', 'AA', 'BB', 'CC', 'DD',
                    'EE', 'FF', 'GG', 'HH', 'II', 'JJ', 'KK', 'LL'}
    for i = 1, #codeList do
        if string.find(GMN, codeList[i]) then
            return codeList[i]
        end
    end
end

function setReadable()
    local GMN = self.getGMNotes()
    local code = getCode()
    local requiredPCAmount = 1
    for i = 1, 11 do
        hideList[i] = colorList[i]
    end

    if string.find(GMN, 'People2') then
        requiredPCAmount = 2
    elseif string.find(GMN, 'People3') then
        requiredPCAmount = 3
    elseif string.find(GMN, 'People4') then
        requiredPCAmount = 4
    elseif string.find(GMN, 'People9') then
        requiredPCAmount = 9
    end

    local zone = findZone(code)
    local objs = zone.getObjects()
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if objs[i].getName() == '영매소녀' then
            if countPC(code) >= requiredPCAmount or string.find(GMN, 'Club') or string.find(GMN, 'Equal') or string.find(GMN, 'Square') then
                hideList[1] = 'Grey'
            end
        elseif objs[i].getName() == '여대생' then
            if countPC(code) >= requiredPCAmount or string.find(GMN, 'Triangle') or string.find(GMN, 'Circles') or string.find(GMN, 'Plus') then
                hideList[2] = 'Grey'
            end
        elseif objs[i].getName() == '청년' then
            if countPC(code) >= requiredPCAmount or string.find(GMN, 'Heart') or string.find(GMN, 'Circles') or string.find(GMN, 'Square') then
                hideList[3] = 'Grey'
            end
        elseif objs[i].getName() == '도시전설 작가' then
            if countPC(code) >= requiredPCAmount or string.find(GMN, 'Diamond') or string.find(GMN, 'Circles') or string.find(GMN, 'Equal') then
                hideList[4] = 'Grey'
            end
        elseif objs[i].getName() == '고아' then
            if countPC(code) >= requiredPCAmount or string.find(GMN, 'Star') or string.find(GMN, 'Plus') or string.find(GMN, 'Equal') then
                hideList[5] = 'Grey'
            end
        elseif objs[i].getName() == '백의의 노인' then
            if countPC(code) >= requiredPCAmount or string.find(GMN, 'Spade') or string.find(GMN, 'Plus') or string.find(GMN, 'Square') then
                hideList[6] = 'Grey'
            end
        end
    end
    if self.getDescription() == '19' then
        local conditionCard = findCard(39)
        if conditionCard ~= nil then
            local tmpZones = conditionCard.getZones()
            for i = 1, #tmpZones do
                if tmpZones[i].getName() == 'SlotZone' or tmpZones[i].getName() == 'HandZone' then
                    for j = 1, #susList do
                        if tmpZones[i].getDescription() == susList[j] then
                            hideList[j] = 'Grey'
                        end
                    end
                end
            end
        end
    end


    if string.find(self.getGMNotes(), 'Covered') then
        self.setHiddenFrom({})
    else
        self.setHiddenFrom(hideList)
    end
    setUIVisibility()
end

function setUIVisibility()
    local vl = 'Black'
    for i = 1, 11 do
        if hideList[i] ~= colorList[i] then
            vl = vl .. '|' .. colorList[i]
        end
    end
    self.UI.setAttribute('takeButton', 'visibility', vl)
end

function takeButtonClicked(player, value, id)
    self.use_hands = true
    self.deal(1, player.color, 1)
    self.setHiddenFrom({})
    self.UI.setAttribute('whole', 'active', 'false')
    if self.getDescription() == '87' or self.getDescription() == '88' or self.getDescription() == '89' then
        self.UI.setAttribute('bImage', 'active', 'false')
    end
end

function findCard(number)
    local objs = getObjects()
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if objs[i].getName() == 'card' and objs[i].getDescription() == tostring(number) then
            return objs[i]
        end
    end
    return nil
end

function findZone(code)
    local objs = getObjects()
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if string.find(objs[i].getName(), 'Zone'..string.lower(code)) then
            return objs[i]
        end
    end
    print('No zone "Zone'..string.lower(code)..'"')
    return nil
end

function countPC(code)
    local zone = findZone(code)
    local objs = zone.getObjects()
    local count = 0
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if objs[i].getName() == '영매소녀' or objs[i].getName() == '여대생' or objs[i].getName() == '청년' or 
        objs[i].getName() == '도시전설 작가' or objs[i].getName() == '고아' or objs[i].getName() == '백의의 노인' then
            count = count + 1
        end
    end
    return count
end

function onRotate(spin, flip, player_color, old_spin, old_flip)
    local GMN = self.getGMNotes()
    local DESC = self.getDescription()
    if flip < old_flip and string.find(GMN, 'event') then
        if string.find(GMN, 'eventaa') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'a')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventcc') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'c')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventee') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'e')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventff') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'f')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventhh') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'h')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventCC') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'C')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventGG') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'G')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventJJ') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'J')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventKK') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'K')
        end
    elseif flip < old_flip and DESC == '60' then
        Global.call('setEventLog', '60')
    end
end

    if string.find(self.getGMNotes(), 'Covered') then
        self.setHiddenFrom({})
    else
        self.setHiddenFrom(hideList)
    end
    setUIVisibility()
end

    local vl = 'Black'
    for i = 1, 11 do
        if hideList[i] ~= colorList[i] then
            vl = vl .. '|' .. colorList[i]
        end
    end
    self.UI.setAttribute('takeButton', 'visibility', vl)
end

    self.use_hands = true
    self.deal(1, player.color, 1)
    self.setHiddenFrom({})
    self.UI.setAttribute('whole', 'active', 'false')
    if self.getDescription() == '87' or self.getDescription() == '88' or self.getDescription() == '89' then
        self.UI.setAttribute('bImage', 'active', 'false')
    end
end

function findCard(number)
    local objs = getObjects()
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if objs[i].getName() == 'card' and objs[i].getDescription() == tostring(number) then
            return objs[i]
        end
    end
    return nil
end

function findZone(code)
    local objs = getObjects()
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if string.find(objs[i].getName(), 'Zone'..string.lower(code)) then
            return objs[i]
        end
    end
    print('No zone "Zone'..string.lower(code)..'"')
    return nil
end

function countPC(code)
    local zone = findZone(code)
    local objs = zone.getObjects()
    local count = 0
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if objs[i].getName() == '영매소녀' or objs[i].getName() == '여대생' or objs[i].getName() == '청년' or 
        objs[i].getName() == '도시전설 작가' or objs[i].getName() == '고아' or objs[i].getName() == '백의의 노인' then
            count = count + 1
        end
    end
    return count
end

    local GMN = self.getGMNotes()
    local DESC = self.getDescription()
    if flip < old_flip and string.find(GMN, 'event') then
        if string.find(GMN, 'eventaa') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'a')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventcc') then

        end

ObjectStates.Name: Card
ObjectStates.LuaScript:
susList = {'Purple', 'Red', 'Blue', 'Yellow', 'Pink', 'White'}
colorList = {'Purple', 'Red', 'Blue', 'Yellow', 'Pink', 'White', 'Green', 'Brown', 'Teal', 'Orange', 'Grey'}
hideList = {}
isOpened = 0

function onLoad()
    self.addContextMenuItem("토글:공개상태", revealToAll)
    for i = 1, 11 do
        hideList[i] = colorList[i]
    end

    if self.getDescription() ~= '1' then
        self.setHiddenFrom(hideList)
    end
    
    if self.getGMNotes() == 'part1character' then
        self.use_hands = true
    end
end

function initializeUI()
    local GMN = self.getGMNotes()
    local cnum = self.getDescription()
    if string.find(GMN, 'clue') then
        self.UI.setAttribute('whole', 'active', 'true')
    elseif cnum == '11' or cnum == '22' or cnum == '91' then 
        self.UI.setAttribute('whole', 'active', 'true')
    else
        self.UI.setAttribute('whole', 'active', 'false')
    end
end

function revealToAll(player_color, menu_position)
    if player_color == 'Black' then
        if isOpened == 0 then
            isOpened = 1
            self.setHiddenFrom({})
            broadcastToColor("GM안내 : 이 카드의 내용을 숨기지 않습니다.", 'Black', {0.3, 1, 0.3})
        self.UI.setAttribute('whole', 'active', 'false')
        else
            isOpened = 0
            self.setHiddenFrom(colorList)
            broadcastToColor("GM안내 : 이 카드의 내용을 숨깁니다.", 'Black', {1, 0.3, 0.3})
            initializeUI()
        end
    end
end

function tryObjectEnter(object)
    return false
end

function getOwner()
    local zones = self.getZones()
    for i = 1, #zones do
        if zones[i].getName() == 'HandZone' or zones[i].getName() == 'SlotZone' then
            return zones[i].getDescription()
        end
    end
end

function getCode()
    local GMN = self.getGMNotes()
    local codeList = {'aa', 'bb', 'cc', 'dd', 'ee', 'ff', 'gg', 'hh', 'ii', 'AA', 'BB', 'CC', 'DD',
                    'EE', 'FF', 'GG', 'HH', 'II', 'JJ', 'KK', 'LL'}
    for i = 1, #codeList do
        if string.find(GMN, codeList[i]) then
            return codeList[i]
        end
    end
end

function setReadable()
    local GMN = self.getGMNotes()
    local code = getCode()
    local requiredPCAmount = 1
    for i = 1, 11 do
        hideList[i] = colorList[i]
    end

    if string.find(GMN, 'People2') then
        requiredPCAmount = 2
    elseif string.find(GMN, 'People3') then
        requiredPCAmount = 3
    elseif string.find(GMN, 'People4') then
        requiredPCAmount = 4
    elseif string.find(GMN, 'People9') then
        requiredPCAmount = 9
    end

    local zone = findZone(code)
    local objs = zone.getObjects()
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if objs[i].getName() == '영매소녀' then
            if countPC(code) >= requiredPCAmount or string.find(GMN, 'Club') or string.find(GMN, 'Equal') or string.find(GMN, 'Square') then
                hideList[1] = 'Grey'
            end
        elseif objs[i].getName() == '여대생' then
            if countPC(code) >= requiredPCAmount or string.find(GMN, 'Triangle') or string.find(GMN, 'Circles') or string.find(GMN, 'Plus') then
                hideList[2] = 'Grey'
            end
        elseif objs[i].getName() == '청년' then
            if countPC(code) >= requiredPCAmount or string.find(GMN, 'Heart') or string.find(GMN, 'Circles') or string.find(GMN, 'Square') then
                hideList[3] = 'Grey'
            end
        elseif objs[i].getName() == '도시전설 작가' then
            if countPC(code) >= requiredPCAmount or string.find(GMN, 'Diamond') or string.find(GMN, 'Circles') or string.find(GMN, 'Equal') then
                hideList[4] = 'Grey'
            end
        elseif objs[i].getName() == '고아' then
            if countPC(code) >= requiredPCAmount or string.find(GMN, 'Star') or string.find(GMN, 'Plus') or string.find(GMN, 'Equal') then
                hideList[5] = 'Grey'
            end
        elseif objs[i].getName() == '백의의 노인' then
            if countPC(code) >= requiredPCAmount or string.find(GMN, 'Spade') or string.find(GMN, 'Plus') or string.find(GMN, 'Square') then
                hideList[6] = 'Grey'
            end
        end
    end
    if self.getDescription() == '19' then
        local conditionCard = findCard(39)
        if conditionCard ~= nil then
            local tmpZones = conditionCard.getZones()
            for i = 1, #tmpZones do
                if tmpZones[i].getName() == 'SlotZone' or tmpZones[i].getName() == 'HandZone' then
                    for j = 1, #susList do
                        if tmpZones[i].getDescription() == susList[j] then
                            hideList[j] = 'Grey'
                        end
                    end
                end
            end
        end
    end


    if string.find(self.getGMNotes(), 'Covered') then
        self.setHiddenFrom({})
    else
        self.setHiddenFrom(hideList)
    end
    setUIVisibility()
end

function setUIVisibility()
    local vl = 'Black'
    for i = 1, 11 do
        if hideList[i] ~= colorList[i] then
            vl = vl .. '|' .. colorList[i]
        end
    end
    self.UI.setAttribute('takeButton', 'visibility', vl)
end

    self.use_hands = true

end

    for i = 1, #objs do
        if objs[i].getName() == '영매소녀' or objs[i].getName() == '여대생' or objs[i].getName() == '청년' or 
        objs[i].getName() == '도시전설 작가' or objs[i].getName() == '고아' or objs[i].getName() == '백의의 노인' then
            count = count + 1
        end
    end
    return count
end

    local GMN = self.getGMNotes()
    local DESC = self.getDescription()
    if flip < old_flip and string.find(GMN, 'event') then

    if player_color == 'Black' then
        if isOpened == 0 then
            isOpened = 1
            self.setHiddenFrom({})
            broadcastToColor("GM안내 : 이 카드의 내용을 숨기지 않습니다.", 'Black', {0.3, 1, 0.3})
        self.UI.setAttribute('whole', 'active', 'false')
        else
            isOpened = 0
            self.setHiddenFrom(colorList)
            broadcastToColor("GM안내 : 이 카드의 내용을 숨깁니다.", 'Black', {1, 0.3, 0.3})
            initializeUI()
        end
    end
end

function tryObjectEnter(object)
    return false
end

function getOwner()
    local zones = self.getZones()
    for i = 1, #zones do
        if zones[i].getName() == 'HandZone' or zones[i].getName() == 'SlotZone' then
            return zones[i].getDescription()
        end
    end
end

function getCode()
    local GMN = self.getGMNotes()
    local codeList = {'aa', 'bb', 'cc', 'dd', 'ee', 'ff', 'gg', 'hh', 'ii', 'AA', 'BB', 'CC', 'DD',
                    'EE', 'FF', 'GG', 'HH', 'II', 'JJ', 'KK', 'LL'}
    for i = 1, #codeList do
        if string.find(GMN, codeList[i]) then
            return codeList[i]
        end
    end
end

function setReadable()
    local GMN = self.getGMNotes()
    local code = getCode()
    local requiredPCAmount = 1
    for i = 1, 11 do
        hideList[i] = colorList[i]
    end

    if string.find(GMN, 'People2') then
        requiredPCAmount = 2
    elseif string.find(GMN, 'People3') then
        requiredPCAmount = 3
    elseif string.find(GMN, 'People4') then
        requiredPCAmount = 4
    elseif string.find(GMN, 'People9') then
        requiredPCAmount = 9
    end

    local zone = findZone(code)
    local objs = zone.getObjects()
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if objs[i].getName() == '영매소녀' then
            if countPC(code) >= requiredPCAmount or string.find(GMN, 'Club') or string.find(GMN, 'Equal') or string.find(GMN, 'Square') then
                hideList[1] = 'Grey'
            end
        elseif objs[i].getName() == '여대생' then
            if countPC(code) >= requiredPCAmount or string.find(GMN, 'Triangle') or string.find(GMN, 'Circles') or string.find(GMN, 'Plus') then
                hideList[2] = 'Grey'
            end
        elseif objs[i].getName() == '청년' then
            if countPC(code) >= requiredPCAmount or string.find(GMN, 'Heart') or string.find(GMN, 'Circles') or string.find(GMN, 'Square') then
                hideList[3] = 'Grey'
            end
        elseif objs[i].getName() == '도시전설 작가' then
            if countPC(code) >= requiredPCAmount or string.find(GMN, 'Diamond') or string.find(GMN, 'Circles') or string.find(GMN, 'Equal') then
                hideList[4] = 'Grey'
            end
        elseif objs[i].getName() == '고아' then
            if countPC(code) >= requiredPCAmount or string.find(GMN, 'Star') or string.find(GMN, 'Plus') or string.find(GMN, 'Equal') then
                hideList[5] = 'Grey'
            end
        elseif objs[i].getName() == '백의의 노인' then
            if countPC(code) >= requiredPCAmount or string.find(GMN, 'Spade') or string.find(GMN, 'Plus') or string.find(GMN, 'Square') then
                hideList[6] = 'Grey'
            end
        end
    end
    if self.getDescription() == '19' then
        local conditionCard = findCard(39)
        if conditionCard ~= nil then
            local tmpZones = conditionCard.getZones()
            for i = 1, #tmpZones do
                if tmpZones[i].getName() == 'SlotZone' or tmpZones[i].getName() == 'HandZone' then
                    for j = 1, #susList do
                        if tmpZones[i].getDescription() == susList[j] then
                            hideList[j] = 'Grey'
                        end
                    end
                end
            end
        end
    end


    if string.find(self.getGMNotes(), 'Covered') then
        self.setHiddenFrom({})
    else
        self.setHiddenFrom(hideList)
    end
    setUIVisibility()
end

function setUIVisibility()
    local vl = 'Black'
    for i = 1, 11 do
        if hideList[i] ~= colorList[i] then
            vl = vl .. '|' .. colorList[i]
        end
    end
    self.UI.setAttribute('takeButton', 'visibility', vl)
end

function takeButtonClicked(player, value, id)
    self.use_hands = true
    self.deal(1, player.color, 1)
    self.setHiddenFrom({})
    self.UI.setAttribute('whole', 'active', 'false')
    if self.getDescription() == '87' or self.getDescription() == '88' or self.getDescription() == '89' then
        self.UI.setAttribute('bImage', 'active', 'false')
    end
end

function findCard(number)
    local objs = getObjects()
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if objs[i].getName() == 'card' and objs[i].getDescription() == tostring(number) then
            return objs[i]
        end
    end
    return nil
end

function findZone(code)
    local objs = getObjects()
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if string.find(objs[i].getName(), 'Zone'..string.lower(code)) then
            return objs[i]
        end
    end
    print('No zone "Zone'..string.lower(code)..'"')
    return nil
end

function countPC(code)
    local zone = findZone(code)
    local objs = zone.getObjects()
    local count = 0
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if objs[i].getName() == '영매소녀' or objs[i].getName() == '여대생' or objs[i].getName() == '청년' or 
        objs[i].getName() == '도시전설 작가' or objs[i].getName() == '고아' or objs[i].getName() == '백의의 노인' then
            count = count + 1
        end
    end
    return count
end

function onRotate(spin, flip, player_color, old_spin, old_flip)
    local GMN = self.getGMNotes()
    local DESC = self.getDescription()
    if flip < old_flip and string.find(GMN, 'event') then
        if string.find(GMN, 'eventaa') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'a')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventcc') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'c')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventee') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'e')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventff') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'f')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventhh') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'h')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventCC') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'C')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventGG') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'G')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventJJ') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'J')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventKK') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'K')
        end
    elseif flip < old_flip and DESC == '60' then
        Global.call('setEventLog', '60')
    end
end

function onLoad()
    self.addContextMenuItem("토글:공개상태", revealToAll)
    for i = 1, 11 do
        hideList[i] = colorList[i]
    end

    if self.getDescription() ~= '1' then
        self.setHiddenFrom(hideList)
    end
    
    if self.getGMNotes() == 'part1character' then
        self.use_hands = true
    end
end

function initializeUI()
    local GMN = self.getGMNotes()
    local cnum = self.getDescription()
    if string.find(GMN, 'clue') then
        self.UI.setAttribute('whole', 'active', 'true')
    elseif cnum == '11' or cnum == '22' or cnum == '91' then 
        self.UI.setAttribute('whole', 'active', 'true')
    else
        self.UI.setAttribute('whole', 'active', 'false')
    end
end

    print('No zone "Zone'..string.lower(code)..'"')
    return nil
end

    local zone = findZone(code)
    local objs = zone.getObjects()
    local count = 0
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if objs[i].getName() == '영매소녀' or objs[i].getName() == '여대생' or objs[i].getName() == '청년' or 
        objs[i].getName() == '도시전설 작가' or objs[i].getName() == '고아' or objs[i].getName() == '백의의 노인' then
            count = count + 1
        end
    end
    return count
end

    local GMN = self.getGMNotes()
    local DESC = self.getDescription()
    if flip < old_flip and string.find(GMN, 'event') then
        if string.find(GMN, 'eventaa') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'a')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventcc') then

        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventJJ') then

        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventKK') then

ObjectStates.Name: Card
ObjectStates.LuaScript:
susList = {'Purple', 'Red', 'Blue', 'Yellow', 'Pink', 'White'}
colorList = {'Purple', 'Red', 'Blue', 'Yellow', 'Pink', 'White', 'Green', 'Brown', 'Teal', 'Orange', 'Grey'}
hideList = {}
isOpened = 0

function onLoad()
    self.addContextMenuItem("토글:공개상태", revealToAll)
    for i = 1, 11 do
        hideList[i] = colorList[i]
    end

    if self.getDescription() ~= '1' then
        self.setHiddenFrom(hideList)
    end
    
    if self.getGMNotes() == 'part1character' then
        self.use_hands = true
    end
end

function initializeUI()
    local GMN = self.getGMNotes()
    local cnum = self.getDescription()
    if string.find(GMN, 'clue') then
        self.UI.setAttribute('whole', 'active', 'true')
    elseif cnum == '11' or cnum == '22' or cnum == '91' then 
        self.UI.setAttribute('whole', 'active', 'true')
    else
        self.UI.setAttribute('whole', 'active', 'false')
    end
end

function revealToAll(player_color, menu_position)
    if player_color == 'Black' then
        if isOpened == 0 then
            isOpened = 1
            self.setHiddenFrom({})
            broadcastToColor("GM안내 : 이 카드의 내용을 숨기지 않습니다.", 'Black', {0.3, 1, 0.3})
        self.UI.setAttribute('whole', 'active', 'false')
        else
            isOpened = 0
            self.setHiddenFrom(colorList)
            broadcastToColor("GM안내 : 이 카드의 내용을 숨깁니다.", 'Black', {1, 0.3, 0.3})
            initializeUI()
        end
    end
end

function tryObjectEnter(object)
    return false
end

function getOwner()
    local zones = self.getZones()
    for i = 1, #zones do
        if zones[i].getName() == 'HandZone' or zones[i].getName() == 'SlotZone' then
            return zones[i].getDescription()
        end
    end
end

function getCode()
    local GMN = self.getGMNotes()
    local codeList = {'aa', 'bb', 'cc', 'dd', 'ee', 'ff', 'gg', 'hh', 'ii', 'AA', 'BB', 'CC', 'DD',
                    'EE', 'FF', 'GG', 'HH', 'II', 'JJ', 'KK', 'LL'}
    for i = 1, #codeList do
        if string.find(GMN, codeList[i]) then
            return codeList[i]
        end
    end
end

function setReadable()
    local GMN = self.getGMNotes()
    local code = getCode()
    local requiredPCAmount = 1
    for i = 1, 11 do
        hideList[i] = colorList[i]
    end

    if string.find(GMN, 'People2') then
        requiredPCAmount = 2
    elseif string.find(GMN, 'People3') then
        requiredPCAmount = 3
    elseif string.find(GMN, 'People4') then
        requiredPCAmount = 4
    elseif string.find(GMN, 'People9') then
        requiredPCAmount = 9
    end

    local zone = findZone(code)
    local objs = zone.getObjects()
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if objs[i].getName() == '영매소녀' then
            if countPC(code) >= requiredPCAmount or string.find(GMN, 'Club') or string.find(GMN, 'Equal') or string.find(GMN, 'Square') then
                hideList[1] = 'Grey'
            end
        elseif objs[i].getName() == '여대생' then
            if countPC(code) >= requiredPCAmount or string.find(GMN, 'Triangle') or string.find(GMN, 'Circles') or string.find(GMN, 'Plus') then
                hideList[2] = 'Grey'
            end
        elseif objs[i].getName() == '청년' then
            if countPC(code) >= requiredPCAmount or string.find(GMN, 'Heart') or string.find(GMN, 'Circles') or string.find(GMN, 'Square') then
                hideList[3] = 'Grey'
            end
        elseif objs[i].getName() == '도시전설 작가' then
            if countPC(code) >= requiredPCAmount or string.find(GMN, 'Diamond') or string.find(GMN, 'Circles') or string.find(GMN, 'Equal') then
                hideList[4] = 'Grey'
            end
        elseif objs[i].getName() == '고아' then
            if countPC(code) >= requiredPCAmount or string.find(GMN, 'Star') or string.find(GMN, 'Plus') or string.find(GMN, 'Equal') then
                hideList[5] = 'Grey'
            end
        elseif objs[i].getName() == '백의의 노인' then
            if countPC(code) >= requiredPCAmount or string.find(GMN, 'Spade') or string.find(GMN, 'Plus') or string.find(GMN, 'Square') then
                hideList[6] = 'Grey'
            end
        end
    end
    if self.getDescription() == '19' then
        local conditionCard = findCard(39)
        if conditionCard ~= nil then
            local tmpZones = conditionCard.getZones()
            for i = 1, #tmpZones do
                if tmpZones[i].getName() == 'SlotZone' or tmpZones[i].getName() == 'HandZone' then
                    for j = 1, #susList do
                        if tmpZones[i].getDescription() == susList[j] then
                            hideList[j] = 'Grey'
                        end
                    end
                end
            end
        end
    end


    if string.find(self.getGMNotes(), 'Covered') then
        self.setHiddenFrom({})
    else
        self.setHiddenFrom(hideList)
    end
    setUIVisibility()
end

function setUIVisibility()
    local vl = 'Black'
    for i = 1, 11 do
        if hideList[i] ~= colorList[i] then
            vl = vl .. '|' .. colorList[i]
        end
    end
    self.UI.setAttribute('takeButton', 'visibility', vl)
end

function takeButtonClicked(player, value, id)
    self.use_hands = true
    self.deal(1, player.color, 1)
    self.setHiddenFrom({})
    self.UI.setAttribute('whole', 'active', 'false')
    if self.getDescription() == '87' or self.getDescription() == '88' or self.getDescription() == '89' then
        self.UI.setAttribute('bImage', 'active', 'false')
    end
end

function findCard(number)
    local objs = getObjects()
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if objs[i].getName() == 'card' and objs[i].getDescription() == tostring(number) then
            return objs[i]
        end
    end
    return nil
end

function findZone(code)
    local objs = getObjects()
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if string.find(objs[i].getName(), 'Zone'..string.lower(code)) then
            return objs[i]
        end
    end
    print('No zone "Zone'..string.lower(code)..'"')
    return nil
end

function countPC(code)
    local zone = findZone(code)
    local objs = zone.getObjects()
    local count = 0
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if objs[i].getName() == '영매소녀' or objs[i].getName() == '여대생' or objs[i].getName() == '청년' or 
        objs[i].getName() == '도시전설 작가' or objs[i].getName() == '고아' or objs[i].getName() == '백의의 노인' then
            count = count + 1
        end
    end
    return count
end

function onRotate(spin, flip, player_color, old_spin, old_flip)
    local GMN = self.getGMNotes()
    local DESC = self.getDescription()
    if flip < old_flip and string.find(GMN, 'event') then
        if string.find(GMN, 'eventaa') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'a')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventcc') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'c')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventee') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'e')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventff') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'f')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventhh') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'h')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventCC') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'C')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventGG') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'G')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventJJ') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'J')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventKK') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'K')
        end
    elseif flip < old_flip and DESC == '60' then
        Global.call('setEventLog', '60')
    end
end

    elseif string.find(GMN, 'People4') then

    elseif string.find(GMN, 'People9') then
        requiredPCAmount = 9
    end

    local zone = findZone(code)
    local objs = zone.getObjects()
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if objs[i].getName() == '영매소녀' then
            if countPC(code) >= requiredPCAmount or string.find(GMN, 'Club') or string.find(GMN, 'Equal') or string.find(GMN, 'Square') then
                hideList[1] = 'Grey'
            end

                hideList[3] = 'Grey'
            end

            end
        elseif objs[i].getName() == '고아' then

                hideList[5] = 'Grey'

                hideList[6] = 'Grey'
            end
        end

    if self.getDescription() == '19' then

                if tmpZones[i].getName() == 'SlotZone' or tmpZones[i].getName() == 'HandZone' then
                    for j = 1, #susList do
                        if tmpZones[i].getDescription() == susList[j] then

        end

        self.UI.setAttribute('bImage', 'active', 'false')
    end
end

function findCard(number)
    local objs = getObjects()
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if objs[i].getName() == 'card' and objs[i].getDescription() == tostring(number) then
            return objs[i]
        end
    end
    return nil
end

function findZone(code)
    local objs = getObjects()
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if string.find(objs[i].getName(), 'Zone'..string.lower(code)) then
            return objs[i]
        end
    end
    print('No zone "Zone'..string.lower(code)..'"')
    return nil
end

function countPC(code)
    local zone = findZone(code)
    local objs = zone.getObjects()
    local count = 0
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if objs[i].getName() == '영매소녀' or objs[i].getName() == '여대생' or objs[i].getName() == '청년' or 
        objs[i].getName() == '도시전설 작가' or objs[i].getName() == '고아' or objs[i].getName() == '백의의 노인' then
            count = count + 1
        end
    end
    return count
end

function onRotate(spin, flip, player_color, old_spin, old_flip)
    local GMN = self.getGMNotes()
    local DESC = self.getDescription()
    if flip < old_flip and string.find(GMN, 'event') then
        if string.find(GMN, 'eventaa') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'a')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventcc') then

            Global.call('setEventLog', 'J')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventKK') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'K')
        end

    end
end

function onLoad()
    self.addContextMenuItem("토글:공개상태", revealToAll)
    for i = 1, 11 do
        hideList[i] = colorList[i]

    local GMN = self.getGMNotes()

ObjectStates.Name: Card
ObjectStates.LuaScript:
susList = {'Purple', 'Red', 'Blue', 'Yellow', 'Pink', 'White'}
colorList = {'Purple', 'Red', 'Blue', 'Yellow', 'Pink', 'White', 'Green', 'Brown', 'Teal', 'Orange', 'Grey'}
hideList = {}
isOpened = 0

function onLoad()
    self.addContextMenuItem("토글:공개상태", revealToAll)
    for i = 1, 11 do
        hideList[i] = colorList[i]
    end

    if self.getDescription() ~= '1' then
        self.setHiddenFrom(hideList)
    end
    
    if self.getGMNotes() == 'part1character' then
        self.use_hands = true
    end
end

function initializeUI()
    local GMN = self.getGMNotes()
    local cnum = self.getDescription()
    if string.find(GMN, 'clue') then
        self.UI.setAttribute('whole', 'active', 'true')
    elseif cnum == '11' or cnum == '22' or cnum == '91' then 
        self.UI.setAttribute('whole', 'active', 'true')
    else
        self.UI.setAttribute('whole', 'active', 'false')
    end
end

function revealToAll(player_color, menu_position)
    if player_color == 'Black' then
        if isOpened == 0 then
            isOpened = 1
            self.setHiddenFrom({})
            broadcastToColor("GM안내 : 이 카드의 내용을 숨기지 않습니다.", 'Black', {0.3, 1, 0.3})
        self.UI.setAttribute('whole', 'active', 'false')
        else
            isOpened = 0
            self.setHiddenFrom(colorList)
            broadcastToColor("GM안내 : 이 카드의 내용을 숨깁니다.", 'Black', {1, 0.3, 0.3})
            initializeUI()
        end
    end
end

function tryObjectEnter(object)
    return false
end

function getOwner()
    local zones = self.getZones()
    for i = 1, #zones do
        if zones[i].getName() == 'HandZone' or zones[i].getName() == 'SlotZone' then
            return zones[i].getDescription()
        end
    end
end

function getCode()
    local GMN = self.getGMNotes()
    local codeList = {'aa', 'bb', 'cc', 'dd', 'ee', 'ff', 'gg', 'hh', 'ii', 'AA', 'BB', 'CC', 'DD',
                    'EE', 'FF', 'GG', 'HH', 'II', 'JJ', 'KK', 'LL'}
    for i = 1, #codeList do
        if string.find(GMN, codeList[i]) then
            return codeList[i]
        end
    end
end

function setReadable()
    local GMN = self.getGMNotes()
    local code = getCode()
    local requiredPCAmount = 1
    for i = 1, 11 do
        hideList[i] = colorList[i]
    end

    if string.find(GMN, 'People2') then
        requiredPCAmount = 2
    elseif string.find(GMN, 'People3') then
        requiredPCAmount = 3
    elseif string.find(GMN, 'People4') then
        requiredPCAmount = 4
    elseif string.find(GMN, 'People9') then
        requiredPCAmount = 9
    end

    local zone = findZone(code)
    local objs = zone.getObjects()
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if objs[i].getName() == '영매소녀' then
            if countPC(code) >= requiredPCAmount or string.find(GMN, 'Club') or string.find(GMN, 'Equal') or string.find(GMN, 'Square') then
                hideList[1] = 'Grey'
            end
        elseif objs[i].getName() == '여대생' then
            if countPC(code) >= requiredPCAmount or string.find(GMN, 'Triangle') or string.find(GMN, 'Circles') or string.find(GMN, 'Plus') then
                hideList[2] = 'Grey'
            end
        elseif objs[i].getName() == '청년' then
            if countPC(code) >= requiredPCAmount or string.find(GMN, 'Heart') or string.find(GMN, 'Circles') or string.find(GMN, 'Square') then
                hideList[3] = 'Grey'
            end
        elseif objs[i].getName() == '도시전설 작가' then
            if countPC(code) >= requiredPCAmount or string.find(GMN, 'Diamond') or string.find(GMN, 'Circles') or string.find(GMN, 'Equal') then
                hideList[4] = 'Grey'
            end
        elseif objs[i].getName() == '고아' then
            if countPC(code) >= requiredPCAmount or string.find(GMN, 'Star') or string.find(GMN, 'Plus') or string.find(GMN, 'Equal') then
                hideList[5] = 'Grey'
            end
        elseif objs[i].getName() == '백의의 노인' then
            if countPC(code) >= requiredPCAmount or string.find(GMN, 'Spade') or string.find(GMN, 'Plus') or string.find(GMN, 'Square') then
                hideList[6] = 'Grey'
            end
        end
    end
    if self.getDescription() == '19' then
        local conditionCard = findCard(39)
        if conditionCard ~= nil then
            local tmpZones = conditionCard.getZones()
            for i = 1, #tmpZones do
                if tmpZones[i].getName() == 'SlotZone' or tmpZones[i].getName() == 'HandZone' then
                    for j = 1, #susList do
                        if tmpZones[i].getDescription() == susList[j] then
                            hideList[j] = 'Grey'
                        end
                    end
                end
            end
        end
    end


    if string.find(self.getGMNotes(), 'Covered') then
        self.setHiddenFrom({})
    else
        self.setHiddenFrom(hideList)
    end
    setUIVisibility()
end

function setUIVisibility()
    local vl = 'Black'
    for i = 1, 11 do
        if hideList[i] ~= colorList[i] then
            vl = vl .. '|' .. colorList[i]
        end
    end
    self.UI.setAttribute('takeButton', 'visibility', vl)
end

function takeButtonClicked(player, value, id)
    self.use_hands = true
    self.deal(1, player.color, 1)
    self.setHiddenFrom({})
    self.UI.setAttribute('whole', 'active', 'false')
    if self.getDescription() == '87' or self.getDescription() == '88' or self.getDescription() == '89' then
        self.UI.setAttribute('bImage', 'active', 'false')
    end
end

function findCard(number)
    local objs = getObjects()
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if objs[i].getName() == 'card' and objs[i].getDescription() == tostring(number) then
            return objs[i]
        end
    end
    return nil
end

function findZone(code)
    local objs = getObjects()
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if string.find(objs[i].getName(), 'Zone'..string.lower(code)) then
            return objs[i]
        end
    end
    print('No zone "Zone'..string.lower(code)..'"')
    return nil
end

function countPC(code)
    local zone = findZone(code)
    local objs = zone.getObjects()
    local count = 0
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if objs[i].getName() == '영매소녀' or objs[i].getName() == '여대생' or objs[i].getName() == '청년' or 
        objs[i].getName() == '도시전설 작가' or objs[i].getName() == '고아' or objs[i].getName() == '백의의 노인' then
            count = count + 1
        end
    end
    return count
end

function onRotate(spin, flip, player_color, old_spin, old_flip)
    local GMN = self.getGMNotes()
    local DESC = self.getDescription()
    if flip < old_flip and string.find(GMN, 'event') then
        if string.find(GMN, 'eventaa') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'a')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventcc') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'c')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventee') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'e')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventff') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'f')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventhh') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'h')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventCC') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'C')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventGG') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'G')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventJJ') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'J')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventKK') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'K')
        end
    elseif flip < old_flip and DESC == '60' then
        Global.call('setEventLog', '60')
    end
end

ObjectStates.Name: Card
ObjectStates.LuaScript:
susList = {'Purple', 'Red', 'Blue', 'Yellow', 'Pink', 'White'}
colorList = {'Purple', 'Red', 'Blue', 'Yellow', 'Pink', 'White', 'Green', 'Brown', 'Teal', 'Orange', 'Grey'}
hideList = {}
isOpened = 0

function onLoad()
    self.addContextMenuItem("토글:공개상태", revealToAll)
    for i = 1, 11 do
        hideList[i] = colorList[i]
    end

    if self.getDescription() ~= '1' then
        self.setHiddenFrom(hideList)
    end
    
    if self.getGMNotes() == 'part1character' then
        self.use_hands = true
    end
end

function initializeUI()
    local GMN = self.getGMNotes()
    local cnum = self.getDescription()
    if string.find(GMN, 'clue') then
        self.UI.setAttribute('whole', 'active', 'true')
    elseif cnum == '11' or cnum == '22' or cnum == '91' then 
        self.UI.setAttribute('whole', 'active', 'true')
    else
        self.UI.setAttribute('whole', 'active', 'false')
    end
end

function revealToAll(player_color, menu_position)
    if player_color == 'Black' then
        if isOpened == 0 then
            isOpened = 1
            self.setHiddenFrom({})
            broadcastToColor("GM안내 : 이 카드의 내용을 숨기지 않습니다.", 'Black', {0.3, 1, 0.3})
        self.UI.setAttribute('whole', 'active', 'false')
        else
            isOpened = 0
            self.setHiddenFrom(colorList)
            broadcastToColor("GM안내 : 이 카드의 내용을 숨깁니다.", 'Black', {1, 0.3, 0.3})
            initializeUI()
        end
    end
end

ObjectStates.Name: Card
ObjectStates.LuaScript:
susList = {'Purple', 'Red', 'Blue', 'Yellow', 'Pink', 'White'}
colorList = {'Purple', 'Red', 'Blue', 'Yellow', 'Pink', 'White', 'Green', 'Brown', 'Teal', 'Orange', 'Grey'}
hideList = {}
isOpened = 0

function onLoad()
    self.addContextMenuItem("토글:공개상태", revealToAll)
    for i = 1, 11 do
        hideList[i] = colorList[i]
    end

    if self.getDescription() ~= '1' then
        self.setHiddenFrom(hideList)
    end
    
    if self.getGMNotes() == 'part1character' then
        self.use_hands = true
    end
end

function initializeUI()
    local GMN = self.getGMNotes()
    local cnum = self.getDescription()
    if string.find(GMN, 'clue') then
        self.UI.setAttribute('whole', 'active', 'true')
    elseif cnum == '11' or cnum == '22' or cnum == '91' then 
        self.UI.setAttribute('whole', 'active', 'true')
    else
        self.UI.setAttribute('whole', 'active', 'false')
    end
end

function revealToAll(player_color, menu_position)
    if player_color == 'Black' then
        if isOpened == 0 then
            isOpened = 1
            self.setHiddenFrom({})
            broadcastToColor("GM안내 : 이 카드의 내용을 숨기지 않습니다.", 'Black', {0.3, 1, 0.3})
        self.UI.setAttribute('whole', 'active', 'false')
        else
            isOpened = 0
            self.setHiddenFrom(colorList)
            broadcastToColor("GM안내 : 이 카드의 내용을 숨깁니다.", 'Black', {1, 0.3, 0.3})
            initializeUI()
        end
    end
end

function tryObjectEnter(object)
    return false
end

function getOwner()
    local zones = self.getZones()
    for i = 1, #zones do
        if zones[i].getName() == 'HandZone' or zones[i].getName() == 'SlotZone' then
            return zones[i].getDescription()
        end
    end
end

function getCode()
    local GMN = self.getGMNotes()
    local codeList = {'aa', 'bb', 'cc', 'dd', 'ee', 'ff', 'gg', 'hh', 'ii', 'AA', 'BB', 'CC', 'DD',
                    'EE', 'FF', 'GG', 'HH', 'II', 'JJ', 'KK', 'LL'}
    for i = 1, #codeList do
        if string.find(GMN, codeList[i]) then
            return codeList[i]
        end
    end
end

function setReadable()
    local GMN = self.getGMNotes()
    local code = getCode()
    local requiredPCAmount = 1
    for i = 1, 11 do
        hideList[i] = colorList[i]
    end

    if string.find(GMN, 'People2') then
        requiredPCAmount = 2
    elseif string.find(GMN, 'People3') then
        requiredPCAmount = 3
    elseif string.find(GMN, 'People4') then
        requiredPCAmount = 4
    elseif string.find(GMN, 'People9') then
        requiredPCAmount = 9
    end

    local zone = findZone(code)
    local objs = zone.getObjects()
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if objs[i].getName() == '영매소녀' then
            if countPC(code) >= requiredPCAmount or string.find(GMN, 'Club') or string.find(GMN, 'Equal') or string.find(GMN, 'Square') then
                hideList[1] = 'Grey'
            end
        elseif objs[i].getName() == '여대생' then
            if countPC(code) >= requiredPCAmount or string.find(GMN, 'Triangle') or string.find(GMN, 'Circles') or string.find(GMN, 'Plus') then
                hideList[2] = 'Grey'
            end
        elseif objs[i].getName() == '청년' then
            if countPC(code) >= requiredPCAmount or string.find(GMN, 'Heart') or string.find(GMN, 'Circles') or string.find(GMN, 'Square') then
                hideList[3] = 'Grey'
            end
        elseif objs[i].getName() == '도시전설 작가' then
            if countPC(code) >= requiredPCAmount or string.find(GMN, 'Diamond') or string.find(GMN, 'Circles') or string.find(GMN, 'Equal') then
                hideList[4] = 'Grey'
            end
        elseif objs[i].getName() == '고아' then
            if countPC(code) >= requiredPCAmount or string.find(GMN, 'Star') or string.find(GMN, 'Plus') or string.find(GMN, 'Equal') then
                hideList[5] = 'Grey'
            end
        elseif objs[i].getName() == '백의의 노인' then
            if countPC(code) >= requiredPCAmount or string.find(GMN, 'Spade') or string.find(GMN, 'Plus') or string.find(GMN, 'Square') then
                hideList[6] = 'Grey'
            end
        end
    end
    if self.getDescription() == '19' then
        local conditionCard = findCard(39)
        if conditionCard ~= nil then
            local tmpZones = conditionCard.getZones()
            for i = 1, #tmpZones do
                if tmpZones[i].getName() == 'SlotZone' or tmpZones[i].getName() == 'HandZone' then
                    for j = 1, #susList do
                        if tmpZones[i].getDescription() == susList[j] then
                            hideList[j] = 'Grey'
                        end
                    end
                end
            end
        end
    end


    if string.find(self.getGMNotes(), 'Covered') then
        self.setHiddenFrom({})
    else
        self.setHiddenFrom(hideList)
    end
    setUIVisibility()
end

function setUIVisibility()
    local vl = 'Black'
    for i = 1, 11 do
        if hideList[i] ~= colorList[i] then
            vl = vl .. '|' .. colorList[i]
        end
    end
    self.UI.setAttribute('takeButton', 'visibility', vl)
end

function takeButtonClicked(player, value, id)
    self.use_hands = true
    self.deal(1, player.color, 1)
    self.setHiddenFrom({})
    self.UI.setAttribute('whole', 'active', 'false')
    if self.getDescription() == '87' or self.getDescription() == '88' or self.getDescription() == '89' then
        self.UI.setAttribute('bImage', 'active', 'false')
    end
end

function findCard(number)
    local objs = getObjects()
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if objs[i].getName() == 'card' and objs[i].getDescription() == tostring(number) then
            return objs[i]
        end
    end
    return nil
end

function findZone(code)
    local objs = getObjects()
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if string.find(objs[i].getName(), 'Zone'..string.lower(code)) then
            return objs[i]
        end
    end
    print('No zone "Zone'..string.lower(code)..'"')
    return nil
end

function countPC(code)
    local zone = findZone(code)
    local objs = zone.getObjects()
    local count = 0
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if objs[i].getName() == '영매소녀' or objs[i].getName() == '여대생' or objs[i].getName() == '청년' or 
        objs[i].getName() == '도시전설 작가' or objs[i].getName() == '고아' or objs[i].getName() == '백의의 노인' then
            count = count + 1
        end
    end
    return count
end

function onRotate(spin, flip, player_color, old_spin, old_flip)
    local GMN = self.getGMNotes()
    local DESC = self.getDescription()
    if flip < old_flip and string.find(GMN, 'event') then
        if string.find(GMN, 'eventaa') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'a')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventcc') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'c')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventee') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'e')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventff') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'f')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventhh') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'h')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventCC') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'C')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventGG') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'G')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventJJ') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'J')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventKK') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'K')
        end
    elseif flip < old_flip and DESC == '60' then
        Global.call('setEventLog', '60')
    end
end
