                        if tmpZones[i].getDescription() == susList[j] then
                            hideList[j] = 'Grey'
                        end
                    end
                end
            end
        end
    end


    if string.find(self.getGMNotes(), 'Covered') then
        self.setHiddenFrom({})
    else
        self.setHiddenFrom(hideList)
    end
    setUIVisibility()
end

function setUIVisibility()
    local vl = 'Black'
    for i = 1, 11 do
        if hideList[i] ~= colorList[i] then
            vl = vl .. '|' .. colorList[i]
        end
    end
    self.UI.setAttribute('takeButton', 'visibility', vl)
end

function takeButtonClicked(player, value, id)
    self.use_hands = true
    self.deal(1, player.color, 1)
    self.setHiddenFrom({})
    self.UI.setAttribute('whole', 'active', 'false')
    if self.getDescription() == '87' or self.getDescription() == '88' or self.getDescription() == '89' then
        self.UI.setAttribute('bImage', 'active', 'false')
    end
end

function findCard(number)
    local objs = getObjects()
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if objs[i].getName() == 'card' and objs[i].getDescription() == tostring(number) then
            return objs[i]
        end
    end
    return nil
end

function findZone(code)
    local objs = getObjects()
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if string.find(objs[i].getName(), 'Zone'..string.lower(code)) then
            return objs[i]
        end
    end
    print('No zone "Zone'..string.lower(code)..'"')
    return nil
end

function countPC(code)
    local zone = findZone(code)
    local objs = zone.getObjects()
    local count = 0
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if objs[i].getName() == '영매소녀' or objs[i].getName() == '여대생' or objs[i].getName() == '청년' or 
        objs[i].getName() == '도시전설 작가' or objs[i].getName() == '고아' or objs[i].getName() == '백의의 노인' then
            count = count + 1
        end
    end
    return count
end

function onRotate(spin, flip, player_color, old_spin, old_flip)
    local GMN = self.getGMNotes()
    local DESC = self.getDescription()
    if flip < old_flip and string.find(GMN, 'event') then
        if string.find(GMN, 'eventaa') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'a')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventcc') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'c')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventee') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'e')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventff') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'f')

            Global.call('setEventLog', 'C')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventGG') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'G')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventJJ') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'J')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventKK') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'K')
        end
    elseif flip < old_flip and DESC == '60' then
        Global.call('setEventLog', '60')
    end
end

ObjectStates.Name: Card
ObjectStates.LuaScript:
susList = {'Purple', 'Red', 'Blue', 'Yellow', 'Pink', 'White'}
colorList = {'Purple', 'Red', 'Blue', 'Yellow', 'Pink', 'White', 'Green', 'Brown', 'Teal', 'Orange', 'Grey'}
hideList = {}
isOpened = 0

function onLoad()
    self.addContextMenuItem("토글:공개상태", revealToAll)
    for i = 1, 11 do
        hideList[i] = colorList[i]
    end

    if self.getDescription() ~= '1' then
        self.setHiddenFrom(hideList)
    end
    
    if self.getGMNotes() == 'part1character' then
        self.use_hands = true
    end
end

function initializeUI()
    local GMN = self.getGMNotes()
    local cnum = self.getDescription()
    if string.find(GMN, 'clue') then
        self.UI.setAttribute('whole', 'active', 'true')
    elseif cnum == '11' or cnum == '22' or cnum == '91' then 
        self.UI.setAttribute('whole', 'active', 'true')
    else
        self.UI.setAttribute('whole', 'active', 'false')
    end
end

function revealToAll(player_color, menu_position)
    if player_color == 'Black' then
        if isOpened == 0 then
            isOpened = 1
            self.setHiddenFrom({})
            broadcastToColor("GM안내 : 이 카드의 내용을 숨기지 않습니다.", 'Black', {0.3, 1, 0.3})
        self.UI.setAttribute('whole', 'active', 'false')
        else
            isOpened = 0
            self.setHiddenFrom(colorList)
            broadcastToColor("GM안내 : 이 카드의 내용을 숨깁니다.", 'Black', {1, 0.3, 0.3})
            initializeUI()
        end
    end
end

function tryObjectEnter(object)
    return false
end

function getOwner()
    local zones = self.getZones()
    for i = 1, #zones do
        if zones[i].getName() == 'HandZone' or zones[i].getName() == 'SlotZone' then
            return zones[i].getDescription()
        end
    end
end

function getCode()
    local GMN = self.getGMNotes()
    local codeList = {'aa', 'bb', 'cc', 'dd', 'ee', 'ff', 'gg', 'hh', 'ii', 'AA', 'BB', 'CC', 'DD',
                    'EE', 'FF', 'GG', 'HH', 'II', 'JJ', 'KK', 'LL'}
    for i = 1, #codeList do
        if string.find(GMN, codeList[i]) then
            return codeList[i]
        end
    end
end

function setReadable()
    local GMN = self.getGMNotes()
    local code = getCode()
    local requiredPCAmount = 1
    for i = 1, 11 do
        hideList[i] = colorList[i]
    end

    if string.find(GMN, 'People2') then
        requiredPCAmount = 2
    elseif string.find(GMN, 'People3') then
        requiredPCAmount = 3
    elseif string.find(GMN, 'People4') then
        requiredPCAmount = 4
    elseif string.find(GMN, 'People9') then
        requiredPCAmount = 9
    end

    local zone = findZone(code)
    local objs = zone.getObjects()
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if objs[i].getName() == '영매소녀' then
            if countPC(code) >= requiredPCAmount or string.find(GMN, 'Club') or string.find(GMN, 'Equal') or string.find(GMN, 'Square') then
                hideList[1] = 'Grey'
            end
        elseif objs[i].getName() == '여대생' then
            if countPC(code) >= requiredPCAmount or string.find(GMN, 'Triangle') or string.find(GMN, 'Circles') or string.find(GMN, 'Plus') then
                hideList[2] = 'Grey'
            end
        elseif objs[i].getName() == '청년' then
            if countPC(code) >= requiredPCAmount or string.find(GMN, 'Heart') or string.find(GMN, 'Circles') or string.find(GMN, 'Square') then
                hideList[3] = 'Grey'
            end
        elseif objs[i].getName() == '도시전설 작가' then
            if countPC(code) >= requiredPCAmount or string.find(GMN, 'Diamond') or string.find(GMN, 'Circles') or string.find(GMN, 'Equal') then
                hideList[4] = 'Grey'
            end
        elseif objs[i].getName() == '고아' then
            if countPC(code) >= requiredPCAmount or string.find(GMN, 'Star') or string.find(GMN, 'Plus') or string.find(GMN, 'Equal') then
                hideList[5] = 'Grey'
            end
        elseif objs[i].getName() == '백의의 노인' then
            if countPC(code) >= requiredPCAmount or string.find(GMN, 'Spade') or string.find(GMN, 'Plus') or string.find(GMN, 'Square') then
                hideList[6] = 'Grey'
            end
        end
    end
    if self.getDescription() == '19' then
        local conditionCard = findCard(39)
        if conditionCard ~= nil then
            local tmpZones = conditionCard.getZones()
            for i = 1, #tmpZones do
                if tmpZones[i].getName() == 'SlotZone' or tmpZones[i].getName() == 'HandZone' then
                    for j = 1, #susList do
                        if tmpZones[i].getDescription() == susList[j] then
                            hideList[j] = 'Grey'
                        end
                    end
                end
            end
        end
    end


    if string.find(self.getGMNotes(), 'Covered') then
        self.setHiddenFrom({})
    else
        self.setHiddenFrom(hideList)
    end
    setUIVisibility()
end

function setUIVisibility()
    local vl = 'Black'
    for i = 1, 11 do
        if hideList[i] ~= colorList[i] then
            vl = vl .. '|' .. colorList[i]
        end
    end
    self.UI.setAttribute('takeButton', 'visibility', vl)
end

function takeButtonClicked(player, value, id)
    self.use_hands = true

        self.UI.setAttribute('bImage', 'active', 'false')

end

end

    local count = 0
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if objs[i].getName() == '영매소녀' or objs[i].getName() == '여대생' or objs[i].getName() == '청년' or 
        objs[i].getName() == '도시전설 작가' or objs[i].getName() == '고아' or objs[i].getName() == '백의의 노인' then
            count = count + 1
        end
    end
    return count
end

function onRotate(spin, flip, player_color, old_spin, old_flip)
    local GMN = self.getGMNotes()
    local DESC = self.getDescription()
    if flip < old_flip and string.find(GMN, 'event') then
        if string.find(GMN, 'eventaa') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'a')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventcc') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'c')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventee') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'e')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventff') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'f')

            Global.call('setEventLog', 'h')

            Global.call('setEventLog', 'C')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventGG') then

    return false
end

    local zones = self.getZones()

        end
    end
end

function getCode()
    local GMN = self.getGMNotes()
    local codeList = {'aa', 'bb', 'cc', 'dd', 'ee', 'ff', 'gg', 'hh', 'ii', 'AA', 'BB', 'CC', 'DD',
                    'EE', 'FF', 'GG', 'HH', 'II', 'JJ', 'KK', 'LL'}
    for i = 1, #codeList do
        if string.find(GMN, codeList[i]) then
            return codeList[i]
        end
    end
end

function setReadable()
    local GMN = self.getGMNotes()
    local code = getCode()
    local requiredPCAmount = 1
    for i = 1, 11 do
        hideList[i] = colorList[i]
    end

    if string.find(GMN, 'People2') then
        requiredPCAmount = 2
    elseif string.find(GMN, 'People3') then
        requiredPCAmount = 3
    elseif string.find(GMN, 'People4') then
        requiredPCAmount = 4
    elseif string.find(GMN, 'People9') then
        requiredPCAmount = 9
    end

    local zone = findZone(code)
    local objs = zone.getObjects()
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if objs[i].getName() == '영매소녀' then
            if countPC(code) >= requiredPCAmount or string.find(GMN, 'Club') or string.find(GMN, 'Equal') or string.find(GMN, 'Square') then
                hideList[1] = 'Grey'
            end
        elseif objs[i].getName() == '여대생' then
            if countPC(code) >= requiredPCAmount or string.find(GMN, 'Triangle') or string.find(GMN, 'Circles') or string.find(GMN, 'Plus') then
                hideList[2] = 'Grey'
            end
        elseif objs[i].getName() == '청년' then
            if countPC(code) >= requiredPCAmount or string.find(GMN, 'Heart') or string.find(GMN, 'Circles') or string.find(GMN, 'Square') then
                hideList[3] = 'Grey'
            end
        elseif objs[i].getName() == '도시전설 작가' then
            if countPC(code) >= requiredPCAmount or string.find(GMN, 'Diamond') or string.find(GMN, 'Circles') or string.find(GMN, 'Equal') then
                hideList[4] = 'Grey'
            end
        elseif objs[i].getName() == '고아' then
            if countPC(code) >= requiredPCAmount or string.find(GMN, 'Star') or string.find(GMN, 'Plus') or string.find(GMN, 'Equal') then
                hideList[5] = 'Grey'
            end

                hideList[6] = 'Grey'
            end
        end
    end
    if self.getDescription() == '19' then
        local conditionCard = findCard(39)
        if conditionCard ~= nil then
            local tmpZones = conditionCard.getZones()
            for i = 1, #tmpZones do
                if tmpZones[i].getName() == 'SlotZone' or tmpZones[i].getName() == 'HandZone' then
                    for j = 1, #susList do
                        if tmpZones[i].getDescription() == susList[j] then
                            hideList[j] = 'Grey'
                        end
                    end
                end
            end
        end
    end


    if string.find(self.getGMNotes(), 'Covered') then
        self.setHiddenFrom({})
    else
        self.setHiddenFrom(hideList)
    end
    setUIVisibility()
end

function setUIVisibility()
    local vl = 'Black'
    for i = 1, 11 do
        if hideList[i] ~= colorList[i] then
            vl = vl .. '|' .. colorList[i]
        end
    end
    self.UI.setAttribute('takeButton', 'visibility', vl)
end

function takeButtonClicked(player, value, id)
    self.use_hands = true
    self.deal(1, player.color, 1)
    self.setHiddenFrom({})
    self.UI.setAttribute('whole', 'active', 'false')
    if self.getDescription() == '87' or self.getDescription() == '88' or self.getDescription() == '89' then
        self.UI.setAttribute('bImage', 'active', 'false')
    end
end

function findCard(number)
    local objs = getObjects()
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if objs[i].getName() == 'card' and objs[i].getDescription() == tostring(number) then
            return objs[i]
        end
    end
    return nil
end

function findZone(code)
    local objs = getObjects()
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if string.find(objs[i].getName(), 'Zone'..string.lower(code)) then
            return objs[i]
        end
    end
    print('No zone "Zone'..string.lower(code)..'"')
    return nil
end

function countPC(code)
    local zone = findZone(code)
    local objs = zone.getObjects()
    local count = 0
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if objs[i].getName() == '영매소녀' or objs[i].getName() == '여대생' or objs[i].getName() == '청년' or 
        objs[i].getName() == '도시전설 작가' or objs[i].getName() == '고아' or objs[i].getName() == '백의의 노인' then
            count = count + 1
        end
    end
    return count
end

function onRotate(spin, flip, player_color, old_spin, old_flip)
    local GMN = self.getGMNotes()
    local DESC = self.getDescription()
    if flip < old_flip and string.find(GMN, 'event') then
        if string.find(GMN, 'eventaa') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'a')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventcc') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'c')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventee') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'e')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventff') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'f')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventhh') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'h')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventCC') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'C')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventGG') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'G')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventJJ') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'J')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventKK') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'K')
        end
    elseif flip < old_flip and DESC == '60' then
        Global.call('setEventLog', '60')
    end
end

    for i = 1, #objs do

        end

    return nil
end

    local zone = findZone(code)
    local objs = zone.getObjects()
    local count = 0
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if objs[i].getName() == '영매소녀' or objs[i].getName() == '여대생' or objs[i].getName() == '청년' or

            count = count + 1
        end
    end
    return count
end

    local GMN = self.getGMNotes()
    local DESC = self.getDescription()
    if flip < old_flip and string.find(GMN, 'event') then
        if string.find(GMN, 'eventaa') then

ObjectStates.Name: Card
ObjectStates.LuaScript:
susList = {'Purple', 'Red', 'Blue', 'Yellow', 'Pink', 'White'}
colorList = {'Purple', 'Red', 'Blue', 'Yellow', 'Pink', 'White', 'Green', 'Brown', 'Teal', 'Orange', 'Grey'}
hideList = {}
isOpened = 0

function onLoad()
    self.addContextMenuItem("토글:공개상태", revealToAll)
    for i = 1, 11 do
        hideList[i] = colorList[i]
    end

    if self.getDescription() ~= '1' then
        self.setHiddenFrom(hideList)
    end
    
    if self.getGMNotes() == 'part1character' then
        self.use_hands = true
    end
end

function initializeUI()
    local GMN = self.getGMNotes()
    local cnum = self.getDescription()
    if string.find(GMN, 'clue') then
        self.UI.setAttribute('whole', 'active', 'true')
    elseif cnum == '11' or cnum == '22' or cnum == '91' then 
        self.UI.setAttribute('whole', 'active', 'true')
    else
        self.UI.setAttribute('whole', 'active', 'false')
    end
end

function revealToAll(player_color, menu_position)
    if player_color == 'Black' then
        if isOpened == 0 then
            isOpened = 1
            self.setHiddenFrom({})
            broadcastToColor("GM안내 : 이 카드의 내용을 숨기지 않습니다.", 'Black', {0.3, 1, 0.3})
        self.UI.setAttribute('whole', 'active', 'false')
        else
            isOpened = 0
            self.setHiddenFrom(colorList)
            broadcastToColor("GM안내 : 이 카드의 내용을 숨깁니다.", 'Black', {1, 0.3, 0.3})
            initializeUI()
        end
    end
end

function tryObjectEnter(object)
    return false
end

function getOwner()
    local zones = self.getZones()
    for i = 1, #zones do
        if zones[i].getName() == 'HandZone' or zones[i].getName() == 'SlotZone' then
            return zones[i].getDescription()
        end
    end
end

function getCode()
    local GMN = self.getGMNotes()
    local codeList = {'aa', 'bb', 'cc', 'dd', 'ee', 'ff', 'gg', 'hh', 'ii', 'AA', 'BB', 'CC', 'DD',
                    'EE', 'FF', 'GG', 'HH', 'II', 'JJ', 'KK', 'LL'}
    for i = 1, #codeList do
        if string.find(GMN, codeList[i]) then
            return codeList[i]
        end
    end
end

function setReadable()
    local GMN = self.getGMNotes()
    local code = getCode()
    local requiredPCAmount = 1
    for i = 1, 11 do
        hideList[i] = colorList[i]
    end

    if string.find(GMN, 'People2') then
        requiredPCAmount = 2
    elseif string.find(GMN, 'People3') then
        requiredPCAmount = 3
    elseif string.find(GMN, 'People4') then
        requiredPCAmount = 4
    elseif string.find(GMN, 'People9') then
        requiredPCAmount = 9
    end

    local zone = findZone(code)
    local objs = zone.getObjects()
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if objs[i].getName() == '영매소녀' then
            if countPC(code) >= requiredPCAmount or string.find(GMN, 'Club') or string.find(GMN, 'Equal') or string.find(GMN, 'Square') then
                hideList[1] = 'Grey'
            end
        elseif objs[i].getName() == '여대생' then
            if countPC(code) >= requiredPCAmount or string.find(GMN, 'Triangle') or string.find(GMN, 'Circles') or string.find(GMN, 'Plus') then
                hideList[2] = 'Grey'
            end
        elseif objs[i].getName() == '청년' then
            if countPC(code) >= requiredPCAmount or string.find(GMN, 'Heart') or string.find(GMN, 'Circles') or string.find(GMN, 'Square') then
                hideList[3] = 'Grey'
            end
        elseif objs[i].getName() == '도시전설 작가' then
            if countPC(code) >= requiredPCAmount or string.find(GMN, 'Diamond') or string.find(GMN, 'Circles') or string.find(GMN, 'Equal') then
                hideList[4] = 'Grey'
            end
        elseif objs[i].getName() == '고아' then
            if countPC(code) >= requiredPCAmount or string.find(GMN, 'Star') or string.find(GMN, 'Plus') or string.find(GMN, 'Equal') then
                hideList[5] = 'Grey'
            end
        elseif objs[i].getName() == '백의의 노인' then
            if countPC(code) >= requiredPCAmount or string.find(GMN, 'Spade') or string.find(GMN, 'Plus') or string.find(GMN, 'Square') then
                hideList[6] = 'Grey'
            end
        end
    end
    if self.getDescription() == '19' then
        local conditionCard = findCard(39)
        if conditionCard ~= nil then
            local tmpZones = conditionCard.getZones()
            for i = 1, #tmpZones do
                if tmpZones[i].getName() == 'SlotZone' or tmpZones[i].getName() == 'HandZone' then
                    for j = 1, #susList do
                        if tmpZones[i].getDescription() == susList[j] then
                            hideList[j] = 'Grey'
                        end
                    end
                end
            end
        end
    end


    if string.find(self.getGMNotes(), 'Covered') then
        self.setHiddenFrom({})
    else
        self.setHiddenFrom(hideList)
    end
    setUIVisibility()
end

function setUIVisibility()
    local vl = 'Black'
    for i = 1, 11 do
        if hideList[i] ~= colorList[i] then
            vl = vl .. '|' .. colorList[i]
        end
    end
    self.UI.setAttribute('takeButton', 'visibility', vl)
end

function takeButtonClicked(player, value, id)
    self.use_hands = true
    self.deal(1, player.color, 1)
    self.setHiddenFrom({})
    self.UI.setAttribute('whole', 'active', 'false')
    if self.getDescription() == '87' or self.getDescription() == '88' or self.getDescription() == '89' then
        self.UI.setAttribute('bImage', 'active', 'false')
    end
end

function findCard(number)
    local objs = getObjects()
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if objs[i].getName() == 'card' and objs[i].getDescription() == tostring(number) then
            return objs[i]
        end
    end
    return nil
end

function findZone(code)
    local objs = getObjects()
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if string.find(objs[i].getName(), 'Zone'..string.lower(code)) then
            return objs[i]
        end
    end
    print('No zone "Zone'..string.lower(code)..'"')
    return nil
end

function countPC(code)
    local zone = findZone(code)
    local objs = zone.getObjects()
    local count = 0
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if objs[i].getName() == '영매소녀' or objs[i].getName() == '여대생' or objs[i].getName() == '청년' or 
        objs[i].getName() == '도시전설 작가' or objs[i].getName() == '고아' or objs[i].getName() == '백의의 노인' then
            count = count + 1
        end
    end
    return count
end

function onRotate(spin, flip, player_color, old_spin, old_flip)
    local GMN = self.getGMNotes()
    local DESC = self.getDescription()
    if flip < old_flip and string.find(GMN, 'event') then
        if string.find(GMN, 'eventaa') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'a')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventcc') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'c')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventee') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'e')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventff') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'f')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventhh') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'h')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventCC') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'C')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventGG') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'G')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventJJ') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'J')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventKK') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'K')
        end
    elseif flip < old_flip and DESC == '60' then
        Global.call('setEventLog', '60')
    end
end

function getCode()
    local GMN = self.getGMNotes()
    local codeList = {'aa', 'bb', 'cc', 'dd', 'ee', 'ff', 'gg', 'hh', 'ii', 'AA', 'BB', 'CC', 'DD',
                    'EE', 'FF', 'GG', 'HH', 'II', 'JJ', 'KK', 'LL'}
    for i = 1, #codeList do
        if string.find(GMN, codeList[i]) then
            return codeList[i]
        end
    end
end

function setReadable()
    local GMN = self.getGMNotes()
    local code = getCode()
    local requiredPCAmount = 1
    for i = 1, 11 do
        hideList[i] = colorList[i]
    end

    if string.find(GMN, 'People2') then
        requiredPCAmount = 2
    elseif string.find(GMN, 'People3') then
        requiredPCAmount = 3
    elseif string.find(GMN, 'People4') then
        requiredPCAmount = 4
    elseif string.find(GMN, 'People9') then
        requiredPCAmount = 9
    end

    local zone = findZone(code)
    local objs = zone.getObjects()
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if objs[i].getName() == '영매소녀' then
            if countPC(code) >= requiredPCAmount or string.find(GMN, 'Club') or string.find(GMN, 'Equal') or string.find(GMN, 'Square') then
                hideList[1] = 'Grey'
            end
        elseif objs[i].getName() == '여대생' then
            if countPC(code) >= requiredPCAmount or string.find(GMN, 'Triangle') or string.find(GMN, 'Circles') or string.find(GMN, 'Plus') then
                hideList[2] = 'Grey'
            end
        elseif objs[i].getName() == '청년' then
            if countPC(code) >= requiredPCAmount or string.find(GMN, 'Heart') or string.find(GMN, 'Circles') or string.find(GMN, 'Square') then
                hideList[3] = 'Grey'
            end
        elseif objs[i].getName() == '도시전설 작가' then
            if countPC(code) >= requiredPCAmount or string.find(GMN, 'Diamond') or string.find(GMN, 'Circles') or string.find(GMN, 'Equal') then
                hideList[4] = 'Grey'
            end
        elseif objs[i].getName() == '고아' then
            if countPC(code) >= requiredPCAmount or string.find(GMN, 'Star') or string.find(GMN, 'Plus') or string.find(GMN, 'Equal') then
                hideList[5] = 'Grey'
            end
        elseif objs[i].getName() == '백의의 노인' then
            if countPC(code) >= requiredPCAmount or string.find(GMN, 'Spade') or string.find(GMN, 'Plus') or string.find(GMN, 'Square') then
                hideList[6] = 'Grey'
            end
        end
    end
    if self.getDescription() == '19' then
        local conditionCard = findCard(39)
        if conditionCard ~= nil then
            local tmpZones = conditionCard.getZones()
            for i = 1, #tmpZones do
                if tmpZones[i].getName() == 'SlotZone' or tmpZones[i].getName() == 'HandZone' then
                    for j = 1, #susList do
                        if tmpZones[i].getDescription() == susList[j] then
                            hideList[j] = 'Grey'
                        end
                    end
                end
            end
        end
    end


    if string.find(self.getGMNotes(), 'Covered') then
        self.setHiddenFrom({})
    else
        self.setHiddenFrom(hideList)
    end
    setUIVisibility()
end

function setUIVisibility()
    local vl = 'Black'
    for i = 1, 11 do
        if hideList[i] ~= colorList[i] then
            vl = vl .. '|' .. colorList[i]
        end
    end
    self.UI.setAttribute('takeButton', 'visibility', vl)
end

function takeButtonClicked(player, value, id)
    self.use_hands = true
    self.deal(1, player.color, 1)
    self.setHiddenFrom({})
    self.UI.setAttribute('whole', 'active', 'false')
    if self.getDescription() == '87' or self.getDescription() == '88' or self.getDescription() == '89' then
        self.UI.setAttribute('bImage', 'active', 'false')
    end
end

function findCard(number)
    local objs = getObjects()
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if objs[i].getName() == 'card' and objs[i].getDescription() == tostring(number) then
            return objs[i]
        end
    end
    return nil
end

function findZone(code)
    local objs = getObjects()
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if string.find(objs[i].getName(), 'Zone'..string.lower(code)) then
            return objs[i]
        end
    end
    print('No zone "Zone'..string.lower(code)..'"')
    return nil
end

function countPC(code)
    local zone = findZone(code)
    local objs = zone.getObjects()
    local count = 0
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if objs[i].getName() == '영매소녀' or objs[i].getName() == '여대생' or objs[i].getName() == '청년' or 
        objs[i].getName() == '도시전설 작가' or objs[i].getName() == '고아' or objs[i].getName() == '백의의 노인' then
            count = count + 1
        end
    end
    return count
end

function onRotate(spin, flip, player_color, old_spin, old_flip)
    local GMN = self.getGMNotes()
    local DESC = self.getDescription()
    if flip < old_flip and string.find(GMN, 'event') then
        if string.find(GMN, 'eventaa') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'a')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventcc') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'c')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventee') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'e')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventff') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'f')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventhh') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'h')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventCC') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'C')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventGG') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'G')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventJJ') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'J')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventKK') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'K')
        end
    elseif flip < old_flip and DESC == '60' then
        Global.call('setEventLog', '60')
    end
end

ObjectStates.Name: Card
ObjectStates.LuaScript:
susList = {'Purple', 'Red', 'Blue', 'Yellow', 'Pink', 'White'}
colorList = {'Purple', 'Red', 'Blue', 'Yellow', 'Pink', 'White', 'Green', 'Brown', 'Teal', 'Orange', 'Grey'}
hideList = {}
isOpened = 0

function onLoad()
    self.addContextMenuItem("토글:공개상태", revealToAll)
    for i = 1, 11 do
        hideList[i] = colorList[i]
    end

    if self.getDescription() ~= '1' then
        self.setHiddenFrom(hideList)
    end
    
    if self.getGMNotes() == 'part1character' then
        self.use_hands = true
    end
end

function initializeUI()
    local GMN = self.getGMNotes()
    local cnum = self.getDescription()
    if string.find(GMN, 'clue') then
        self.UI.setAttribute('whole', 'active', 'true')
    elseif cnum == '11' or cnum == '22' or cnum == '91' then 
        self.UI.setAttribute('whole', 'active', 'true')
    else
        self.UI.setAttribute('whole', 'active', 'false')
    end
end

function revealToAll(player_color, menu_position)
    if player_color == 'Black' then
        if isOpened == 0 then
            isOpened = 1
            self.setHiddenFrom({})
            broadcastToColor("GM안내 : 이 카드의 내용을 숨기지 않습니다.", 'Black', {0.3, 1, 0.3})
        self.UI.setAttribute('whole', 'active', 'false')
        else
            isOpened = 0
            self.setHiddenFrom(colorList)
            broadcastToColor("GM안내 : 이 카드의 내용을 숨깁니다.", 'Black', {1, 0.3, 0.3})
            initializeUI()
        end
    end
end

function tryObjectEnter(object)
    return false
end

function getOwner()
    local zones = self.getZones()
    for i = 1, #zones do
        if zones[i].getName() == 'HandZone' or zones[i].getName() == 'SlotZone' then
            return zones[i].getDescription()

    end
end

ObjectStates.Name: Card
ObjectStates.LuaScript:
susList = {'Purple', 'Red', 'Blue', 'Yellow', 'Pink', 'White'}
colorList = {'Purple', 'Red', 'Blue', 'Yellow', 'Pink', 'White', 'Green', 'Brown', 'Teal', 'Orange', 'Grey'}
hideList = {}
isOpened = 0

function onLoad()
    self.addContextMenuItem("토글:공개상태", revealToAll)
    for i = 1, 11 do
        hideList[i] = colorList[i]
    end

    if self.getDescription() ~= '1' then
        self.setHiddenFrom(hideList)
    end
    
    if self.getGMNotes() == 'part1character' then
        self.use_hands = true
    end
end

function initializeUI()
    local GMN = self.getGMNotes()
    local cnum = self.getDescription()
    if string.find(GMN, 'clue') then
        self.UI.setAttribute('whole', 'active', 'true')
    elseif cnum == '11' or cnum == '22' or cnum == '91' then 
        self.UI.setAttribute('whole', 'active', 'true')
    else
        self.UI.setAttribute('whole', 'active', 'false')
    end
end

function revealToAll(player_color, menu_position)
    if player_color == 'Black' then
        if isOpened == 0 then
            isOpened = 1
            self.setHiddenFrom({})
            broadcastToColor("GM안내 : 이 카드의 내용을 숨기지 않습니다.", 'Black', {0.3, 1, 0.3})
        self.UI.setAttribute('whole', 'active', 'false')
        else
            isOpened = 0
            self.setHiddenFrom(colorList)
            broadcastToColor("GM안내 : 이 카드의 내용을 숨깁니다.", 'Black', {1, 0.3, 0.3})
            initializeUI()
        end
    end
end

function tryObjectEnter(object)
    return false
end

function getOwner()
    local zones = self.getZones()
    for i = 1, #zones do
        if zones[i].getName() == 'HandZone' or zones[i].getName() == 'SlotZone' then
            return zones[i].getDescription()
        end
    end
end

function getCode()
    local GMN = self.getGMNotes()
    local codeList = {'aa', 'bb', 'cc', 'dd', 'ee', 'ff', 'gg', 'hh', 'ii', 'AA', 'BB', 'CC', 'DD',
                    'EE', 'FF', 'GG', 'HH', 'II', 'JJ', 'KK', 'LL'}
    for i = 1, #codeList do
        if string.find(GMN, codeList[i]) then
            return codeList[i]
        end
    end
end

function setReadable()
    local GMN = self.getGMNotes()
    local code = getCode()
    local requiredPCAmount = 1
    for i = 1, 11 do
        hideList[i] = colorList[i]
    end

    if string.find(GMN, 'People2') then
        requiredPCAmount = 2
    elseif string.find(GMN, 'People3') then
        requiredPCAmount = 3
    elseif string.find(GMN, 'People4') then
        requiredPCAmount = 4
    elseif string.find(GMN, 'People9') then
        requiredPCAmount = 9
    end

    local zone = findZone(code)
    local objs = zone.getObjects()
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if objs[i].getName() == '영매소녀' then
            if countPC(code) >= requiredPCAmount or string.find(GMN, 'Club') or string.find(GMN, 'Equal') or string.find(GMN, 'Square') then
                hideList[1] = 'Grey'
            end
        elseif objs[i].getName() == '여대생' then
            if countPC(code) >= requiredPCAmount or string.find(GMN, 'Triangle') or string.find(GMN, 'Circles') or string.find(GMN, 'Plus') then
                hideList[2] = 'Grey'
            end
        elseif objs[i].getName() == '청년' then
            if countPC(code) >= requiredPCAmount or string.find(GMN, 'Heart') or string.find(GMN, 'Circles') or string.find(GMN, 'Square') then
                hideList[3] = 'Grey'
            end
        elseif objs[i].getName() == '도시전설 작가' then
            if countPC(code) >= requiredPCAmount or string.find(GMN, 'Diamond') or string.find(GMN, 'Circles') or string.find(GMN, 'Equal') then
                hideList[4] = 'Grey'
            end
        elseif objs[i].getName() == '고아' then
            if countPC(code) >= requiredPCAmount or string.find(GMN, 'Star') or string.find(GMN, 'Plus') or string.find(GMN, 'Equal') then
                hideList[5] = 'Grey'
            end
        elseif objs[i].getName() == '백의의 노인' then
            if countPC(code) >= requiredPCAmount or string.find(GMN, 'Spade') or string.find(GMN, 'Plus') or string.find(GMN, 'Square') then
                hideList[6] = 'Grey'
            end
        end
    end
    if self.getDescription() == '19' then
        local conditionCard = findCard(39)
        if conditionCard ~= nil then
            local tmpZones = conditionCard.getZones()
            for i = 1, #tmpZones do
                if tmpZones[i].getName() == 'SlotZone' or tmpZones[i].getName() == 'HandZone' then
                    for j = 1, #susList do
                        if tmpZones[i].getDescription() == susList[j] then
                            hideList[j] = 'Grey'
                        end
                    end
                end
            end
        end
    end


    if string.find(self.getGMNotes(), 'Covered') then
        self.setHiddenFrom({})
    else
        self.setHiddenFrom(hideList)
    end
    setUIVisibility()
end

function setUIVisibility()
    local vl = 'Black'
    for i = 1, 11 do
        if hideList[i] ~= colorList[i] then
            vl = vl .. '|' .. colorList[i]
        end
    end
    self.UI.setAttribute('takeButton', 'visibility', vl)
end

function takeButtonClicked(player, value, id)
    self.use_hands = true
    self.deal(1, player.color, 1)
    self.setHiddenFrom({})
    self.UI.setAttribute('whole', 'active', 'false')
    if self.getDescription() == '87' or self.getDescription() == '88' or self.getDescription() == '89' then
        self.UI.setAttribute('bImage', 'active', 'false')
    end
end

function findCard(number)
    local objs = getObjects()
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if objs[i].getName() == 'card' and objs[i].getDescription() == tostring(number) then
            return objs[i]
        end
    end
    return nil
end

function findZone(code)
    local objs = getObjects()
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if string.find(objs[i].getName(), 'Zone'..string.lower(code)) then
            return objs[i]
        end
    end
    print('No zone "Zone'..string.lower(code)..'"')
    return nil
end

function countPC(code)
    local zone = findZone(code)
    local objs = zone.getObjects()
    local count = 0
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if objs[i].getName() == '영매소녀' or objs[i].getName() == '여대생' or objs[i].getName() == '청년' or 
        objs[i].getName() == '도시전설 작가' or objs[i].getName() == '고아' or objs[i].getName() == '백의의 노인' then
            count = count + 1
        end
    end
    return count
end

function onRotate(spin, flip, player_color, old_spin, old_flip)
    local GMN = self.getGMNotes()
    local DESC = self.getDescription()
    if flip < old_flip and string.find(GMN, 'event') then
        if string.find(GMN, 'eventaa') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'a')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventcc') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'c')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventee') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'e')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventff') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'f')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventhh') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'h')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventCC') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'C')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventGG') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'G')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventJJ') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'J')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventKK') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'K')
        end
    elseif flip < old_flip and DESC == '60' then
        Global.call('setEventLog', '60')
    end
end

colorList = {'Purple', 'Red', 'Blue', 'Yellow', 'Pink', 'White', 'Green', 'Brown', 'Teal', 'Orange', 'Grey'}

isOpened = 0

function onLoad()
    self.addContextMenuItem("토글:공개상태", revealToAll)
    for i = 1, 11 do
        hideList[i] = colorList[i]
    end

    if self.getDescription() ~= '1' then
        self.setHiddenFrom(hideList)
    end
    
    if self.getGMNotes() == 'part1character' then
        self.use_hands = true
    end
end

function initializeUI()
    local GMN = self.getGMNotes()
    local cnum = self.getDescription()
    if string.find(GMN, 'clue') then
        self.UI.setAttribute('whole', 'active', 'true')
    elseif cnum == '11' or cnum == '22' or cnum == '91' then 
        self.UI.setAttribute('whole', 'active', 'true')
    else
        self.UI.setAttribute('whole', 'active', 'false')
    end
end

function revealToAll(player_color, menu_position)
    if player_color == 'Black' then
        if isOpened == 0 then
            isOpened = 1
            self.setHiddenFrom({})

ObjectStates.Name: Card
ObjectStates.LuaScript:
susList = {'Purple', 'Red', 'Blue', 'Yellow', 'Pink', 'White'}
colorList = {'Purple', 'Red', 'Blue', 'Yellow', 'Pink', 'White', 'Green', 'Brown', 'Teal', 'Orange', 'Grey'}
hideList = {}
isOpened = 0

function onLoad()
    self.addContextMenuItem("토글:공개상태", revealToAll)
    for i = 1, 11 do
        hideList[i] = colorList[i]
    end

    if self.getDescription() ~= '1' then
        self.setHiddenFrom(hideList)
    end
    
    if self.getGMNotes() == 'part1character' then
        self.use_hands = true
    end
end

function initializeUI()
    local GMN = self.getGMNotes()
    local cnum = self.getDescription()
    if string.find(GMN, 'clue') then
        self.UI.setAttribute('whole', 'active', 'true')
    elseif cnum == '11' or cnum == '22' or cnum == '91' then 
        self.UI.setAttribute('whole', 'active', 'true')
    else
        self.UI.setAttribute('whole', 'active', 'false')
    end
end

function revealToAll(player_color, menu_position)
    if player_color == 'Black' then
        if isOpened == 0 then
            isOpened = 1
            self.setHiddenFrom({})
            broadcastToColor("GM안내 : 이 카드의 내용을 숨기지 않습니다.", 'Black', {0.3, 1, 0.3})
        self.UI.setAttribute('whole', 'active', 'false')
        else
            isOpened = 0
            self.setHiddenFrom(colorList)
            broadcastToColor("GM안내 : 이 카드의 내용을 숨깁니다.", 'Black', {1, 0.3, 0.3})
            initializeUI()
        end
    end
end

function tryObjectEnter(object)
    return false
end

function getOwner()
    local zones = self.getZones()
    for i = 1, #zones do
        if zones[i].getName() == 'HandZone' or zones[i].getName() == 'SlotZone' then
            return zones[i].getDescription()
        end
    end
end

function getCode()
    local GMN = self.getGMNotes()
    local codeList = {'aa', 'bb', 'cc', 'dd', 'ee', 'ff', 'gg', 'hh', 'ii', 'AA', 'BB', 'CC', 'DD',
                    'EE', 'FF', 'GG', 'HH', 'II', 'JJ', 'KK', 'LL'}
    for i = 1, #codeList do
        if string.find(GMN, codeList[i]) then
            return codeList[i]
        end
    end
end

function setReadable()
    local GMN = self.getGMNotes()
    local code = getCode()
    local requiredPCAmount = 1
    for i = 1, 11 do
        hideList[i] = colorList[i]
    end

    if string.find(GMN, 'People2') then
        requiredPCAmount = 2
    elseif string.find(GMN, 'People3') then
        requiredPCAmount = 3
    elseif string.find(GMN, 'People4') then
        requiredPCAmount = 4
    elseif string.find(GMN, 'People9') then
        requiredPCAmount = 9
    end

    local zone = findZone(code)
    local objs = zone.getObjects()
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if objs[i].getName() == '영매소녀' then
            if countPC(code) >= requiredPCAmount or string.find(GMN, 'Club') or string.find(GMN, 'Equal') or string.find(GMN, 'Square') then
                hideList[1] = 'Grey'
            end
        elseif objs[i].getName() == '여대생' then
            if countPC(code) >= requiredPCAmount or string.find(GMN, 'Triangle') or string.find(GMN, 'Circles') or string.find(GMN, 'Plus') then
                hideList[2] = 'Grey'
            end
        elseif objs[i].getName() == '청년' then
            if countPC(code) >= requiredPCAmount or string.find(GMN, 'Heart') or string.find(GMN, 'Circles') or string.find(GMN, 'Square') then
                hideList[3] = 'Grey'
            end
        elseif objs[i].getName() == '도시전설 작가' then
            if countPC(code) >= requiredPCAmount or string.find(GMN, 'Diamond') or string.find(GMN, 'Circles') or string.find(GMN, 'Equal') then
                hideList[4] = 'Grey'
            end
        elseif objs[i].getName() == '고아' then
            if countPC(code) >= requiredPCAmount or string.find(GMN, 'Star') or string.find(GMN, 'Plus') or string.find(GMN, 'Equal') then
                hideList[5] = 'Grey'
            end
        elseif objs[i].getName() == '백의의 노인' then
            if countPC(code) >= requiredPCAmount or string.find(GMN, 'Spade') or string.find(GMN, 'Plus') or string.find(GMN, 'Square') then
                hideList[6] = 'Grey'
            end
        end
    end
    if self.getDescription() == '19' then
        local conditionCard = findCard(39)
        if conditionCard ~= nil then
            local tmpZones = conditionCard.getZones()
            for i = 1, #tmpZones do
                if tmpZones[i].getName() == 'SlotZone' or tmpZones[i].getName() == 'HandZone' then
                    for j = 1, #susList do
                        if tmpZones[i].getDescription() == susList[j] then
                            hideList[j] = 'Grey'
                        end
                    end
                end
            end
        end
    end


    if string.find(self.getGMNotes(), 'Covered') then
        self.setHiddenFrom({})
    else
        self.setHiddenFrom(hideList)
    end
    setUIVisibility()
end

function setUIVisibility()
    local vl = 'Black'
    for i = 1, 11 do
        if hideList[i] ~= colorList[i] then
            vl = vl .. '|' .. colorList[i]
        end
    end
    self.UI.setAttribute('takeButton', 'visibility', vl)
end

function takeButtonClicked(player, value, id)
    self.use_hands = true
    self.deal(1, player.color, 1)
    self.setHiddenFrom({})
    self.UI.setAttribute('whole', 'active', 'false')
    if self.getDescription() == '87' or self.getDescription() == '88' or self.getDescription() == '89' then
        self.UI.setAttribute('bImage', 'active', 'false')
    end
end

function findCard(number)
    local objs = getObjects()
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if objs[i].getName() == 'card' and objs[i].getDescription() == tostring(number) then
            return objs[i]
        end
    end
    return nil
end

function findZone(code)
    local objs = getObjects()
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if string.find(objs[i].getName(), 'Zone'..string.lower(code)) then
            return objs[i]
        end
    end
    print('No zone "Zone'..string.lower(code)..'"')
    return nil
end

function countPC(code)
    local zone = findZone(code)
    local objs = zone.getObjects()
    local count = 0
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if objs[i].getName() == '영매소녀' or objs[i].getName() == '여대생' or objs[i].getName() == '청년' or 
        objs[i].getName() == '도시전설 작가' or objs[i].getName() == '고아' or objs[i].getName() == '백의의 노인' then
            count = count + 1
        end
    end
    return count
end

function onRotate(spin, flip, player_color, old_spin, old_flip)
    local GMN = self.getGMNotes()
    local DESC = self.getDescription()
    if flip < old_flip and string.find(GMN, 'event') then
        if string.find(GMN, 'eventaa') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'a')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventcc') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'c')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventee') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'e')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventff') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'f')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventhh') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'h')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventCC') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'C')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventGG') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'G')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventJJ') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'J')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventKK') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'K')
        end
    elseif flip < old_flip and DESC == '60' then
        Global.call('setEventLog', '60')
    end
end

    end
    if self.getDescription() == '19' then
        local conditionCard = findCard(39)
        if conditionCard ~= nil then
            local tmpZones = conditionCard.getZones()
            for i = 1, #tmpZones do
                if tmpZones[i].getName() == 'SlotZone' or tmpZones[i].getName() == 'HandZone' then

                        if tmpZones[i].getDescription() == susList[j] then

            end
        end

        self.UI.setAttribute('bImage', 'active', 'false')
    end
end

    local objs = getObjects()
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if objs[i].getName() == 'card' and objs[i].getDescription() == tostring(number) then
            return objs[i]
        end
    end
    return nil
end

function findZone(code)
    local objs = getObjects()
    for i = 1, #objs do

        end

end

    local zone = findZone(code)
    local objs = zone.getObjects()
    local count = 0
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if objs[i].getName() == '영매소녀' or objs[i].getName() == '여대생' or objs[i].getName() == '청년' or 
        objs[i].getName() == '도시전설 작가' or objs[i].getName() == '고아' or objs[i].getName() == '백의의 노인' then
            count = count + 1
        end
    end
    return count
end

ObjectStates.Name: Card
ObjectStates.LuaScript:
susList = {'Purple', 'Red', 'Blue', 'Yellow', 'Pink', 'White'}
colorList = {'Purple', 'Red', 'Blue', 'Yellow', 'Pink', 'White', 'Green', 'Brown', 'Teal', 'Orange', 'Grey'}
hideList = {}
isOpened = 0

function onLoad()
    self.addContextMenuItem("토글:공개상태", revealToAll)
    for i = 1, 11 do
        hideList[i] = colorList[i]
    end

    if self.getDescription() ~= '1' then
        self.setHiddenFrom(hideList)
    end
    
    if self.getGMNotes() == 'part1character' then
        self.use_hands = true
    end
end

function initializeUI()
    local GMN = self.getGMNotes()
    local cnum = self.getDescription()
    if string.find(GMN, 'clue') then
        self.UI.setAttribute('whole', 'active', 'true')
    elseif cnum == '11' or cnum == '22' or cnum == '91' then 
        self.UI.setAttribute('whole', 'active', 'true')
    else
        self.UI.setAttribute('whole', 'active', 'false')
    end
end

function revealToAll(player_color, menu_position)
    if player_color == 'Black' then
        if isOpened == 0 then
            isOpened = 1
            self.setHiddenFrom({})
            broadcastToColor("GM안내 : 이 카드의 내용을 숨기지 않습니다.", 'Black', {0.3, 1, 0.3})
        self.UI.setAttribute('whole', 'active', 'false')
        else
            isOpened = 0
            self.setHiddenFrom(colorList)
            broadcastToColor("GM안내 : 이 카드의 내용을 숨깁니다.", 'Black', {1, 0.3, 0.3})
            initializeUI()
        end
    end
end

function tryObjectEnter(object)
    return false
end

function getOwner()
    local zones = self.getZones()
    for i = 1, #zones do
        if zones[i].getName() == 'HandZone' or zones[i].getName() == 'SlotZone' then
            return zones[i].getDescription()
        end
    end
end

function getCode()
    local GMN = self.getGMNotes()
    local codeList = {'aa', 'bb', 'cc', 'dd', 'ee', 'ff', 'gg', 'hh', 'ii', 'AA', 'BB', 'CC', 'DD',
                    'EE', 'FF', 'GG', 'HH', 'II', 'JJ', 'KK', 'LL'}
    for i = 1, #codeList do
        if string.find(GMN, codeList[i]) then
            return codeList[i]
        end
    end
end

function setReadable()
    local GMN = self.getGMNotes()
    local code = getCode()
    local requiredPCAmount = 1
    for i = 1, 11 do
        hideList[i] = colorList[i]
    end

    if string.find(GMN, 'People2') then
        requiredPCAmount = 2

        requiredPCAmount = 3
    elseif string.find(GMN, 'People4') then
        requiredPCAmount = 4

            if countPC(code) >= requiredPCAmount or string.find(GMN, 'Club') or string.find(GMN, 'Equal') or string.find(GMN, 'Square') then
                hideList[1] = 'Grey'
            end
        elseif objs[i].getName() == '여대생' then

            end
        elseif objs[i].getName() == '청년' then

                hideList[3] = 'Grey'
            end

                hideList[5] = 'Grey'
            end
        elseif objs[i].getName() == '백의의 노인' then
            if countPC(code) >= requiredPCAmount or string.find(GMN, 'Spade') or string.find(GMN, 'Plus') or string.find(GMN, 'Square') then
                hideList[6] = 'Grey'
            end
        end
    end
    if self.getDescription() == '19' then
        local conditionCard = findCard(39)
        if conditionCard ~= nil then
            local tmpZones = conditionCard.getZones()
            for i = 1, #tmpZones do
                if tmpZones[i].getName() == 'SlotZone' or tmpZones[i].getName() == 'HandZone' then

end

function initializeUI()
    local GMN = self.getGMNotes()
    local cnum = self.getDescription()
    if string.find(GMN, 'clue') then

    elseif cnum == '11' or cnum == '22' or cnum == '91' then 
        self.UI.setAttribute('whole', 'active', 'true')
    else
        self.UI.setAttribute('whole', 'active', 'false')
    end
end

function revealToAll(player_color, menu_position)
    if player_color == 'Black' then
        if isOpened == 0 then

            self.setHiddenFrom({})
            broadcastToColor("GM안내 : 이 카드의 내용을 숨기지 않습니다.", 'Black', {0.3, 1, 0.3})
        self.UI.setAttribute('whole', 'active', 'false')

        end
    end
end

    return false
end

function getOwner()
    local zones = self.getZones()
    for i = 1, #zones do

        end
    end
end

function getCode()
    local GMN = self.getGMNotes()
    local codeList = {'aa', 'bb', 'cc', 'dd', 'ee', 'ff', 'gg', 'hh', 'ii', 'AA', 'BB', 'CC', 'DD',
                    'EE', 'FF', 'GG', 'HH', 'II', 'JJ', 'KK', 'LL'}

        if string.find(GMN, codeList[i]) then
            return codeList[i]
        end
    end
end

function setReadable()
    local GMN = self.getGMNotes()
    local code = getCode()
    local requiredPCAmount = 1
    for i = 1, 11 do
        hideList[i] = colorList[i]
    end

    if string.find(GMN, 'People2') then
        requiredPCAmount = 2
    elseif string.find(GMN, 'People3') then
        requiredPCAmount = 3
    elseif string.find(GMN, 'People4') then
        requiredPCAmount = 4
    elseif string.find(GMN, 'People9') then
        requiredPCAmount = 9
    end

    local zone = findZone(code)
    local objs = zone.getObjects()
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if objs[i].getName() == '영매소녀' then
            if countPC(code) >= requiredPCAmount or string.find(GMN, 'Club') or string.find(GMN, 'Equal') or string.find(GMN, 'Square') then
                hideList[1] = 'Grey'
            end
        elseif objs[i].getName() == '여대생' then
            if countPC(code) >= requiredPCAmount or string.find(GMN, 'Triangle') or string.find(GMN, 'Circles') or string.find(GMN, 'Plus') then
                hideList[2] = 'Grey'
            end
        elseif objs[i].getName() == '청년' then
            if countPC(code) >= requiredPCAmount or string.find(GMN, 'Heart') or string.find(GMN, 'Circles') or string.find(GMN, 'Square') then
                hideList[3] = 'Grey'
            end
        elseif objs[i].getName() == '도시전설 작가' then
            if countPC(code) >= requiredPCAmount or string.find(GMN, 'Diamond') or string.find(GMN, 'Circles') or string.find(GMN, 'Equal') then
                hideList[4] = 'Grey'
            end
        elseif objs[i].getName() == '고아' then
            if countPC(code) >= requiredPCAmount or string.find(GMN, 'Star') or string.find(GMN, 'Plus') or string.find(GMN, 'Equal') then
                hideList[5] = 'Grey'
            end

                hideList[6] = 'Grey'
            end
        end
    end
    if self.getDescription() == '19' then
        local conditionCard = findCard(39)
        if conditionCard ~= nil then
            local tmpZones = conditionCard.getZones()
            for i = 1, #tmpZones do
                if tmpZones[i].getName() == 'SlotZone' or tmpZones[i].getName() == 'HandZone' then
                    for j = 1, #susList do
                        if tmpZones[i].getDescription() == susList[j] then
                            hideList[j] = 'Grey'
                        end
                    end
                end
            end
        end
    end


    if string.find(self.getGMNotes(), 'Covered') then
        self.setHiddenFrom({})
    else
        self.setHiddenFrom(hideList)
    end
    setUIVisibility()
end

function setUIVisibility()
    local vl = 'Black'
    for i = 1, 11 do
        if hideList[i] ~= colorList[i] then
            vl = vl .. '|' .. colorList[i]
        end
    end
    self.UI.setAttribute('takeButton', 'visibility', vl)
end

function takeButtonClicked(player, value, id)
    self.use_hands = true
    self.deal(1, player.color, 1)
    self.setHiddenFrom({})
    self.UI.setAttribute('whole', 'active', 'false')
    if self.getDescription() == '87' or self.getDescription() == '88' or self.getDescription() == '89' then
        self.UI.setAttribute('bImage', 'active', 'false')
    end
end

function findCard(number)
    local objs = getObjects()
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if objs[i].getName() == 'card' and objs[i].getDescription() == tostring(number) then
            return objs[i]
        end
    end
    return nil
end

function findZone(code)
    local objs = getObjects()
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if string.find(objs[i].getName(), 'Zone'..string.lower(code)) then
            return objs[i]
        end
    end
    print('No zone "Zone'..string.lower(code)..'"')
    return nil
end

function countPC(code)
    local zone = findZone(code)
    local objs = zone.getObjects()
    local count = 0
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if objs[i].getName() == '영매소녀' or objs[i].getName() == '여대생' or objs[i].getName() == '청년' or 
        objs[i].getName() == '도시전설 작가' or objs[i].getName() == '고아' or objs[i].getName() == '백의의 노인' then
            count = count + 1
        end
    end
    return count
end

function onRotate(spin, flip, player_color, old_spin, old_flip)
    local GMN = self.getGMNotes()
    local DESC = self.getDescription()
    if flip < old_flip and string.find(GMN, 'event') then
        if string.find(GMN, 'eventaa') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'a')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventcc') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'c')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventee') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'e')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventff') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'f')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventhh') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'h')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventCC') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'C')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventGG') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'G')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventJJ') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'J')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventKK') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'K')
        end
    elseif flip < old_flip and DESC == '60' then
        Global.call('setEventLog', '60')
    end
end

    local objs = getObjects()
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if objs[i].getName() == 'card' and objs[i].getDescription() == tostring(number) then
            return objs[i]
        end
    end
    return nil
end

function findZone(code)
    local objs = getObjects()
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if string.find(objs[i].getName(), 'Zone'..string.lower(code)) then
            return objs[i]
        end
    end
    print('No zone "Zone'..string.lower(code)..'"')
    return nil
end

function countPC(code)
    local zone = findZone(code)
    local objs = zone.getObjects()
    local count = 0
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if objs[i].getName() == '영매소녀' or objs[i].getName() == '여대생' or objs[i].getName() == '청년' or 
        objs[i].getName() == '도시전설 작가' or objs[i].getName() == '고아' or objs[i].getName() == '백의의 노인' then
            count = count + 1
        end
    end
    return count
end

function onRotate(spin, flip, player_color, old_spin, old_flip)
    local GMN = self.getGMNotes()
    local DESC = self.getDescription()
    if flip < old_flip and string.find(GMN, 'event') then
        if string.find(GMN, 'eventaa') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'a')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventcc') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'c')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventee') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'e')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventff') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'f')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventhh') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'h')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventCC') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'C')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventGG') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'G')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventJJ') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'J')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventKK') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'K')
        end
    elseif flip < old_flip and DESC == '60' then
        Global.call('setEventLog', '60')
    end
end

ObjectStates.Name: Card
ObjectStates.LuaScript:
susList = {'Purple', 'Red', 'Blue', 'Yellow', 'Pink', 'White'}
colorList = {'Purple', 'Red', 'Blue', 'Yellow', 'Pink', 'White', 'Green', 'Brown', 'Teal', 'Orange', 'Grey'}
hideList = {}
isOpened = 0

function onLoad()
    self.addContextMenuItem("토글:공개상태", revealToAll)
    for i = 1, 11 do
        hideList[i] = colorList[i]
    end

    if self.getDescription() ~= '1' then
        self.setHiddenFrom(hideList)
    end
    
    if self.getGMNotes() == 'part1character' then
        self.use_hands = true
    end
end

function initializeUI()
    local GMN = self.getGMNotes()
    local cnum = self.getDescription()
    if string.find(GMN, 'clue') then
        self.UI.setAttribute('whole', 'active', 'true')
    elseif cnum == '11' or cnum == '22' or cnum == '91' then 
        self.UI.setAttribute('whole', 'active', 'true')
    else
        self.UI.setAttribute('whole', 'active', 'false')
    end
end

function revealToAll(player_color, menu_position)
    if player_color == 'Black' then
        if isOpened == 0 then
            isOpened = 1
            self.setHiddenFrom({})
            broadcastToColor("GM안내 : 이 카드의 내용을 숨기지 않습니다.", 'Black', {0.3, 1, 0.3})
        self.UI.setAttribute('whole', 'active', 'false')
        else
            isOpened = 0
            self.setHiddenFrom(colorList)
            broadcastToColor("GM안내 : 이 카드의 내용을 숨깁니다.", 'Black', {1, 0.3, 0.3})
            initializeUI()
        end
    end
end

function tryObjectEnter(object)
    return false
end

function getOwner()
    local zones = self.getZones()
    for i = 1, #zones do
        if zones[i].getName() == 'HandZone' or zones[i].getName() == 'SlotZone' then
            return zones[i].getDescription()
        end
    end
end

function getCode()
    local GMN = self.getGMNotes()
    local codeList = {'aa', 'bb', 'cc', 'dd', 'ee', 'ff', 'gg', 'hh', 'ii', 'AA', 'BB', 'CC', 'DD',
                    'EE', 'FF', 'GG', 'HH', 'II', 'JJ', 'KK', 'LL'}
    for i = 1, #codeList do
        if string.find(GMN, codeList[i]) then
            return codeList[i]
        end
    end
end

function setReadable()
    local GMN = self.getGMNotes()
    local code = getCode()
    local requiredPCAmount = 1
    for i = 1, 11 do
        hideList[i] = colorList[i]
    end

    if string.find(GMN, 'People2') then
        requiredPCAmount = 2
    elseif string.find(GMN, 'People3') then
        requiredPCAmount = 3
    elseif string.find(GMN, 'People4') then
        requiredPCAmount = 4
    elseif string.find(GMN, 'People9') then
        requiredPCAmount = 9
    end

    local zone = findZone(code)
    local objs = zone.getObjects()
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if objs[i].getName() == '영매소녀' then
            if countPC(code) >= requiredPCAmount or string.find(GMN, 'Club') or string.find(GMN, 'Equal') or string.find(GMN, 'Square') then
                hideList[1] = 'Grey'
            end
        elseif objs[i].getName() == '여대생' then
            if countPC(code) >= requiredPCAmount or string.find(GMN, 'Triangle') or string.find(GMN, 'Circles') or string.find(GMN, 'Plus') then
                hideList[2] = 'Grey'
            end
        elseif objs[i].getName() == '청년' then
            if countPC(code) >= requiredPCAmount or string.find(GMN, 'Heart') or string.find(GMN, 'Circles') or string.find(GMN, 'Square') then
                hideList[3] = 'Grey'
            end
        elseif objs[i].getName() == '도시전설 작가' then
            if countPC(code) >= requiredPCAmount or string.find(GMN, 'Diamond') or string.find(GMN, 'Circles') or string.find(GMN, 'Equal') then
                hideList[4] = 'Grey'
            end
        elseif objs[i].getName() == '고아' then
            if countPC(code) >= requiredPCAmount or string.find(GMN, 'Star') or string.find(GMN, 'Plus') or string.find(GMN, 'Equal') then
                hideList[5] = 'Grey'
            end
        elseif objs[i].getName() == '백의의 노인' then
            if countPC(code) >= requiredPCAmount or string.find(GMN, 'Spade') or string.find(GMN, 'Plus') or string.find(GMN, 'Square') then
                hideList[6] = 'Grey'
            end
        end
    end
    if self.getDescription() == '19' then
        local conditionCard = findCard(39)
        if conditionCard ~= nil then
            local tmpZones = conditionCard.getZones()
            for i = 1, #tmpZones do
                if tmpZones[i].getName() == 'SlotZone' or tmpZones[i].getName() == 'HandZone' then
                    for j = 1, #susList do
                        if tmpZones[i].getDescription() == susList[j] then
                            hideList[j] = 'Grey'
                        end
                    end
                end
            end
        end
    end


    if string.find(self.getGMNotes(), 'Covered') then
        self.setHiddenFrom({})
    else
        self.setHiddenFrom(hideList)
    end
    setUIVisibility()
end

function setUIVisibility()
    local vl = 'Black'
    for i = 1, 11 do
        if hideList[i] ~= colorList[i] then
            vl = vl .. '|' .. colorList[i]
        end
    end
    self.UI.setAttribute('takeButton', 'visibility', vl)
end

function takeButtonClicked(player, value, id)
    self.use_hands = true
    self.deal(1, player.color, 1)
    self.setHiddenFrom({})
    self.UI.setAttribute('whole', 'active', 'false')
    if self.getDescription() == '87' or self.getDescription() == '88' or self.getDescription() == '89' then
        self.UI.setAttribute('bImage', 'active', 'false')
    end
end

function findCard(number)
    local objs = getObjects()
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if objs[i].getName() == 'card' and objs[i].getDescription() == tostring(number) then
            return objs[i]
        end
    end
    return nil
end

function findZone(code)
    local objs = getObjects()
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if string.find(objs[i].getName(), 'Zone'..string.lower(code)) then
            return objs[i]
        end
    end
    print('No zone "Zone'..string.lower(code)..'"')
    return nil
end

function countPC(code)
    local zone = findZone(code)
    local objs = zone.getObjects()
    local count = 0
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if objs[i].getName() == '영매소녀' or objs[i].getName() == '여대생' or objs[i].getName() == '청년' or 
        objs[i].getName() == '도시전설 작가' or objs[i].getName() == '고아' or objs[i].getName() == '백의의 노인' then
            count = count + 1
        end
    end
    return count
end

function onRotate(spin, flip, player_color, old_spin, old_flip)
    local GMN = self.getGMNotes()
    local DESC = self.getDescription()
    if flip < old_flip and string.find(GMN, 'event') then
        if string.find(GMN, 'eventaa') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'a')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventcc') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'c')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventee') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'e')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventff') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'f')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventhh') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'h')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventCC') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'C')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventGG') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'G')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventJJ') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'J')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventKK') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'K')
        end
    elseif flip < old_flip and DESC == '60' then
        Global.call('setEventLog', '60')
    end
end

ObjectStates.LuaScript:
damage = 0
function onLoad()
    damage = 0
end

function addDamage()
    damage = damage + 1
    self.UI.setAttribute('d'..tostring(damage), 'active', 'true')
    if damage == 3 then
        self.UI.setAttribute('dbt', 'active', 'false')
        self.setHiddenFrom({})
        self.use_hands = true
        if string.find(self.getGMNotes(), 'Purple') then
            self.deal(1, 'Purple', 1)
        elseif string.find(self.getGMNotes(), 'Red') then
            self.deal(1, 'Red', 1)
        elseif string.find(self.getGMNotes(), 'Blue') then
            self.deal(1, 'Blue', 1)
        elseif string.find(self.getGMNotes(), 'Yellow') then
            self.deal(1, 'Yellow', 1)
        elseif string.find(self.getGMNotes(), 'Pink') then
            self.deal(1, 'Pink', 1)
        elseif string.find(self.getGMNotes(), 'White') then
            self.deal(1, 'White', 1)
        end
    end
end

                    'EE', 'FF', 'GG', 'HH', 'II', 'JJ', 'KK', 'LL'}
    for i = 1, #codeList do
        if string.find(GMN, codeList[i]) then
            return codeList[i]
        end
    end
end

function setReadable()
    local GMN = self.getGMNotes()
    local code = getCode()
    local requiredPCAmount = 1
    for i = 1, 11 do
        hideList[i] = colorList[i]
    end

    if string.find(GMN, 'People2') then
        requiredPCAmount = 2
    elseif string.find(GMN, 'People3') then
        requiredPCAmount = 3
    elseif string.find(GMN, 'People4') then
        requiredPCAmount = 4
    elseif string.find(GMN, 'People9') then
        requiredPCAmount = 9
    end

    local zone = findZone(code)
    local objs = zone.getObjects()
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if objs[i].getName() == '영매소녀' then
            if countPC(code) >= requiredPCAmount or string.find(GMN, 'Club') or string.find(GMN, 'Equal') or string.find(GMN, 'Square') then
                hideList[1] = 'Grey'
            end
        elseif objs[i].getName() == '여대생' then
            if countPC(code) >= requiredPCAmount or string.find(GMN, 'Triangle') or string.find(GMN, 'Circles') or string.find(GMN, 'Plus') then
                hideList[2] = 'Grey'
            end
        elseif objs[i].getName() == '청년' then
            if countPC(code) >= requiredPCAmount or string.find(GMN, 'Heart') or string.find(GMN, 'Circles') or string.find(GMN, 'Square') then
                hideList[3] = 'Grey'
            end
        elseif objs[i].getName() == '도시전설 작가' then
            if countPC(code) >= requiredPCAmount or string.find(GMN, 'Diamond') or string.find(GMN, 'Circles') or string.find(GMN, 'Equal') then
                hideList[4] = 'Grey'
            end
        elseif objs[i].getName() == '고아' then
            if countPC(code) >= requiredPCAmount or string.find(GMN, 'Star') or string.find(GMN, 'Plus') or string.find(GMN, 'Equal') then
                hideList[5] = 'Grey'
            end
        elseif objs[i].getName() == '백의의 노인' then
            if countPC(code) >= requiredPCAmount or string.find(GMN, 'Spade') or string.find(GMN, 'Plus') or string.find(GMN, 'Square') then
                hideList[6] = 'Grey'
            end
        end
    end
    if self.getDescription() == '19' then
        local conditionCard = findCard(39)
        if conditionCard ~= nil then
            local tmpZones = conditionCard.getZones()
            for i = 1, #tmpZones do
                if tmpZones[i].getName() == 'SlotZone' or tmpZones[i].getName() == 'HandZone' then
                    for j = 1, #susList do
                        if tmpZones[i].getDescription() == susList[j] then
                            hideList[j] = 'Grey'
                        end
                    end
                end
            end
        end
    end


    if string.find(self.getGMNotes(), 'Covered') then
        self.setHiddenFrom({})
    else
        self.setHiddenFrom(hideList)
    end
    setUIVisibility()
end

function setUIVisibility()
    local vl = 'Black'
    for i = 1, 11 do
        if hideList[i] ~= colorList[i] then
            vl = vl .. '|' .. colorList[i]
        end
    end
    self.UI.setAttribute('takeButton', 'visibility', vl)
end

function takeButtonClicked(player, value, id)
    self.use_hands = true
    self.deal(1, player.color, 1)
    self.setHiddenFrom({})
    self.UI.setAttribute('whole', 'active', 'false')
    if self.getDescription() == '87' or self.getDescription() == '88' or self.getDescription() == '89' then
        self.UI.setAttribute('bImage', 'active', 'false')
    end
end

function findCard(number)
    local objs = getObjects()
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if objs[i].getName() == 'card' and objs[i].getDescription() == tostring(number) then
            return objs[i]
        end
    end
    return nil
end

function findZone(code)
    local objs = getObjects()
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if string.find(objs[i].getName(), 'Zone'..string.lower(code)) then
            return objs[i]
        end
    end
    print('No zone "Zone'..string.lower(code)..'"')
    return nil
end

function countPC(code)
    local zone = findZone(code)
    local objs = zone.getObjects()
    local count = 0
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if objs[i].getName() == '영매소녀' or objs[i].getName() == '여대생' or objs[i].getName() == '청년' or 
        objs[i].getName() == '도시전설 작가' or objs[i].getName() == '고아' or objs[i].getName() == '백의의 노인' then
            count = count + 1
        end
    end
    return count
end

function onRotate(spin, flip, player_color, old_spin, old_flip)
    local GMN = self.getGMNotes()
    local DESC = self.getDescription()
    if flip < old_flip and string.find(GMN, 'event') then
        if string.find(GMN, 'eventaa') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'a')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventcc') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'c')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventee') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'e')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventff') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'f')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventhh') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'h')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventCC') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'C')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventGG') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'G')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventJJ') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'J')
        elseif string.find(GMN, 'eventKK') then
            Global.call('setEventLog', 'K')
        end
    elseif flip < old_flip and DESC == '60' then
        Global.call('setEventLog', '60')
    end
end
