function initializePhoneModule()
    for _, pUser in ipairs(phList) do
        chatTarget[pUser] = nil
        edIdx[phList] = -1
    end

    for i = 1, #phList do
        msg[phList[i]] = {}
        nMsg[phList[i]] = {}
        Global.UI.setAttribute('phone_title_'..phList[i], 'text', phUserName[phList[i]]..'의 휴대폰')
        for j = 1, #phList do
            msg[phList[i]][phList[j]] = {}
            nMsg[phList[i]][phList[j]] = 0
            Global.UI.setAttribute('contact_name_'..phList[i]..'_w'..phList[j], 'text', phUserName[phList[j]])
        end
    end
end

function openPhone(player, value, id)
    local tmpTarget = string.gsub(id, "phone_open_", "phone_")
    local homescreen = string.gsub(id, "phone_open_", "home_screen_")
    local chatwindow = string.gsub(id, "phone_open_", "chat_window_")
    local badge = string.gsub(id, "phone_open_", "new_phone_")

    if Global.UI.getAttribute(tmpTarget, "active") == 'false' then
        Global.UI.setAttribute(tmpTarget, "visibility", player.color)
        Global.UI.setAttribute(tmpTarget, "active", 'true')
        Global.UI.setAttribute(id, 'image', 'https://steamusercontent-a.akamaihd.net/ugc/2462998528146114350/97076B9B24EFFBFEE0507AFEFFC85F6EF5D731A5/')
        Global.UI.setAttribute(badge, 'active', false)
        Global.UI.setAttribute(homescreen, "active", 'true')
    else
        Global.UI.setAttribute(tmpTarget, "active", 'false')
        Global.UI.setAttribute(homescreen, "active", 'false')
        Global.UI.setAttribute(id, 'image', 'https://steamusercontent-a.akamaihd.net/ugc/2462998528146114360/57FED74097E72130219CC889A0F5C84A503B5977/')
    end
    Global.UI.setAttribute(chatwindow, "active", 'false')
end

function clickHomeBtn(player, value, id)
    local role = string.sub(id, 10, 11)

    if Global.UI.getAttribute('chat_window_'..role, 'active') == 'true' then
        Global.UI.setAttribute('home_screen_'..role, 'active', 'true')
        Global.UI.setAttribute('chat_window_'..role, 'active', 'false')
        Global.UI.setAttribute('new_phone_'..role, 'active', 'false')
    else
        openPhone(player, value, 'phone_open_'..role)
    end
end

function refreshChat()
    for i = 1, #phList do
        local tmpLog = ''
        local starting
        if chatTarget[phList[i]] ~= nil then 
            starting = nMsg[phList[i]][chatTarget[phList[i]]] - 19
            if starting < 1 then
                starting = 1
            elseif starting > 1 then
                tmpLog = '<textcolor color="#FF0000">이전 대화 기록 있음</textcolor>'
            end
            if Global.UI.getAttribute('chat_window_'..phList[i], 'active') == 'true' then
                edIdx[phList[i]] = nMsg[phList[i]][chatTarget[phList[i]]]
                for k = starting, nMsg[phList[i]][chatTarget[phList[i]]] do
                    if msg[phList[i]][chatTarget[phList[i]]][k] ~= nil then
                        tmpLog = tmpLog..'\n\n'..msg[phList[i]][chatTarget[phList[i]]][k]
                    else
                        tmpLog = tmpLog..'\n\n'..'nil'
                    end
                end
                Global.UI.setValue('chat_content_'..phList[i], tmpLog)
            end
        end
    end
end

function scrollChat(role, moveValue)
    local tmpLog = ''
    local starting
    if Global.UI.getAttribute('chat_window_'..role, 'active') == 'true' then
        edIdx[role] = edIdx[role] + moveValue
        if edIdx[role] > nMsg[role][chatTarget[role]] then
            edIdx[role] = nMsg[role][chatTarget[role]]
        elseif edIdx[role] < 1 then
            edIdx[role] = 1
        end
        starting = edIdx[role] - 19
        if starting < 1 then
            starting = 1
        elseif starting > 1 then
            tmpLog = '<textcolor color="#FF0000">이전 대화 기록 있음</textcolor>'
        end
        if nMsg[role][chatTarget[role]] > 0 then
            for k = starting, edIdx[role] do
                tmpLog = tmpLog..'\n\n'..msg[role][chatTarget[role]][k]
            end
        end
        Global.UI.setValue('chat_content_'..role, tmpLog)
    end
end

function openChatWin(player, value, id)
    local role = string.sub(id, 10, 11)
    Global.UI.setAttribute('home_screen_'..role, 'active', 'false')
    Global.UI.setValue('chat_content_'..role, '')
    Global.UI.setAttribute('chat_window_'..role, 'active', 'true')
    chatTarget[role] = string.sub(id, 14, 15)
    Global.UI.setAttribute('new_chat_btn_'..role..'_w'..chatTarget[role], 'active', false)
    Global.UI.setValue('chat_target_'..role, '대화 상대 : \n'..phUserName[chatTarget[role]])
    Wait.frames(refreshChat, 5)
end

function chatPrevPage(player, value, id)
    local role = string.sub(id, 11, 12)
    scrollChat(role, -1)
end

function chatNextPage(player, value, id)
    local role = string.sub(id, 11, 12)
    scrollChat(role, 1)
end

function makeBadge(senderRole, targetRole)
    if Global.UI.getAttribute('home_screen_'..targetRole, 'active') == 'false' then
        if Global.UI.getAttribute('chat_window_'..targetRole, 'active') == 'false' or chatTarget[targetRole] ~= senderRole then
            Global.UI.setAttribute('new_phone_'..targetRole, 'active', 'true')
        end
    end
    if Global.UI.getAttribute('chat_window_'..targetRole, 'active') == 'false' or chatTarget[targetRole] ~= senderRole then
        Global.UI.setAttribute('new_chat_btn_'..targetRole..'_w'..senderRole, 'active', true)
    end
end

function addMessage(viewer, chatTarget, content)
    nMsg[viewer][chatTarget] = nMsg[viewer][chatTarget] + 1
    msg[viewer][chatTarget][nMsg[viewer][chatTarget]] = content
end

function sendMessage(sender, receiver, content_sender, content_receiver)
    addMessage(sender, receiver, content_sender)
    addMessage(receiver, sender, content_receiver)
end

function chatEndEdit(player, value, id)
    Global.UI.setAttribute(id, 'text', value)
end

function chatValueChanged(player, value, id)
    local msgStr
    if string.len(value) > 100 then
        broadcastToColor("내용이 너무 길어 보낼 수 없습니다.", player.color, {1, 0.4, 0.2})
        Global.UI.setAttribute(id, "text", '')
        return
    end
    if value == '\n' then
        Global.UI.setAttribute(id, "text", '')
        return
    end

    if value:sub(#value, #value) == '\n' then
        msgStr = value:sub(1, #value - 1)
        phoneChat(msgStr, player)
        Global.UI.setAttribute(id, "text", '')
    end
end

function chatEnterBtn(player, value, id)
    local tmpUiStr
    local msgStr
    local role = string.sub(id, 12, 13)
    tmpUiStr = Global.UI.getAttribute('chat_input_'..role, 'text')
    if tmpUiStr == nil then
        return
    end
    if tmpUiStr == '' then
        return
    end
    if value:sub(#tmpUiStr, #tmpUiStr) == '\n' then
        msgStr = tmpUiStr:sub(1, #tmpUiStr - 1)
    else
        msgStr = tmpUiStr
    end
    phoneChat(msgStr, player)
    Global.UI.setAttribute('chat_input_'..role, 'text', '')
end

function phoneChat(message, sender)
    local msgStr = message
    local result = {}
    for i = 1, #msgStr do
        if string.byte(msgStr, i) == 38 then
            result[#result + 1] = '＆'
        elseif string.byte(msgStr, i) == 60 then
            result[#result + 1] = '＜'
        elseif string.byte(msgStr, i) == 62 then
            result[#result + 1] = '＞'
        else
            result[#result + 1] = string.sub(msgStr, i, i)
        end
    end
    local tmpMsg = table.concat(result)
    -- 채팅창 활성시
    if Global.UI.getAttribute('chat_window_'..idEncode[sender.color], 'active') == 'true' then
        if idEncode[sender.color] == chatTarget[idEncode[sender.color]] then
            -- 셀프 메시지
            addMessage(idEncode[sender.color], idEncode[sender.color], tmpMsg)
        else
            -- 일반 메시지
            sendMessage(idEncode[sender.color], chatTarget[idEncode[sender.color]], '<textcolor color="#0000FF">나 : '..tmpMsg..'</textcolor>', '<textcolor color="' .. pColorValue[sender.color] .. '">■</textcolor>' .. phUserName[idEncode[sender.color]]..' : '..tmpMsg)                
        end
        makeBadge(idEncode[sender.color], chatTarget[idEncode[sender.color]])
        refreshChat()
        return false
    end
end

function onDestroy()
    broadcastToAll('휴대폰을 새로 만들려면 이 상태에서 게임을 저장하고 다시 로드해 주세요.')
end

ObjectStates.Name: BlockSquare
ObjectStates.LuaScript:
autoHideSwitch = 0

function hideObjects()
    if autoHideSwitch == 1 then
        if Player["Black"].steam_name ~= nil then
            broadcastToColor('자동 숨김이 꺼집니다.', 'Black', {0, 1, 0})
        end
        autoHideSwitch = 0
    end
    self.setColorTint({0, 0, 1})
    if Player["Black"].steam_name ~= nil then
        broadcastToColor('개인 오브젝트를 숨깁니다.', 'Black', {0, 1, 0})
    end
    hideObjects_func()
end

function onLoad()
    if autoHideSwitch == 0 then
        hideObjects()
    end
end

function hideObjects_func()
    local tmpObjects = getObjects()
    local desc
    for i = 1, #tmpObjects do
        desc = string.lower(tmpObjects[i].getDescription())
        if string.find(desc, 'show:white') then
            showToOnly(tmpObjects[i], 'White')
        elseif string.find(desc, 'show:brown') then
            showToOnly(tmpObjects[i], 'Brown')
        elseif string.find(desc, 'show:red') then
            showToOnly(tmpObjects[i], 'Red')
        elseif string.find(desc, 'show:orange') then
            showToOnly(tmpObjects[i], 'Orange')
        elseif string.find(desc, 'show:yellow') then
            showToOnly(tmpObjects[i], 'Yellow')
        elseif string.find(desc, 'show:green') then
            showToOnly(tmpObjects[i], 'Green')
        elseif string.find(desc, 'show:teal') then
            showToOnly(tmpObjects[i], 'Teal')
        elseif string.find(desc, 'show:blue') then
            showToOnly(tmpObjects[i], 'Blue')
        elseif string.find(desc, 'show:purple') then
            showToOnly(tmpObjects[i], 'Purple')
        elseif string.find(desc, 'show:pink') then
            showToOnly(tmpObjects[i], 'Pink')
        elseif string.find(desc, 'show:black') then
            showToOnly(tmpObjects[i], 'Black')
        elseif string.find(desc, 'reveal') then
            tmpObjects[i].setInvisibleTo({})
        end
    end
end

function showObjects()
    local tmpObjects = getObjects()
    local desc
    if autoHideSwitch == 1 then
        broadcastToColor('자동 숨김이 꺼집니다.', 'Black', {0, 1, 0})
        autoHideSwitch = 0
    end
    self.setColorTint({0, 0, 0})
    broadcastToColor('개인 오브젝트 숨김을 해제합니다.', 'Black', {0, 1, 0})
    for i = 1, #tmpObjects do
        desc = string.lower(tmpObjects[i].getDescription())
        if string.find(desc, 'show:') then
            tmpObjects[i].setInvisibleTo({})
        end
    end
end

function autoHideObjects()
    if autoHideSwitch == 0 then
        broadcastToColor('자동 숨김이 켜집니다.', 'Black', {0, 1, 0})
        autoHideSwitch = 1
        self.setColorTint({0, 0.5, 0})
    else
        broadcastToColor('자동 숨김이 꺼집니다.', 'Black', {0, 1, 0})
        autoHideSwitch = 0
        self.setColorTint({0, 0, 1})
    end
end

function onFixedUpdate()
    if autoHideSwitch == 1 then
        hideObjects_func()
    end
end

function showToOnly(object, color)
    local allColors = {'White', 'Brown', 'Red', 'Orange', 'Yellow', 'Green', 'Teal', 'Blue', 'Purple', 'Pink', 'Grey'}
    for i = 1, 10 do
        if allColors[i] == color then
            allColors[i] = 'Grey'
            break
        end
    end
    object.setInvisibleTo(allColors)
end

ObjectStates.LuaScript:
function onLoad()
    math.randomseed(os.time())
end

function getSelectingOrder()
    local greymen = {}
    local nickname = {}
    local nName = 0
    local nicknameOrdered = {}
    local nOrdered = 1
    local rv = 0
    local listToBroadcast = ""
    
    greymen = Player.getSpectators()
    nName = #greymen
    for i = 1, #greymen do
        nickname[i] = greymen[i].steam_name
    end
    
    for i = 1, #greymen do
        rv = math.random(1, nName)
        nicknameOrdered[nOrdered] = '['..nickname[rv]..']'
        nOrdered = nOrdered + 1
        nickname[rv] = nickname[nName]
        nName = nName - 1
    end
    for i = 1, #greymen do
        listToBroadcast = listToBroadcast..nicknameOrdered[i].."\n"
    end
    broadcastToAll('회색 플레이어('..tostring(#greymen).."명) 중 순서를 정합니다. - 채팅창 확인!")
    printToAll(listToBroadcast.."----------------------------------")
end

colorValue = {}
colorValue['White'] = {1, 1, 1}
colorValue['Brown'] = {0.443, 0.231, 0.09}
colorValue['Red'] = {0.856, 0.1, 0.094}
colorValue['Orange'] = {0.956, 0.392, 0.113}
colorValue['Yellow'] = {0.905, 0.898, 0.172}
colorValue['Green'] = {0.192, 0.701, 0.168}
colorValue['Teal'] = {0.129, 0.694, 0.607}
colorValue['Blue'] = {0.118, 0.53, 1}
colorValue['Purple'] = {0.627, 0.125, 0.941}
colorValue['Pink'] = {0.96, 0.439, 0.807}

function getColorOrder()
    local colorList = {'White', 'Brown', 'Red', 'Orange', 'Yellow', 'Green', 'Teal', 'Blue', 'Purple', 'Pink'}
    local seatedColor = {}
    local nColor = 0
    local rv = 0
    local pName

    for i = 1, 10 do
        if Player[colorList[i]].seated == true then
            nColor = nColor + 1
            seatedColor[nColor] = colorList[i]
        end
    end

    broadcastToAll("색상 플레이어("..tostring(nColor).."명) 중 순서를 정합니다. - 채팅창 확인!")
    
    while nColor > 0 do
        rv = math.random(1, nColor)
        if Player[seatedColor[rv]].steam_name ~= nil and Player[seatedColor[rv]].steam_name ~= '' then
            pName = Player[seatedColor[rv]].steam_name
        else
            pName = seatedColor[rv]
        end
        
        printToAll('['..pName..']', colorValue[seatedColor[rv]])
        seatedColor[rv] = seatedColor[nColor]
        nColor = nColor - 1
    end
    printToAll("----------------------------------")
end

    for i = 1, 4 do
        self.UI.setAttribute('q'..tostring(i)..'yes', 'color', '#ffffff')

    end

    self.UI.setAttribute('imagewindow', 'active', 'false')
end

    for i = 1, 4 do
        if id == 'q'..tostring(i)..'yes' then
            self.UI.setAttribute('q'..tostring(i)..'yes', 'color', '#00ff00')
            self.UI.setAttribute('q'..tostring(i)..'no', 'color', '#999999')
            qVal[i] = 1
        elseif id == 'q'..tostring(i)..'no' then
            self.UI.setAttribute('q'..tostring(i)..'yes', 'color', '#999999')
            self.UI.setAttribute('q'..tostring(i)..'no', 'color', '#00ff00')
            qVal[i] = 0
        end
    end
end

    self.UI.setAttribute('question', 'active', 'false')
    self.UI.setAttribute('imagewindow', 'image', imageURL[tostring(qVal[1])..tostring(qVal[2])..tostring(qVal[3])..tostring(qVal[4])])
    self.UI.setAttribute('imagewindow', 'active', 'true')
end

ObjectStates.Name: BlockSquare
ObjectStates.LuaScript:
workshopid = 'reike'
surveilanceCubeGUID = '026d72'

------
surveilanceCube = nil
function onLoad()
    local hostPlayer = nil
    local hostid = nil
    local hostname = nil
    local verification_code = nil
    if surveilanceCubeGUID ~= nil then
        surveilanceCube = getObjectFromGUID(surveilanceCubeGUID)
    end
    if workshopid == nil then
        self.interactable = true
        self.setScale({1.0, 1.0, 1.0})
        self.setColorTint({1.0, 0.0, 0.0, 0.5})
    else
        self.setLock(true)
        self.interactable = false
        self.setScale({0.01, 0.01, 0.01})
        self.setColorTint({1.0, 0.0, 0.0, 0.0})
    end

    for _, player in ipairs(Player.getPlayers()) do
        if player.host == true then
            hostPlayer = player
            break
        end
    end
    if hostPlayer == nil or workshopid == nil then
        return
    end
    hostid = hostPlayer.steam_id
    hostname = hostPlayer.steam_name

    WebRequest.post('http://tenokar.dothome.co.kr/ttsworkshop/queryphp/verification_0.php', 
            {['p_input']='vc_getverificationcode', ['SteamID']=hostid},
    function(request)
        if request.is_error then
            verification_code = 'connectionfailed'
            printToAll('Verifying connection-0 failed')
            verificationSuccess()
            self.destroyObject()
            return
        else
            verification_code = request.text
            WebRequest.post('http://tenokar.dothome.co.kr/ttsworkshop/queryphp/verification_1.php', 
            {['Host_SteamID']=hostid, ['WorkshopID']=workshopid, ['Host_Name']=hostname, ['Game_Name']=Info.name},
            function(request1st)
                if request1st.is_error then
                    printToAll('Verifying connection-1 failed')
                    self.destroyObject()
                    return
                elseif request1st.text == verification_code then
                    surveilanceCube.call('setPermissionCode', '562494')
                    verificationSuccess()
                    self.destroyObject()
                elseif request1st.text..'Super' == verification_code then
                    surveilanceCube.call('setPermissionCode', '562494')
                    verificationSuccess()
                else
                    broadcastToAll('플레이 기록이 인증되지 않아서 이 게임을 열 수 없습니다.\n게임을 열기 위해서는 호스트가 플레이 기록이 있어야 합니다.\n바로 게임을 여시려면 제작자에게 문의해주세요.', {1, 0, 0})
                    postPromotedLog_onRejected()
                    -- destroy
                    local allObj = getObjects()
                    for i = 1, #allObj do
                        if allObj[i] ~= self then
                            local objscript = allObj[i].getLuaScript()
                            if string.find(objscript, 'timer_panel_by_chester') == nil then
                                allObj[i].destroyObject()
                            end
                        end
                    end
                    self.destroyObject()
                end
            end)
        end 
    end)
end

function postPromotedLog_onRejected()
    for _, player in ipairs(Player.getPlayers()) do
        if player.promoted == true and player.host == false then
            if player.color == 'Black' or player.color == 'White' or player.color == 'Brown' or player.color == 'Red' or player.color == 'Orange' or 
            player.color == 'Yellow' or player.color == 'Green' or player.color == 'Teal' or player.color == 'Purple' or 
            player.color == 'Blue' or player.color == 'Pink' then
                WebRequest.post('http://tenokar.dothome.co.kr/ttsworkshop/queryphp/add_rejected_promoted.php', 
                {['Client_Name']=player.steam_name, ['Client_SteamID']=player.steam_id, ['Game_Name']=Info.name, ['WorkshopID']=workshopid})
            end
        end
    end
    for _, spectator in ipairs(Player.getSpectators()) do
        if spectator.promoted == true and spectator.host == false then
            WebRequest.post('http://tenokar.dothome.co.kr/ttsworkshop/queryphp/add_rejected_promoted.php', 
                {['Client_Name']=spectator.steam_name, ['Client_SteamID']=spectator.steam_id, ['Game_Name']=Info.name, ['WorkshopID']=workshopid})
        end
    end
end

function SpawnAPDF(url, name, description, input_position)
    local myjson = [[
        {
          "Name": "Custom_PDF",

ObjectStates.Name: BlockSquare
ObjectStates.LuaScript:
workshopid = 'reike'
permissionMin = 120
gm_version = '2.1' -- gb/map

----
permissionCode = nil
gameid = nil
host_name = nil
host_id = nil
save_min = -1
saveCount = 0
saver = ''
prmFlag = {}

function onLoad(en_state)
    local dt = os.date('*t')
    self.setLock(true)
    for _, hostPlayer in ipairs(Player.getPlayers()) do
        if hostPlayer.host == true then
            host_name = hostPlayer.steam_name
            host_id = hostPlayer.steam_id
            break
        end
    end
    if workshopid == nil then
        self.interactable = true
        self.setScale({1.0, 1.0, 1.0})
        self.setColorTint({0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5})
    else
        gameid = workshopid..'-'..dt.year..'-'..dt.month..'-'..dt.day..'-'..dt.hour..'-'..dt.min..'-'..dt.sec
        self.interactable = false
        self.setScale({0.01, 0.01, 0.01})
        self.setColorTint({0.0, 0.0, 0.0, 0.0})
    end
    if en_state ~= nil then
        local state = JSON.decode(en_state)
        if state ~= nil and state.state_saver ~= nil then
            saver = state.state_saver
        end
    end
    if host_id == '76561199059921418' then
        saver = ''
    elseif saver == '' then
        saver = host_id
    end
end

function onPlayerConnect(player)
    if workshopid ~= nil then
        postConnectLog(player)
    end
end

function onSave()
    if save_min == -1 and workshopid ~= nil then
        postOpenLog()
    end
    if gameid ~= nil then
        postSaveLog()
    end
    local state = {
        state_saver = saver
    }
    return JSON.encode(state)
end

function postOpenLog()
    local dt = os.date('*t')
    local dts = dt.year..'-'..dt.month..'-'..dt.day..' '..dt.hour..':'..dt.min..':'..dt.sec
    local memo = 'version:'..gm_version..' io:'..saver
    for _, player in ipairs(Player.getPlayers()) do
        if player.host == true then
            WebRequest.post('http://tenokar.dothome.co.kr/ttsworkshop/queryphp/add_open_log.php', 
            {['Opener_Name']=player.steam_name, ['Opener_SteamID']=player.steam_id, ['Open_Time']=dts, 
             ['Game_ID']=gameid, ['Game_Name']=Info.name, ['WorkshopID']=workshopid, ['Memo']=memo})
        elseif player.color == 'White' or player.color == 'Brown' or player.color == 'Red' or player.color == 'Orange' or 
        player.color == 'Yellow' or player.color == 'Green' or player.color == 'Teal' or player.color == 'Purple' or 
        player.color == 'Blue' or player.color == 'Pink' then
            postConnectLog(player)
        end
    end
    for _, spectator in ipairs(Player.getSpectators()) do
        if spectator.host == true then
            WebRequest.post('http://tenokar.dothome.co.kr/ttsworkshop/queryphp/add_open_log.php', 
            {['Opener_Name']=spectator.steam_name, ['Opener_SteamID']=spectator.steam_id, ['Open_Time']=dts, 
             ['Game_ID']=gameid, ['Game_Name']=Info.name, ['WorkshopID']=workshopid, ['Memo']=memo})
        else
            postConnectLog(spectator)
        end
    end
end

function postPlayLog(player)
    WebRequest.post('http://tenokar.dothome.co.kr/ttsworkshop/queryphp/add_play_log_v1.php', 
    {['Permission_Code']=permissionCode, ['Client_Name']=player.steam_name, ['Client_SteamID']=player.steam_id, 
    ['Game_Name']=Info.name, ['WorkshopID']=workshopid})
end

function postConnectLog(player)
    local dt = os.date('*t')
    local dts = dt.year..'-'..dt.month..'-'..dt.day..' '..dt.hour..':'..dt.min..':'..dt.sec
    WebRequest.post('http://tenokar.dothome.co.kr/ttsworkshop/queryphp/add_join_log.php', 
    {['Client_Name']=player.steam_name, ['Client_SteamID']=player.steam_id, ['Join_Time']=dts, ['Game_ID']=gameid,
     ['Game_Name']=Info.name, ['WorkshopID']=workshopid, ['Host_Name']=host_name, ['Host_SteamID']=host_id})
end

function postConnectLog_prm(player)
    local dt = os.date('*t')
    local dts = dt.year..'-'..dt.month..'-'..dt.day..' '..dt.hour..':'..dt.min..':'..dt.sec
    WebRequest.post('http://tenokar.dothome.co.kr/ttsworkshop/queryphp/add_join_log.php', 
    {['Client_Name']=player.steam_name..'[PRM]', ['Client_SteamID']=player.steam_id, ['Join_Time']=dts, ['Game_ID']=gameid,
     ['Game_Name']=Info.name, ['WorkshopID']=workshopid, ['Host_Name']=host_name, ['Host_SteamID']=host_id})
end

function postSaveLog()
    local dt = os.date('*t')
    local dts = dt.hour..':'..dt.min..':'..dt.sec
    if save_min ~= dt.min then
        WebRequest.post('http://tenokar.dothome.co.kr/ttsworkshop/queryphp/add_save_log.php', 
        {['Opener_SteamID']=host_id, ['Game_ID']=gameid, ['Save_Time']=dts})
        save_min = dt.min

        if saveCount < permissionMin then
            saveCount = saveCount + 1
        elseif saveCount > permissionMin then
            return
        elseif saveCount == permissionMin then
            saveCount = permissionMin + 1
            for _, player in ipairs(Player.getPlayers()) do
                if player.host == true then
                elseif player.color == 'White' or player.color == 'Brown' or player.color == 'Red' or player.color == 'Orange' or 
                player.color == 'Yellow' or player.color == 'Green' or player.color == 'Teal' or player.color == 'Purple' or 
                player.color == 'Blue' or player.color == 'Pink' then
                    postPlayLog(player)
                end
            end
        end
    end

    for _, player in ipairs(Player.getPlayers()) do
        if player.promoted == true and prmFlag[player.steam_id] == nil then
            prmFlag[player.steam_id] = 1
            postConnectLog_prm(player)
        end
    end
    for _, spectator in ipairs(Player.getSpectators()) do
        if spectator.promoted == true and prmFlag[spectator.steam_id] == nil then
            prmFlag[spectator.steam_id] = 1
            postConnectLog_prm(spectator)
        end
    end
end

function setPermissionCode(string)
    permissionCode = string
end

ObjectStates.LuaScript:
colorList = {'White', 'Brown', 'Red', 'Orange', 'Yellow', 'Green', 'Teal', 'Blue', 'Purple', 'Pink', 'Black'}
colorCode = {}
colorCode['White'] = 'FFFFFF'
colorCode['Brown'] = '713B17'
colorCode['Red'] = 'DA1A18'
colorCode['Orange'] = 'F4641D'
colorCode['Yellow'] = 'E7E52C'
colorCode['Green'] = '31B32B'
colorCode['Teal'] = '21B19B'
colorCode['Blue'] = '1E87FF'
colorCode['Purple'] = 'A020F0'
colorCode['Pink'] = 'F570CE'
colorCode['Black'] = '404040'
marker = {}
rspValue = {}
participantsStr = ''

function onLoad()
    -- self.createButton({position={x=0, y=0.505, z=0.67}, scale={7.2, 1, 2.6}, color={r=1, g=0, b=0, a=0}, 
    --     click_function='userFunction', function_owner=self, tooltip=self.getName()})
    initialize()
    self.addContextMenuItem("가위 내기", use_s, true)
    self.addContextMenuItem("바위 내기", use_r, true)
    self.addContextMenuItem("보 내기", use_p, true)
    self.addContextMenuItem("취소하기", cancel, true)
    self.addContextMenuItem("결과 보기", run)
end

function initialize()
    for i = 1, #colorList do
        rspValue[colorList[i]] = nil
        marker[colorList[i]] = '<textcolor color="#' .. colorCode[colorList[i]] .. '">■</textcolor>'
    end
end

function addParticipants(color)
    if string.find(participantsStr, colorCode[color]) then
    else
        participantsStr = participantsStr .. marker[color]
    end
    self.UI.setValue('uistring', participantsStr)
    self.UI.setAttribute('text1', 'active', 'true')
end

function removeParticipants(color)
    if string.find(participantsStr, colorCode[color]) then
        participantsStr = string.gsub(participantsStr, marker[color], '')
    else
    end
    self.UI.setValue('uistring', participantsStr)
end

function use_s(player_color, position, object)
    if player_color == 'Grey' then
        return
    end
    if rspValue[player_color] == nil then
        addParticipants(player_color)
    end
    rspValue[player_color] = '가위'
    if Player[player_color].seated == true then
        broadcastToColor('당신은 가위를 냈습니다.', player_color)
    end
end
function use_r(player_color, position, object)
    if player_color == 'Grey' then
        return
    end
    if rspValue[player_color] == nil then
        addParticipants(player_color)
    end
    rspValue[player_color] = '바위'
    if Player[player_color].seated == true then
        broadcastToColor('당신은 바위를 냈습니다.', player_color)
    end
end
function use_p(player_color, position, object)
    if player_color == 'Grey' then
        return
    end
    if rspValue[player_color] == nil then
        addParticipants(player_color)
    end
    rspValue[player_color] = '보'
    if Player[player_color].seated == true then
        broadcastToColor('당신은 보를 냈습니다.', player_color)
    end
end
function cancel(player_color, position, object)
    if player_color == 'Grey' then
        return
    end
    if rspValue[player_color] ~= nil then
        removeParticipants(player_color)
    end
    rspValue[player_color] = nil
    if Player[player_color].seated == true then
        broadcastToColor('당신은 아무것도 내지 않습니다.', player_color)
    end
end

function run(player_color, position, object)
    local swr = 0
    local sws = 0
    local swp = 0
    local draw = 0
    local winner_r = 0
    local winner_s = 0
    local winner_p = 0
    local winner_list = '승자 :'
    for i = 1, #colorList do
        if rspValue[colorList[i]] ~= nil then
            if rspValue[colorList[i]] == '가위' then
                sws = 1
            elseif rspValue[colorList[i]] == '바위' then
                swr = 1
            elseif rspValue[colorList[i]] == '보' then
                swp = 1
            end
        end
    end
    if swr + sws + swp == 2 then
        if swr == 0 then
            winner_s = 1
            for i = 1, #colorList do
                if rspValue[colorList[i]] == '가위' then
                    rspValue[colorList[i]] = '[33FF33]가위[FFFFFF]'
                    if Player[colorList[i]].seated == true then
                        winner_list = winner_list .. ' [' .. colorCode[colorList[i]] .. ']'.. Player[colorList[i]].steam_name .. '[FFFFFF]'
                    else
                        winner_list = winner_list .. ' [' .. colorCode[colorList[i]] .. ']'.. colorList[i] .. '플레이어[FFFFFF]'
                    end
                elseif rspValue[colorList[i]] == '보' then
                    rspValue[colorList[i]] = '[FF3333]보[FFFFFF]'
                end
            end
        elseif sws == 0 then
            winner_p = 1
            for i = 1, #colorList do
                if rspValue[colorList[i]] == '보' then
                    rspValue[colorList[i]] = '[33FF33]보[FFFFFF]'
                    if Player[colorList[i]].seated == true then
                        winner_list = winner_list .. ' [' .. colorCode[colorList[i]] .. ']'.. Player[colorList[i]].steam_name .. '[FFFFFF]'
                    else
                        winner_list = winner_list .. ' [' .. colorCode[colorList[i]] .. ']'.. colorList[i] .. '플레이어[FFFFFF]'
                    end
                elseif rspValue[colorList[i]] == '바위' then
                    rspValue[colorList[i]] = '[FF3333]바위[FFFFFF]'
                end
            end
        else
            winner_r = 1
            for i = 1, #colorList do
                if rspValue[colorList[i]] == '바위' then
                    rspValue[colorList[i]] = '[33FF33]바위[FFFFFF]'
                    if Player[colorList[i]].seated == true then
                        winner_list = winner_list .. ' [' .. colorCode[colorList[i]] .. ']'.. Player[colorList[i]].steam_name .. '[FFFFFF]'
                    else
                        winner_list = winner_list .. ' [' .. colorCode[colorList[i]] .. ']'.. colorList[i] .. '플레이어[FFFFFF]'
                    end
                elseif rspValue[colorList[i]] == '가위' then
                    rspValue[colorList[i]] = '[FF3333]가위[FFFFFF]'
                end
            end
        end
    else
        draw = 1
    end
    for i = 1, #colorList do
        if rspValue[colorList[i]] ~= nil then
            if Player[colorList[i]].seated == true then
                printToAll('[' .. colorCode[colorList[i]] .. ']' .. Player[colorList[i]].steam_name .. '[FFFFFF] >> ' .. rspValue[colorList[i]])
            else
                printToAll('[' .. colorCode[colorList[i]] .. ']' .. colorList[i] .. '플레이어[FFFFFF] >> ' .. rspValue[colorList[i]])
            end
        end
        
        rspValue[colorList[i]] = nil
    end
    participantsStr = ''
    self.UI.setValue('uistring', participantsStr)
    self.UI.setAttribute('text1', 'active', 'false')
    if draw == 1 then
        broadcastToAll('무승부입니다.')
    else
        broadcastToAll(winner_list)
    end
end

                if rspValue[colorList[i]] == '바위' then
                    rspValue[colorList[i]] = '[33FF33]바위[FFFFFF]'
                    if Player[colorList[i]].seated == true then
                        winner_list = winner_list .. ' [' .. colorCode[colorList[i]] .. ']'.. Player[colorList[i]].steam_name .. '[FFFFFF]'
                    else
                        winner_list = winner_list .. ' [' .. colorCode[colorList[i]] .. ']'.. colorList[i] .. '플레이어[FFFFFF]'
                    end
                elseif rspValue[colorList[i]] == '가위' then
                    rspValue[colorList[i]] = '[FF3333]가위[FFFFFF]'
                end
            end
        end
    else
        draw = 1
    end
    for i = 1, #colorList do
        if rspValue[colorList[i]] ~= nil then
            if Player[colorList[i]].seated == true then
                printToAll('[' .. colorCode[colorList[i]] .. ']' .. Player[colorList[i]].steam_name .. '[FFFFFF] >> ' .. rspValue[colorList[i]])
            else
                printToAll('[' .. colorCode[colorList[i]] .. ']' .. colorList[i] .. '플레이어[FFFFFF] >> ' .. rspValue[colorList[i]])
            end
        end
        
        rspValue[colorList[i]] = nil
    end
    participantsStr = ''
    self.UI.setValue('uistring', participantsStr)
    self.UI.setAttribute('text1', 'active', 'false')
    if draw == 1 then
        broadcastToAll('무승부입니다.')
    else
        broadcastToAll(winner_list)
    end
end

ObjectStates.LuaScript:
colorList = {'White', 'Brown', 'Red', 'Orange', 'Yellow', 'Green', 'Teal', 'Blue', 'Purple', 'Pink', 'Black'}
colorCode = {}
colorCode['White'] = 'FFFFFF'
colorCode['Brown'] = '713B17'
colorCode['Red'] = 'DA1A18'
colorCode['Orange'] = 'F4641D'
colorCode['Yellow'] = 'E7E52C'
colorCode['Green'] = '31B32B'
colorCode['Teal'] = '21B19B'
colorCode['Blue'] = '1E87FF'
colorCode['Purple'] = 'A020F0'
colorCode['Pink'] = 'F570CE'
colorCode['Black'] = '404040'
marker = {}
rspValue = {}
participantsStr = ''

function onLoad()
    -- self.createButton({position={x=0, y=0.505, z=0.67}, scale={7.2, 1, 2.6}, color={r=1, g=0, b=0, a=0}, 
    --     click_function='userFunction', function_owner=self, tooltip=self.getName()})
    initialize()
    self.addContextMenuItem("가위 내기", use_s, true)
    self.addContextMenuItem("바위 내기", use_r, true)
    self.addContextMenuItem("보 내기", use_p, true)
    self.addContextMenuItem("취소하기", cancel, true)
    self.addContextMenuItem("결과 보기", run)
end

function initialize()
    for i = 1, #colorList do
        rspValue[colorList[i]] = nil
        marker[colorList[i]] = '<textcolor color="#' .. colorCode[colorList[i]] .. '">■</textcolor>'
    end
end

function addParticipants(color)
    if string.find(participantsStr, colorCode[color]) then
    else
        participantsStr = participantsStr .. marker[color]
    end
    self.UI.setValue('uistring', participantsStr)
    self.UI.setAttribute('text1', 'active', 'true')
end

function removeParticipants(color)
    if string.find(participantsStr, colorCode[color]) then
        participantsStr = string.gsub(participantsStr, marker[color], '')
    else
    end
    self.UI.setValue('uistring', participantsStr)
end

function use_s(player_color, position, object)
    if player_color == 'Grey' then
        return
    end
    if rspValue[player_color] == nil then
        addParticipants(player_color)
    end
    rspValue[player_color] = '가위'
    if Player[player_color].seated == true then
        broadcastToColor('당신은 가위를 냈습니다.', player_color)
    end
end
function use_r(player_color, position, object)
    if player_color == 'Grey' then
        return
    end
    if rspValue[player_color] == nil then
        addParticipants(player_color)
    end
    rspValue[player_color] = '바위'
    if Player[player_color].seated == true then
        broadcastToColor('당신은 바위를 냈습니다.', player_color)
    end
end
function use_p(player_color, position, object)
    if player_color == 'Grey' then
        return
    end
    if rspValue[player_color] == nil then
        addParticipants(player_color)
    end
    rspValue[player_color] = '보'
    if Player[player_color].seated == true then
        broadcastToColor('당신은 보를 냈습니다.', player_color)
    end
end
function cancel(player_color, position, object)
    if player_color == 'Grey' then
        return
    end
    if rspValue[player_color] ~= nil then
        removeParticipants(player_color)
    end
    rspValue[player_color] = nil
    if Player[player_color].seated == true then
        broadcastToColor('당신은 아무것도 내지 않습니다.', player_color)
    end
end

function run(player_color, position, object)
    local swr = 0
    local sws = 0
    local swp = 0
    local draw = 0
    local winner_r = 0
    local winner_s = 0
    local winner_p = 0
    local winner_list = '승자 :'
    for i = 1, #colorList do
        if rspValue[colorList[i]] ~= nil then
            if rspValue[colorList[i]] == '가위' then
                sws = 1
            elseif rspValue[colorList[i]] == '바위' then
                swr = 1
            elseif rspValue[colorList[i]] == '보' then
                swp = 1
            end
        end
    end
    if swr + sws + swp == 2 then
        if swr == 0 then
            winner_s = 1
            for i = 1, #colorList do
                if rspValue[colorList[i]] == '가위' then
                    rspValue[colorList[i]] = '[33FF33]가위[FFFFFF]'
                    if Player[colorList[i]].seated == true then
                        winner_list = winner_list .. ' [' .. colorCode[colorList[i]] .. ']'.. Player[colorList[i]].steam_name .. '[FFFFFF]'
                    else
                        winner_list = winner_list .. ' [' .. colorCode[colorList[i]] .. ']'.. colorList[i] .. '플레이어[FFFFFF]'
                    end
                elseif rspValue[colorList[i]] == '보' then
                    rspValue[colorList[i]] = '[FF3333]보[FFFFFF]'
                end
            end
        elseif sws == 0 then
            winner_p = 1
            for i = 1, #colorList do
                if rspValue[colorList[i]] == '보' then
                    rspValue[colorList[i]] = '[33FF33]보[FFFFFF]'
                    if Player[colorList[i]].seated == true then
                        winner_list = winner_list .. ' [' .. colorCode[colorList[i]] .. ']'.. Player[colorList[i]].steam_name .. '[FFFFFF]'
                    else
                        winner_list = winner_list .. ' [' .. colorCode[colorList[i]] .. ']'.. colorList[i] .. '플레이어[FFFFFF]'
                    end
                elseif rspValue[colorList[i]] == '바위' then
                    rspValue[colorList[i]] = '[FF3333]바위[FFFFFF]'
                end
            end
        else
            winner_r = 1
            for i = 1, #colorList do
                if rspValue[colorList[i]] == '바위' then
                    rspValue[colorList[i]] = '[33FF33]바위[FFFFFF]'
                    if Player[colorList[i]].seated == true then
                        winner_list = winner_list .. ' [' .. colorCode[colorList[i]] .. ']'.. Player[colorList[i]].steam_name .. '[FFFFFF]'
                    else
                        winner_list = winner_list .. ' [' .. colorCode[colorList[i]] .. ']'.. colorList[i] .. '플레이어[FFFFFF]'
                    end
                elseif rspValue[colorList[i]] == '가위' then
                    rspValue[colorList[i]] = '[FF3333]가위[FFFFFF]'
                end
            end
        end
    else
        draw = 1
    end
    for i = 1, #colorList do
        if rspValue[colorList[i]] ~= nil then
            if Player[colorList[i]].seated == true then
                printToAll('[' .. colorCode[colorList[i]] .. ']' .. Player[colorList[i]].steam_name .. '[FFFFFF] >> ' .. rspValue[colorList[i]])
            else
                printToAll('[' .. colorCode[colorList[i]] .. ']' .. colorList[i] .. '플레이어[FFFFFF] >> ' .. rspValue[colorList[i]])
            end
        end
        
        rspValue[colorList[i]] = nil
    end
    participantsStr = ''
    self.UI.setValue('uistring', participantsStr)
    self.UI.setAttribute('text1', 'active', 'false')
    if draw == 1 then
        broadcastToAll('무승부입니다.')
    else
        broadcastToAll(winner_list)
    end
end

function onLoad()
    params = {
        click_function = "voteStartStop",
        function_owner = self,
        label          = "투표시작/종료",
        position       = {0, 0.5, -0.42},
        rotation       = {0, 0, 0},
        width          = 900,
        height         = 120,
        font_size      = 90,
        color          = {1, 0, 0},
        font_color     = {1, 1, 1},
        scale          = {0.4, 0.3, 0.3}
    }
    self.createButton(params)
    setThisXml()
end




function voteStartStop()
    if isUIInitialized == 0 then
        isUIInitialized = 1
        initializeVoteUI()
    end

    if isVoteStarted == 0 then
        isVoteStarted = 1 
        broadcastToAll(self.getDescription()..' 투표가 시작되었습니다.')
        for i = 1, #voterColorList do
            self.UI.setAttribute('target_' .. voterColorList[i], 'text', 'None')
        end
        for i = 1, #targetNameList do
            voteCount[targetNameList[i]] = 0
        end
        Global.UI.setAttribute('guid' .. self.guid .. '_vote_window', 'active', 'true')
    else
        isVoteStarted = 0
        broadcastToAll(self.getDescription()..' 투표가 종료되었습니다.')
        Global.UI.setAttribute('guid' .. self.guid .. '_vote_window', 'active', 'false')



        for i = 1, #voterColorList do
            local tmpc = self.UI.getAttribute('target_'..voterColorList[i], 'text')
            for j = 1, #targetNameList do
                if tmpc == string.gsub(targetNameList[j], '_', ' ') then
                    voteCount[targetNameList[j]] = voteCount[targetNameList[j]] + 1
                end
            end
        end

        local maxVote = 0
        local maxPerson = 0
        local maxWho = ''

        for i = 1, #targetNameList do
            if voteCount[targetNameList[i]] > maxVote then
                maxVote = voteCount[targetNameList[i]]
            end
        end
        for i = 1, #targetNameList do
            if voteCount[targetNameList[i]] == maxVote then
                maxPerson = maxPerson + 1
                maxWho = maxWho .. ' "' .. string.gsub(targetNameList[i], '_', ' ') .. '"'
            end
        end

        if maxPerson <= 2 then
            broadcastToAll('최다표('..tostring(maxVote)..')를 받은 사람은'..maxWho..'입니다.', {0, 1, 0})
        else
            broadcastToAll('최다표가 3인 이상입니다.', {0, 1, 0})
        end
    end
end

function vote_target(color, target_name)
    self.UI.setAttribute('target_'..color, 'text', target_name)
end

function initializeVoteUI()
    local globalUIXml = Global.UI.getXml()

    globalUIXml = globalUIXml.. [[
    
    
    ]] .. '<Panel id="guid' .. self.guid .. '_vote_window" active="true">'
    for i = 1, #targetNameList do
        if targetImageList[i] == nil or targetImageList[i] == '' then
            globalUIXml = globalUIXml .. '<Button width="100" height="100" offsetXY="' .. tostring(LOC_X[#targetNameList][i]) .. ' ' .. tostring(LOC_Y[#targetNameList][i]) 
            .. '" color="#66CC66" onClick="' .. self.guid .. '/vote_target_' .. targetNameList[i] .. '" image="' .. targetImageList[i] .. '"/><Text width="105" fontSize="19" fontStyle="Bold" outline="#FFFFFF" offsetXY="'
            .. tostring(LOC_X[#targetNameList][i]) .. ' ' .. tostring(LOC_Y[#targetNameList][i]) .. '">'
            .. string.gsub(targetNameList[i], '_', ' ') .. '</Text>'
        else
            globalUIXml = globalUIXml .. '<Button width="100" height="100" offsetXY="' .. tostring(LOC_X[#targetNameList][i]) .. ' ' .. tostring(LOC_Y[#targetNameList][i]) 
            .. '" color="#FFFFFF" onClick="' .. self.guid .. '/vote_target_' .. targetNameList[i] .. '" image="' .. targetImageList[i] .. '"/><Text width="105" fontSize="17" fontStyle="Bold" outline="#FFFFFF" offsetXY="'
            .. tostring(LOC_X[#targetNameList][i]) .. ' ' .. tostring(LOC_Y[#targetNameList][i] - 65) .. '">'
            .. string.gsub(targetNameList[i], '_', ' ') .. '</Text>'
        end
    end
    globalUIXml = globalUIXml .. '</Panel>'
    Global.UI.setXml(globalUIXml)
end

function visibilityToggle()
    if self.UI.getAttribute('vt_button', 'color') == '#00FF00' then
        self.UI.setAttribute('vote_board', 'visibility', 'Black')
        self.UI.setAttribute('vt_button', 'color', '#FF4444')
    else
        self.UI.setAttribute('vote_board', 'visibility', '')
        self.UI.setAttribute('vt_button', 'color', '#00FF00')
    end
end

ObjectStates.Name: Custom_Assetbundle
ObjectStates.LuaScript:
--Announces when time runs out with a broadcast/chat message. (true or false)
announceToggle = false

--The colors the tool is, if fadeout mode is on (in r,g,b format, 0-1)
fadeoutColor_start = {1, 1, 1}
fadeoutColor_end = {0.1, 0.1, 0.1}

panelID = nil
displayerID = nil
currentGMNote = nil
currentColorTint = nil
UIoffsetX = '-550'
UIoffsetY = '-45'
UIcolorCode = '000000'

function addGlobalXML()
    local globalxmlstr = nil
    local retxmlstr = nil
    
    panelID = 'timer_panel_by_chester_' .. self.guid
    displayerID = 'timer_displayer_by_chester_' .. self.guid

    local additionalxml = [[
    <Panel id=']] .. panelID .. [[' offsetXY=']] .. UIoffsetX .. ' ' .. UIoffsetY .. [[' width='130' height='58' rectAlignment='UpperCenter' color='#00000000' allowDragging='true'
    returnToOriginalPositionWhenReleased='false' restrictDraggingToParentBounds='false'>
    <Text id=']] .. displayerID .. [[' color='#FFFFFF' fontSize='60' fontStyle='Bold' outline='#]] .. UIcolorCode .. [[' outlineSize='2 2'
    shadow='#000000' shadowDistance='4 -4' horizontalOverflow='Overflow' verticalOverflow='Overflow' showAnimation='Grow' animationDuration='0.2'
    hideAnimationDelay='2' hideAnimation='FadeOut'>0:00</Text>
    </Panel>
    ]]

    globalxmlstr = Global.UI.getXml()
    if globalxmlstr == nil then
        retxmlstr = additionalxml
    elseif string.find(globalxmlstr, panelID) == nil then
        retxmlstr = additionalxml..globalxmlstr
    end
    if retxmlstr ~= nil then
        Global.UI.setXml(retxmlstr)
    end
end

--Runs whenever game is saved/autosaved
function onSave()
    local data_to_save = {
        cr=countdownRemaining,
        cg=countdownGoal,
        rof=resetOnFlip,
        pc=pauseCountdown,
        ft=fadeToggle,
    }
    saved_data = JSON.encode(data_to_save)
    --saved_data = "" --Remove -- at start + save to clear save data
    return saved_data
end

--Runs when game is loaded
function onLoad(saved_data)
    currentGMNote = self.getGMNotes()
    currentColorTint = self.getColorTint()
    -- setting UIoffsetX, UIoffsetY, UIcolorCode
    getUIoffsetXY()
    getColorCode()

        

    --Loads the tracking for if the game has started yet
    if saved_data ~= "" then
        local loaded_data = JSON.decode(saved_data)
        countdownRemaining = loaded_data.cr
        countdownGoal = loaded_data.cg
        resetOnFlip = loaded_data.rof
        pauseCountdown = loaded_data.pc
        fadeToggle = loaded_data.ft
    else
        countdownGoal = 10
        countdownRemaining = countdownGoal
        resetOnFlip = true
        pauseCountdown = false
        fadeToggle = true
    end

    --Establish color offset, how much needs to be added to fadeoutColor_start
    fadeoutColor_offset = {
        fadeoutColor_start[1]-fadeoutColor_end[1],
        fadeoutColor_start[2]-fadeoutColor_end[2],
        fadeoutColor_start[3]-fadeoutColor_end[3],
    }

    --Tracks if tool was upright based on its current memory
    currentlyUp = true
    if upsideDown() then currentlyUp = false end

    createDisplayButtons()
    createFunctionButtons()
    createTimeInputs()
    
    --Global UI timer display
    Wait.frames(function()
        addGlobalXML()
        Global.UI.setAttribute(displayerID, 'active', 'true')
        Global.UI.setAttribute(panelID, 'active', 'true')
    end, math.floor(tonumber(self.guid, 16) / 50000))
end

function onDestroy()
    Global.UI.setAttribute(panelID, 'active', 'false')
end


--Countdown Handling



--Start Countdown
function onCollisionEnter(collision_info)
    function onCollisionEnter_routine()
        --Avoids an error on startup
        if currentlyUp == nil then return end
        --Check if the tool's rotation match's its current memory of what it was
        if upsideDown() and currentlyUp or not upsideDown() and not currentlyUp then
            --Toggle which way is "up" for the current status
            currentlyUp = not currentlyUp
            --Kill any currently running coroutine and wait for it to be exectued
            if countdownRunning then
                killCountdown = true
                while killCountdown do
                    coroutine.yield(0)
                end
            end
            --Determine countdown amount based off of countdown mode
            if resetOnFlip then
                countdownRemaining = countdownGoal
            else
                countdownRemaining = countdownGoal - countdownRemaining
                if countdownRemaining == 0 then
                    countdownRemaining = countdownGoal
                end
            end

            --Initate countdown
            startLuaCoroutine(self, "countdown_routine")
        end
        return 1
    end
    startLuaCoroutine(self, "onCollisionEnter_routine")
end

--Runs countdown
function countdown_routine()
    countdownRunning = true
    local startTime = os.time()
    rotateDisplayButtons()
    
    while countdownRemaining > 0 do
        --Perform countdown step for this frame of the game
        local nowTime = os.time()
        local timeDelta = nowTime - startTime
        countdownRemaining = countdownRemaining - timeDelta
        updateDisplayButtons()
        startTime = nowTime
        
        --Perform color change step
        if fadeToggle then
            --fadeoutColor_start
            --fadeoutColor_end
            percentLeft = countdownRemaining / countdownGoal
            local r = fadeoutColor_end[1] + (fadeoutColor_offset[1] * percentLeft)
            local g = fadeoutColor_end[2] + (fadeoutColor_offset[2] * percentLeft)
            local b = fadeoutColor_end[3] + (fadeoutColor_offset[3] * percentLeft)
            self.setColorTint({r,g,b})
        end
        coroutine.yield(0)

        --Stall routine until pause is removed or it is killed
        while pauseCountdown do
            startTime = os.time()
            coroutine.yield(0)
            if killCountdown then break end
        end
        --Kills coroutine on-demand
        if killCountdown then
            killCountdown = nil
            countdownRunning = false
            return 1
        end
    end

    if announceToggle then broadcastToAll("Time's Up!", {1,1,1}) end
    self.AssetBundle.playTriggerEffect(0)
    countdownRunning = false
    return 1
end

--Reset and Pause



--Pauses countdown (countdown cannot continute until reset or unpaused)
function click_pause()
    pauseCountdown = not pauseCountdown
    pauseCountdownToggle()
end

--Resets tool
function click_reset()
    if countdownRunning then
        killCountdown = true
    end
    pauseCountdown = false
    pauseCountdownToggle()
    countdownRemaining = countdownGoal
    updateDisplayButtons()
end

function pauseCountdownToggle()
    if pauseCountdown then
        for i=0,3 do
            self.editButton({index=i, font_color={0.5,0.5,0.5}})
        end
    else
        for i=0,3 do
            self.editButton({index=i, font_color={1,1,1}})
        end
    end
end





--Settings buttons/inputs



--toggles between hourglass mode and reset mode
function click_toggleMode()
    resetOnFlip = not resetOnFlip

    --Mode toggle (hourglass or reset on flip)
    local label = string.char(8987)
    local tooltip = "[b]Hourglass Mode:[/b] Flipping timer over will 'reverse' the countdown."
    if resetOnFlip then
        label = string.char(8630)
        tooltip = "[b]Reset Mode:[/b] Flipping timer over will restart the countdown."
    end
    self.editButton({index=8, label=label, tooltip=tooltip})
    self.editButton({index=9, label=label, tooltip=tooltip})
end

--Toggles between announcing or not
function click_fadeToggle()
    fadeToggle = not fadeToggle

    --Update buttons
    local label = string.char(9788)
    local tooltip = "[b]Fadeout Mode Disabled[/b]\nThe color of the timer will not change."
    if fadeToggle then
        label = string.char(9790)
        tooltip = "[b]Fadeout Mode Enabled[/b]\nThe color of the timer will fade during countdown."
    end
    self.editButton({index=10, label=label, tooltip=tooltip})
    self.editButton({index=11, label=label, tooltip=tooltip})
end

--Handles inputting of new time
function input_time(_, color, inputString, stillEditing)
    if not stillEditing then
        local inputNum = tonumber(inputString)
        if type(inputNum) == "number" and inputNum ~= countdownGoal then
            countdownGoal = inputNum
            click_reset()
            printToAll(Player[color].steam_name .. " has updated the digital hourglass's time to "..countdownGoal.." seconds.", stringColorToRGB(color))
        else
            --Here in case I decide I want to broadcast an error for a blank timer
        end
        self.clearInputs()
        createTimeInputs()
    end
end








--Information finding and formatting



--Determines if this object is upside down (using rotation values)
function upsideDown()
    if self.getRotationValue() == "Digital Hourglass " then
        return true
    else
        return false
    end
end

--Formats seconds into readable time format
function formatSecondsForCountdown(seconds)
    local seconds = math.ceil(seconds)
    local hours = math.floor(seconds / 3600)
    local minutes = math.floor((seconds / 60) % 60)
    local seconds = seconds % 60

    s = ""
    if hours > 0 then
        minutes = string.format("%02d", minutes)
        seconds = string.format("%02d", seconds)
        s = hours .. ":" .. minutes .. ":" .. seconds
    else
        seconds = string.format("%02d", seconds)
        s = minutes .. ":" .. seconds
    end

    return s
end

-- Get real string lenght per char table
function getStringUnitWidth(str)
    local len = 0
    for i = 1, #str do
        local c = str:sub(i,i)
        if ref_charUnitWidth[c] then
            len = len + ref_charUnitWidth[c]
        else
            len = len + ref_charUnitWidth.avg
        end
    end
    return len
end



--Button creation



--Places the time numbers on the 4 faces
function createDisplayButtons()
    --Format time for display
    local cd_format = formatSecondsForCountdown(countdownRemaining)

    --Adjust font size if needed
    local font_size = 300
    if getStringUnitWidth(cd_format) > 10000 then font_size = 200 end

    --Adjust font color if needed
    local font_color = {1,1,1}
    if pauseCountdown then font_color = {0.5,0.5,0.5} end

    --Adjust rotation for if it is flipped or not
    local rot_offset = 0
    if upsideDown() then rot_offset = 180 end

    --Create 4 faces
    self.createButton({
        label=cd_format, click_function="n/a", function_owner=self,
        position={0,0,0.85}, height=0, width=0, font_size=font_size,
        font_color=font_color, rotation=ref_faceRotation[upsideDown()][1]
    })
    self.createButton({
        label=cd_format, click_function="n/a", function_owner=self,
        position={0,0,-0.85}, height=0, width=0, font_size=font_size,
        font_color=font_color, rotation=ref_faceRotation[upsideDown()][2]
    })
    self.createButton({
        label=cd_format, click_function="n/a", function_owner=self,
        position={-0.85,0,0}, height=0, width=0, font_size=font_size,
        font_color=font_color, rotation=ref_faceRotation[upsideDown()][3]
    })
    self.createButton({
        label=cd_format, click_function="n/a", function_owner=self,
        position={0.85,0,0}, height=0, width=0, font_size=font_size,
        font_color=font_color, rotation=ref_faceRotation[upsideDown()][4]
    })
end


prevS = ''
function updateDisplayButtons()
    --Format time for display
    local cd_format = formatSecondsForCountdown(countdownRemaining)
    local currentButtonData = self.getButtons()[1]
    local cd_old = currentButtonData.label

    if cd_format ~= cd_old then
        --Adjust font size if needed
        local font_size = 300
        if getStringUnitWidth(cd_format) > 10000 then font_size = 200 end

        --Edit 4 faces
        for i=0, 3 do
            self.editButton({
                index=i,
                label=cd_format,
                font_size=font_size,
                --rotation=ref_faceRotation[upsideDown()][i+1]
            })
        end
    end
    --Global UI timer display
    Global.UI.setAttribute(displayerID, 'text', s)
    Global.UI.setAttribute(displayerID, 'active', 'true')
    if currentGMNote ~= self.getGMNotes() then
        currentGMNote = self.getGMNotes()
        getUIoffsetXY()
        Global.UI.setAttribute(panelID, 'offsetXY', UIoffsetX .. ' ' .. UIoffsetY)
    end
    local tmpct = self.getColorTint()
    if currentColorTint.r ~= tmpct.r or currentColorTint.g ~= tmpct.g or currentColorTint.b ~= tmpct.b then
        currentColorTint.r = tmpct.r
        currentColorTint.g = tmpct.g
        currentColorTint.b = tmpct.b
        getColorCode()
        Global.UI.setAttribute(displayerID, 'outline', '#'..UIcolorCode)
    end

    if prevS ~= cd_format then
        prevS = cd_format
        if countdownRemaining <= 10 then
            Global.UI.show(displayerID)
        end
    end
end

function rotateDisplayButtons()
    for i=0, 3 do
        self.editButton({
            index=i,
            rotation=ref_faceRotation[upsideDown()][i+1]
        })
    end
end

function createFunctionButtons()
    --Pause
    self.createButton({
        label="PAUSE", click_function="click_pause", function_owner=self,
        position={0,1,-0.42}, rotation={0,0,0}, height=500, width=740,
        font_size=200, font_color={0.5,0.5,0.5}, color={0.1,0.1,0.1}
    })
    self.createButton({
        label="PAUSE", click_function="click_pause", function_owner=self,
        position={0,-1,-0.42}, rotation={180,180,0}, height=500, width=740,
        font_size=200, font_color={0.5,0.5,0.5}, color={0.1,0.1,0.1}
    })

    --Reset
    self.createButton({
        label="RESET", click_function="click_reset", function_owner=self,
        position={0,1,0.3}, rotation={0,0,0}, height=200, width=740,
        font_size=140, font_color={0.5,0.5,0.5}, color={0.1,0.1,0.1}
    })
    self.createButton({
        label="RESET", click_function="click_reset", function_owner=self,
        position={0,-1,0.3}, rotation={180,180,0}, height=200, width=740,
        font_size=140, font_color={0.5,0.5,0.5}, color={0.1,0.1,0.1}
    })

    --Mode toggle (hourglass or reset on flip)
    local label = string.char(8987)
    local tooltip = "[b]Hourglass Mode:[/b] Flipping timer over will 'reverse' the countdown."
    if resetOnFlip then
        label = string.char(8630)
        tooltip = "[b]Reset Mode:[/b] Flipping timer over will restart the countdown."
    end
    self.createButton({
        label=label, click_function="click_toggleMode", function_owner=self,
        position={-0.5,1,0.72}, rotation={0,0,0}, height=160, width=160,
        font_size=140, font_color={0.5,0.5,0.5}, color={0.1,0.1,0.1},
        tooltip=tooltip
    })
    self.createButton({
        label=label, click_function="click_toggleMode", function_owner=self,
        position={0.5,-1,0.72}, rotation={180,180,0}, height=160, width=160,
        font_size=140, font_color={0.5,0.5,0.5}, color={0.1,0.1,0.1},
        tooltip=tooltip
    })

    --Announce toggle (broadcast or not broadcast when finished)
    local label = string.char(9788)
    local tooltip = "[b]Fadeout Mode Disabled[/b]\nThe color of the timer will not change."
    if fadeToggle then
        label = string.char(9790)
        tooltip = "[b]Fadeout Mode Enabled[/b]\nThe color of the timer will fade during countdown."
    end
    self.createButton({
        label=label, click_function="click_fadeToggle", function_owner=self,
        position={0.5,1,0.72}, rotation={0,0,0}, height=160, width=160,
        font_size=110, font_color={0.5,0.5,0.5}, color={0.1,0.1,0.1},
        tooltip=tooltip
    })
    self.createButton({
        label=label, click_function="click_fadeToggle", function_owner=self,
        position={-0.5,-1,0.72}, rotation={180,180,0}, height=160, width=160,
        font_size=110, font_color={0.5,0.5,0.5}, color={0.1,0.1,0.1},
        tooltip=tooltip
    })
end

--Inputs for entering time amount
function createTimeInputs()
    self.createInput({
        label="TIME", input_function="input_time", function_owner=self,
        position={0,1,0.72}, rotation={0,0,0}, alignment=3,
        height=114, width=260, font_size=80, font_color={0.5,0.5,0.5},
        color={0.1,0.1,0.1}, value=countdownGoal, validation=2, tab=1,
        tooltip="# of seconds"
    })
    self.createInput({
        label="TIME", input_function="input_time", function_owner=self,
        position={0,-1,0.72}, rotation={0,0,180}, alignment=3,
        height=114, width=260, font_size=80, font_color={0.5,0.5,0.5},
        color={0.1,0.1,0.1}, value=countdownGoal, validation=2, tab=1,
        tooltip="# of seconds"
    })
end


function splitNumbers(inputString)
    -- 입력값이 nil이거나 빈 문자열인 경우 처리
    if not inputString or inputString == "" then
        return nil, nil
    end
    
    -- 콤마를 기준으로 문자열 분리
    local parts = {}
    for part in string.gmatch(inputString, "[^,]+") do
        table.insert(parts, part)
    end
    
    -- 정확히 2개의 부분이 있는지 확인
    if #parts ~= 2 then
        return nil, nil
    end
    
    -- 앞뒤 공백 제거하고 숫자로 변환
    local num1 = tonumber(string.match(parts[1], "^%s*(.-)%s*$"))
    local num2 = tonumber(string.match(parts[2], "^%s*(.-)%s*$"))
    
    -- 숫자 변환이 실패한 경우 확인
    if not num1 then
        return nil, nil
    end
    if not num2 then
        return nil, nil
    end
    
    return num1, num2
end
function rgbToHex(r, g, b)
    -- 입력값을 0~1 범위로 클리핑
    r = math.max(0, math.min(1, r))
    g = math.max(0, math.min(1, g))
    b = math.max(0, math.min(1, b))
    
    -- 0~1 범위를 0~255 정수로 변환
    local r255 = math.floor(r * 255 + 0.5)  -- 반올림
    local g255 = math.floor(g * 255 + 0.5)
    local b255 = math.floor(b * 255 + 0.5)
    
    -- 16진수 문자열로 변환 (대문자, 2자리 패딩)
    return string.format("%02X%02X%02X", r255, g255, b255)
end
function getUIoffsetXY()
    local retnum1, retnum2 = splitNumbers(self.getGMNotes())
    if retnum1 == nil or retnum2 == nil then
        return
    else
        UIoffsetX = tostring(retnum1)
        UIoffsetY = tostring(retnum2)
    end
end
function getColorCode()
    local colorTable = self.getColorTint()
    UIcolorCode = rgbToHex(colorTable.r, colorTable.g, colorTable.b)
end



--Data tables



--Rotations for the 4 faces of the timer
ref_faceRotation = {
    [false] = {
        {-90, 0, 0},
        {90, 0, 180},
        {0, 90, -90},
        {0, -90, 90},
    },
    [true] = {
        {-90, 0, 180},
        {90, 0, 0},
        {0, -90, -90},
        {0, 90, 90},
    }
}

-- Char width table by Indimeco
ref_charUnitWidth = {
    ['`'] = 2381, ['~'] = 2381, ['1'] = 1724, ['!'] = 1493, ['2'] = 2381,
    ['@'] = 4348, ['3'] = 2381, ['#'] = 3030, ['4'] = 2564, ['$'] = 2381,
    ['5'] = 2381, ['%'] = 3846, ['6'] = 2564, ['^'] = 2564, ['7'] = 2174,
    ['&'] = 2777, ['8'] = 2564, ['*'] = 2174, ['9'] = 2564, ['('] = 1724,
    ['0'] = 2564, [')'] = 1724, ['-'] = 1724, ['_'] = 2381, ['='] = 2381,
    ['+'] = 2381, ['q'] = 2564, ['Q'] = 3226, ['w'] = 3704, ['W'] = 4167,
    ['e'] = 2174, ['E'] = 2381, ['r'] = 1724, ['R'] = 2777, ['t'] = 1724,
    ['T'] = 2381, ['y'] = 2564, ['Y'] = 2564, ['u'] = 2564, ['U'] = 3030,
    ['i'] = 1282, ['I'] = 1282, ['o'] = 2381, ['O'] = 3226, ['p'] = 2564,
    ['P'] = 2564, ['['] = 1724, ['{'] = 1724, [']'] = 1724, ['}'] = 1724,
    ['|'] = 1493, ['\\'] = 1923, ['a'] = 2564, ['A'] = 2777, ['s'] = 1923,
    ['S'] = 2381, ['d'] = 2564, ['D'] = 3030, ['f'] = 1724, ['F'] = 2381,
    ['g'] = 2564, ['G'] = 2777, ['h'] = 2564, ['H'] = 3030, ['j'] = 1075,
    ['J'] = 1282, ['k'] = 2381, ['K'] = 2777, ['l'] = 1282, ['L'] = 2174,
    [';'] = 1282, [':'] = 1282, ['\''] = 855, ['"'] = 1724, ['z'] = 1923,
    ['Z'] = 2564, ['x'] = 2381, ['X'] = 2777, ['c'] = 1923, ['C'] = 2564,
    ['v'] = 2564, ['V'] = 2777, ['b'] = 2564, ['B'] = 2564, ['n'] = 2564,
    ['N'] = 3226, ['m'] = 3846, ['M'] = 3846, [','] = 1282, ['<'] = 2174,

}

ObjectStates.LuaScript:
function updateSave()
    local data_to_save = {["ml"]=memoryList}
    saved_data = JSON.encode(data_to_save)
    self.script_state = saved_data
end

function onload(saved_data)
    if saved_data ~= "" then
        local loaded_data = JSON.decode(saved_data)
        --Set up information off of loaded_data
        memoryList = loaded_data.ml
    else
        --Set up information for if there is no saved saved data
        memoryList = {}
    end

    if next(memoryList) == nil then
        createSetupButton()
    else
        createMemoryActionButtons()
    end
end


--Beginning Setup


--Make setup button
function createSetupButton()
    self.createButton({
        label="Setup", click_function="buttonClick_setup", function_owner=self,
        position={0,0.3,-2}, rotation={0,180,0}, height=350, width=800,
        font_size=250, color={0,0,0}, font_color={1,1,1}
    })
end

--Triggered by setup button,
function buttonClick_setup()
    memoryListBackup = duplicateTable(memoryList)
    memoryList = {}
    self.clearButtons()
    createButtonsOnAllObjects()
    createSetupActionButtons()
end

--Creates selection buttons on objects
function createButtonsOnAllObjects()
    local howManyButtons = 0
    for _, obj in ipairs(getAllObjects()) do
        if obj ~= self then
            local dummyIndex = howManyButtons
            --On a normal bag, the button positions aren't the same size as the bag.
            globalScaleFactor = 1.25 * 1/self.getScale().x
            --Super sweet math to set button positions
            local selfPos = self.getPosition()
            local objPos = obj.getPosition()
            local deltaPos = findOffsetDistance(selfPos, objPos, obj)
            local objPos = rotateLocalCoordinates(deltaPos, self)
            objPos.x = -objPos.x * globalScaleFactor
            objPos.y = objPos.y * globalScaleFactor
            objPos.z = objPos.z * globalScaleFactor
            --Offset rotation of bag
            local rot = self.getRotation()
            rot.y = -rot.y + 180
            --Create function
            local funcName = "selectButton_" .. howManyButtons
            local func = function() buttonClick_selection(dummyIndex, obj) end
            self.setVar(funcName, func)
            self.createButton({
                click_function=funcName, function_owner=self,
                position=objPos, rotation=rot, height=1000, width=1000,
                color={0.75,0.25,0.25,0.6},
            })
            howManyButtons = howManyButtons + 1
        end
    end
end

--Creates submit and cancel buttons
function createSetupActionButtons()
    self.createButton({
        label="Cancel", click_function="buttonClick_cancel", function_owner=self,
        position={0,0.3,-2}, rotation={0,180,0}, height=350, width=1100,
        font_size=250, color={0,0,0}, font_color={1,1,1}
    })
    self.createButton({
        label="Submit", click_function="buttonClick_submit", function_owner=self,
        position={0,0.3,-2.8}, rotation={0,180,0}, height=350, width=1100,
        font_size=250, color={0,0,0}, font_color={1,1,1}
    })
    self.createButton({
        label="Reset", click_function="buttonClick_reset", function_owner=self,
        position={-2,0.3,0}, rotation={0,270,0}, height=350, width=800,
        font_size=250, color={0,0,0}, font_color={1,1,1}
    })
end


--During Setup


--Checks or unchecks buttons
function buttonClick_selection(index, obj)
    local color = {0,1,0,0.6}
    if memoryList[obj.getGUID()] == nil then
        self.editButton({index=index, color=color})
        --Adding pos/rot to memory table
        local pos, rot = obj.getPosition(), obj.getRotation()
        --I need to add it like this or it won't save due to indexing issue
        memoryList[obj.getGUID()] = {
            pos={x=round(pos.x,4), y=round(pos.y,4), z=round(pos.z,4)},
            rot={x=round(rot.x,4), y=round(rot.y,4), z=round(rot.z,4)},
            lock=obj.getLock()
        }
        obj.highlightOn({0,1,0})
    else
        color = {0.75,0.25,0.25,0.6}
        self.editButton({index=index, color=color})
        memoryList[obj.getGUID()] = nil
        obj.highlightOff()
    end
end

--Cancels selection process
function buttonClick_cancel()
    memoryList = memoryListBackup
    self.clearButtons()
    if next(memoryList) == nil then
        createSetupButton()
    else
        createMemoryActionButtons()
    end
    removeAllHighlights()
    broadcastToAll("Selection Canceled", {1,1,1})
end

--Saves selections
function buttonClick_submit()
    if next(memoryList) == nil then
        broadcastToAll("You cannot submit without any selections.", {0.75, 0.25, 0.25})
    else
        self.clearButtons()
        createMemoryActionButtons()
        local count = 0
        for guid in pairs(memoryList) do
            count = count + 1
            local obj = getObjectFromGUID(guid)
            if obj ~= nil then obj.highlightOff() end
        end
        broadcastToAll(count.." Objects Saved", {1,1,1})
        updateSave()
    end
end

--Resets bag to starting status
function buttonClick_reset()
    memoryList = {}
    self.clearButtons()
    createSetupButton()
    removeAllHighlights()
    broadcastToAll("Tool Reset", {1,1,1})
    updateSave()
end


--After Setup


--Creates recall and place buttons
function createMemoryActionButtons()
    self.createButton({
        label="Place", click_function="buttonClick_place", function_owner=self,
        position={0,0.3,-2}, rotation={0,180,0}, height=350, width=800,
        font_size=250, color={0,0,0}, font_color={1,1,1}
    })
    self.createButton({
        label="Recall", click_function="buttonClick_recall", function_owner=self,
        position={0,0.3,-2.8}, rotation={0,180,0}, height=350, width=800,
        font_size=250, color={0,0,0}, font_color={1,1,1}
    })
    self.createButton({
        label="Setup", click_function="buttonClick_setup", function_owner=self,
        position={-2,0.3,0}, rotation={0,270,0}, height=350, width=800,
        font_size=250, color={0,0,0}, font_color={1,1,1}
    })
end

--Sends objects from bag/table to their saved position/rotation
function buttonClick_place()
    local bagObjList = self.getObjects()
    for guid, entry in pairs(memoryList) do
        local obj = getObjectFromGUID(guid)
        --If obj is out on the table, move it to the saved pos/rot
        if obj ~= nil then
            obj.setPositionSmooth(entry.pos)
            obj.setRotationSmooth(entry.rot)
            obj.setLock(entry.lock)
        else
            --If obj is inside of the bag
            for _, bagObj in ipairs(bagObjList) do
                if bagObj.guid == guid then
                    local item = self.takeObject({
                        guid=guid, position=entry.pos, rotation=entry.rot,
                    })
                    item.setLock(entry.lock)
                    local itemdesc = item.getDescription()
                    if string.find(itemdesc, 'show:') then
                        if string.find(itemdesc, 'hite') then
                            item.setInvisibleTo({'Brown', 'Red', 'Orange', 'Yellow', 'Green', 'Teal', 'Blue', 'Purple', 'Pink', 'Grey'})
                        elseif string.find(itemdesc, 'rown') then
                            item.setInvisibleTo({'White', 'Red', 'Orange', 'Yellow', 'Green', 'Teal', 'Blue', 'Purple', 'Pink', 'Grey'})
                        elseif string.find(itemdesc, 'ed') then
                            item.setInvisibleTo({'White', 'Brown', 'Orange', 'Yellow', 'Green', 'Teal', 'Blue', 'Purple', 'Pink', 'Grey'})
                        elseif string.find(itemdesc, 'range') then
                            item.setInvisibleTo({'White', 'Brown', 'Red', 'Yellow', 'Green', 'Teal', 'Blue', 'Purple', 'Pink', 'Grey'})
                        elseif string.find(itemdesc, 'ellow') then
                            item.setInvisibleTo({'White', 'Brown', 'Red', 'Orange', 'Green', 'Teal', 'Blue', 'Purple', 'Pink', 'Grey'})
                        elseif string.find(itemdesc, 'reen') then
                            item.setInvisibleTo({'White', 'Brown', 'Red', 'Orange', 'Yellow', 'Teal', 'Blue', 'Purple', 'Pink', 'Grey'})
                        elseif string.find(itemdesc, 'eal') then
                            item.setInvisibleTo({'White', 'Brown', 'Red', 'Orange', 'Yellow', 'Green', 'Blue', 'Purple', 'Pink', 'Grey'})
                        elseif string.find(itemdesc, 'lue') then
                            item.setInvisibleTo({'White', 'Brown', 'Red', 'Orange', 'Yellow', 'Green', 'Teal', 'Purple', 'Pink', 'Grey'})
                        elseif string.find(itemdesc, 'urple') then
                            item.setInvisibleTo({'White', 'Brown', 'Red', 'Orange', 'Yellow', 'Green', 'Teal', 'Blue', 'Pink', 'Grey'})
                        elseif string.find(itemdesc, 'ink') then
                            item.setInvisibleTo({'White', 'Brown', 'Red', 'Orange', 'Yellow', 'Green', 'Teal', 'Blue', 'Purple', 'Grey'})
                        elseif string.find(itemdesc, 'lack') then
                            item.setInvisibleTo({'White', 'Brown', 'Red', 'Orange', 'Yellow', 'Green', 'Teal', 'Blue', 'Purple', 'Pink', 'Grey'})
                        end
                    end
                    break
                end
            end
        end
    end
    -- broadcastToAll("Objects Placed", {1,1,1})
end

--Recalls objects to bag from table
function buttonClick_recall()
    for guid, entry in pairs(memoryList) do
        local obj = getObjectFromGUID(guid)
        if obj ~= nil then self.putObject(obj) end
    end
    -- broadcastToAll("Objects Recalled", {1,1,1})
end


--Utility functions


--Find delta (difference) between 2 x/y/z coordinates
function findOffsetDistance(p1, p2, obj)
    local deltaPos = {}
    local bounds = obj.getBounds()
    deltaPos.x = (p2.x-p1.x)
    deltaPos.y = (p2.y-p1.y) + (bounds.size.y - bounds.offset.y)
    deltaPos.z = (p2.z-p1.z)
    return deltaPos
end

--Used to rotate a set of coordinates by an angle
function rotateLocalCoordinates(desiredPos, obj)
	local objPos, objRot = obj.getPosition(), obj.getRotation()
    local angle = math.rad(objRot.y)
	local x = desiredPos.x * math.cos(angle) - desiredPos.z * math.sin(angle)
	local z = desiredPos.x * math.sin(angle) + desiredPos.z * math.cos(angle)
	--return {x=objPos.x+x, y=objPos.y+desiredPos.y, z=objPos.z+z}
    return {x=x, y=desiredPos.y, z=z}
end

--Coroutine delay, in seconds
function wait(time)
    local start = os.time()
    repeat coroutine.yield(0) until os.time() > start + time
end

--Duplicates a table (needed to prevent it making reference to the same objects)
function duplicateTable(oldTable)
    local newTable = {}
    for k, v in pairs(oldTable) do
        newTable[k] = v
    end
    return newTable
end

--Moves scripted highlight from all objects
function removeAllHighlights()
    for _, obj in ipairs(getAllObjects()) do
        obj.highlightOff()
    end
end

--Round number (num) to the Nth decimal (dec)
function round(num, dec)
  local mult = 10^(dec or 0)
  return math.floor(num * mult + 0.5) / mult
end
